nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐...就算你有媒体证，进入军事地点还是要万事小心

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#你顾好红楼就可以，这里造船厂，如果能找出师父参加黑龙任务时，使用的龙脉探测船型号...

应该有机会找到通往黑龙的线索...咦？

前面是在说什么？

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#愿铁火于星辰闪耀...我们的分歧比你想像的更小...在龙脉问题上，我们有很多合作的空间...

#AVATAR:TowerElder_N##NONAME#后土行歌，万道常在，我们女巫是矿联最好的伙伴...#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, we may have a media pass, but we still have to be careful in these military zones.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#You just worry about Red Chamber. If I can find some info on the ship used for Master's mission here...

It might give us more clues to the location of Banshee... Hey.

What're those people up ahead talking about?

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#May fire and iron light the stars... Our views on caves are more similar than you might think.

There's plenty of room for cooperation...

#AVATAR:TowerElder_N##NONAME#By the song of Terra, may Myria be with you always. You know witches are United Mining's most reliable partner...#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#

nodes.snippet: 拜託了，太乙垂憐，魂歸瀛海日照
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#...抱歉，李莫，我上次说话比较不客气

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我不在意，我比较在意我们一定要进来这吗，这里戒备那么森严...

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#这里是矿联的重点矿场，应该有派过不少女巫巡查过

师父很有可能来过这里...

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#喂、是来支援的探测队吗？

我们通讯器坏得彻底，就靠你们发送讯号，把那些该死的神明炸飞，我们矿场就能开通了！#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#...Sorry, Jun, my attitude could have been better last time.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#It's fine, I don't mind.

But I am worried about the intense security around here. Are you sure we need to go in?

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#This is one of United Mining's most important caves. They must have sent a lot of witches to survey this place.

My master may have been one of them...

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Hey. You the exploration crew sent to help? Our comms system is totally screwed.

Help us send out our signals so we can blast these spirits to high heaven and start mining the damn cave!#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet:
菈米亞，密碼是
「太乙垂憐，魂歸瀛海日照」
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#红楼？你们是借港停泊吗，真太开心了，我们的新仿声器刚好差个探勘人来调校

你们船队有位超厉害的瀛海探勘人对吧，能帮我们测试吗？

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我渐渐也被群山人认可了...艾妲，我希望能帮这个忙

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#我们探勘人厉不厉害我不知道，找麻烦倒是很会

不希望实验数据坏掉的话，要不要找别人呢？

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#好了两位，我来决定就好
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#Red Chamber? Will you be docking here? That's wonderful!

It just so happens that we're looking for runners to help us tune these newly developed synthescepters.

You've got an experienced East Ocean runner aboard, don't you? Could he come help us test them out?

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#The Peakers are finally starting to accept me... Eda, I'd love to go help.

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#Haha! I'm not sure how good he is, but boy does he know how to cause trouble.

If you don't want your data to get screwed up, you should probably find someone else. But it's up to you!

#AVATAR:Girl_ClosedEyes#Will you two cut it out? I'll decide.

nodes.snippet: （對不起，鯤...）
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#（这两人怎么又不见了，不是说参观一下矿场就走吗？）

#AVATAR:MountCitizenA_N##NONAME#你们是船队红楼吗？太好了，我们矿场正在进行神灵移驾的动作，但合同中的女巫因为被刁难被气走了

...你知道，龙脉冲突的遗族很难原谅她们

印象中你们的船长，也是个女巫...帮个忙吧，我保证不会让人刁难你们#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#(Those two are gone again? Didn't they say we'd leave right after checking out the cave?)

#AVATAR:MountCitizenA_N##NONAME#Are you the Red Chamber crew? Excellent! We're currently in the process of moving the spirits to another location...

But one of the witches we were working with stomped off after someone was a bit hard on her.

...You know how it is. Those displaced by the war have a tough time forgiving witches.

If I'm not mistaken, your captain is a witch. Could you help us out? I promise, we'll treat you well.#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#

nodes.snippet: 跑！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUJournalist_N##NONAME#谢谢会长配合访谈的录制，有你对群山人说明，想必在群山推广龙脉指定法，一定轻松许多。

#AVATAR:MountTheTenA_N#大家互相帮忙，我还忙，早点先走了

......

（搞什么指定法协力宣导...这种压迫女巫的法令...)

（为了大局，我只能当矿联的传声筒吗？）

#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#（竟然会遇到会长...他们在做什么政治交换吗...）

#AVATAR:MountTheTenA_N#喂喂...这是怎样...

小女巫来这做什么，黑龙任务呢？

算了，我记得你们船队有位黑客，待会一标准时后会有我录制的节目...

别让那种东西播出来...听好，这件事对彼此都有帮助，女孩#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUJournalist_N##NONAME#Thank you very much for taking the time to do this interview, President.

Your explanation of the Lumen Mining Act will surely make it easier to promote in the Peaks.

#AVATAR:MountTheTenA_N#Well, it's only possible if we all work together. Thank you so much. Now, I'm afraid I'm quite busy and have to be going.

......

(What the hell am I doing helping promote this act... this law designed to oppress witches!)

(Is being a mouthpiece for United Mining really for the greater good?)

#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#(What's the president doing here? What kind of deal are they making?)

#AVATAR:MountTheTenA_N#Hey... What's this?

What are you doing here? What about the Banshee Mission?

Ah, forget it. Listen, you have a hacker onboard, right? In one hour they're going to broadcast that show I just recorded...

Do not let that broadcast get out. Trust me, it'll be good for both of us.#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

nodes.snippet: 大魁，我們走！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#三号汜水源头，没人管了吗？ 管工厂的女巫呢，叫她们出来！

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#打扰，听说高层这阵子，在寻找叫做「黑龙」的矿脉，你有听说过吗？

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#你们哪一班来的...什么鬼黑龙，没看我在忙吗？

有看见上周被派来的女巫吗？我就跟上层说不要启用这些活体兵器！

#AVATAR:Girl_Unwilling#（竟然说得出口活体兵器...你们的胜利不就是师父帮你们打仗...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#Why isn't there anyone looking after Pipeline 3? Who's the witch in charge of this factory? Tell her to come over!

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#Excuse me... I heard that the superiors are looking for a cave called "Banshee"? Have you heard anything about it?

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#Huh? Which group are you with? Can't you see I'm busy?

Have you seen the witches they sent last week? I told my bosses that these so-called war machines are useless!

#AVATAR:Girl_Unwilling#(War machines? Wasn't it because of my master that you were able to win the war?)

nodes.snippet: 姊姊成功了，他們才開始懷疑我，妳說的太空船就爆炸了，哪來的瀛海船炸得我真愉快
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#你们已违反龙脉花卉的出口限制，再说一次，你现在的行为与言语，已经妨碍公务的执行

#AVATAR:TowerWanderer_N##NONAME#说几次都行，听好你的矿业联合！

我的花卉是要拿来救人的药草，但你的管制是要来帮你发战争财的！

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（花卉贸易...我以为这是只有女巫才会做的生意...）

（我应该可以帮帮她...记得以前师父是怎么处理的？)

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐别乱来...之前花卉谈判都是师父在做的，这没处理好连我们也会遭殃#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#You have violated the lumen plant export restrictions, lady.

I'm warning you again, your actions and attitude is an obstruction of justice.

#AVATAR:TowerWanderer_N##NONAME#You can say it as many times as you want. You listen to me!

Our herbs are for healing people! But your restrictions just give you more money for war!

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(I thought only witches were in the plant trade...)

(I'm sure I could help her somehow... How would Master handle this?)

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, don't involve yourself... Master used to handle all the negotiations.

If we stick our noses in this, we're gonna get in trouble too.#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#

nodes.snippet:
一群人在碼頭亂成一團，
趁現在！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，透过斑鸠的情报网络，红楼收到了一段加密信息委托

看来是附近的移民船，想要强制冲过海关逃亡，但遇到了困难...

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#...我叫艾琳达，我是刚刚逃出了矿联新女巫队的成员...他们又想打仗了

听說你是红的徒弟...一定懂我不想作战的心情...

拜托，我们有龙脉情报作为谢礼...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#（女巫几乎逃不过被征召...为什么只有我...可以躲过这些）

（是因为我很没用，所以连师父都帮不了吗...？）

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#拜托快回答，海关马上要追来了，帮不帮忙，说一声！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, we got an encrypted message from Benzel's intel network.

Looks like an immigration vessel nearby tried to force their way through a customs barrier and ran into some trouble...

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#My name is Arrigo. I'm a former member of United Mining's new squad of witches who recently deserted.

They're waging war once more...

I heard you're a pupil of Red's... So, you must know how I feel about war...

Please, I'll give you lumen intel for your trouble...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#(It seems like almost all the witches are drafted...)

(Why am I the only one who has always avoided it?)

(Am I so useless... that I can't even help my master?)

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#Please! Hurry up... customs is coming! Are you helping or not?!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#

nodes.snippet: 動作快，我的人已經進來了！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（废弃的很严重...这探索会有点麻烦...）

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，废墟很危险，我跟你一起登陆吧，毕竟我的任务是协助探勘...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#是探勘没错，并不是陪姐姐

你留在船上，我下去

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#两位都留在船上，不需要陪我

这要怎么搜索呢...？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(This place is pretty ruined... Exploring it is going to take some effort...)

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, these ruins are dangerous. I'll go with you. After all, it's my job to do the running.

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#Yeah, your job is running, not hanging out with Eddie.

You stay on board. I'll go.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#Both of you stay. I'm going alone...

Alright, how am I going to search this place...?

nodes.snippet: 姊姊，港口第六號停機坪！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#这里是矿联公务船，请听到广播的所有船只，立刻离开现在的空域！

这里即将进行巫塔的拆除作业，请不要妨碍公务，干扰施工团队#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，矿业联合禁止我们停泊

这样下去会有罚锾产生，要不要早点离开？

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#···这里是艾妲曾经居住的家，如果金额不高，她会有她的想法#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#This is United Mining, to all vessels who have received this broadcast, please leave the airspace immediately!

We are about to start dismantling the Witching Tower. Do not attempt to obstruct the work, or disturb the crew.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, they won't let us dock.

We're going to get fined if we don't leave. Let's get going.

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#...Eda used to live here. If it's not a high fine, she probably has her own thoughts on the matter.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet: 鯤...對不起
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#废墟的深处有一个奇怪的货柜，保存的意外良好，这边有什么建议吗，艾妲？

#AVATAR:Girl_N#（如果李莫的拾荒设备都充足的话，试试看也不一定是坏事...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#There's a strange container in the depths of the ruins. It's in surprisingly good condition. What do you want to do, Eda?

#AVATAR:Girl_N#(If Jun has the supplies, it wouldn't hurt to have him try to get it...)

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#年轻人，你也是来悼念我们小行星带的勇士们吗？

握起你的龙守星盘，把想说的话告诉龙守，丢进池中就可以了

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（这应该是感谢星环自由战线，特别为他们建立的龙守圣地...）

（没想到还有人看守...）

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#忘了带龙守星盘吗，没关系...

只要你记得我们的口号... 「龙脉常在，风水引路...」#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Young man, are you here to mourn the heroes of the belt as well?

Take your Praesidio Astrolabe and pray to our lords Praesidio. Then throw it in the pond, and they will watch over you.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(This Praesidio sanctuary must have been built to show appreciation for the Ring Liberation Front...)

(Didn't think there'd be someone taking care of it...)

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Did you forget your astrolabe? Not a problem...

So long as you remember our motto... "Endless lumen, light the way..."#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#

nodes.snippet: 阻止他們！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#红楼侦测到周遭空域停留着龙脉冲突战场的诡雷

我们的热源持续被监听中... 瀛海人听着，请直接执行拆除任务

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#李莫，收回菈米亚的行动，那太危险了，你可能会有生命危险

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#我没问题的，艾妲#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#Red Chamber has detected booby traps left over from the Lumen War in the surrounding airspace.

Our heat signal is being monitored... Listen up, Oceaner, go and dismantle them immediately.

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#Jun, don't listen to her. That sounds way too risky. You could die!

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Eda, I'll be fine.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet: 唔！
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#艾妲有些古怪···冰冻的植物群内，有一个被深锁的大门，请指示#AVATAR:Girl_N#
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Eda, there's a bunch of strange, frozen plants inside and a giant door that's locked pretty tight. What should I do?#AVATAR:Girl_N#

nodes.snippet: 警告：紅樓被鎖定
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#艾妲，矿场深处的有一艘破旧的船舰... 「愿律法支撑商业的天平...」 看这徽章，应该是伦敦商业联盟的运输船

有建议的处理方式吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_N#（商业联盟是战前知名的行星商人势力，如果有什么遗留的货柜，对旅行应该帮助很大...要想一下...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Eda, there's an old, broken ship in the distance... "May the power of law bring justice to industry..."

By the looks of this insignia, it's probably a transport vessel from the London Trade Alliance. What do you want to do?

#AVATAR:Girl_N#(The London Trade Alliance was a famous merchant faction before the war. If there are any containers inside, they're probably filled with some useful stuff...)

nodes.snippet: 警告：左側裝甲受損

nodes.snippet: 進入加速倒數
nodes.snippet_CHS:
印象中，飞船的深处是散落一地的货柜，
可能是过去逃难时来不及带走的货物。
虽然多花了点时间，但总是将它们带回来了。
nodes.snippet_EN: Containers were scattered all over the floor of the spaceship. Perhaps they were rushing to escape and didn't have the time to take the goods. It took a long time, but we were eventually able to bring them back to Red Chamber.

nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得当时只要不是龙穴，艾妲多半认为，不需要多花时间在这些地方。
nodes.snippet_EN: Back in those days, if it wasn't a cave, most of the time Eda didn't want to waste time on it.

nodes.snippet: 大魁你...傷口承受得了加速嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 大魁你...傷口承受得了加速嗎？

nodes.snippet: 你們快坐好，記得傷口壓緊
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你們快坐好，記得傷口壓緊
nodes.snippet_EN: 你們快坐好，記得傷口壓緊
nodes.snippet_CHT: 你們快坐好，記得傷口壓緊
nodes.snippet_JP: 你們快坐好，記得傷口壓緊

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#只知道寻找龙脉的探勘人，这里没有你要的情报

你看到的这船，龙骨是由兄弟们的灵魂所铸，如今随时都要崩塌...

我不能放着它散落回宇宙的大海， 如果你手边有破损的装甲组件...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（船舱比想像中还破旧，这看来是撑不久了...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#All you runners do is look for lumen. There's no intel here for you.

The hull of this ship was cast from the souls of my brothers, and yet it's on the verge of collapse.

I can't just let it crumble into the void of space. If you've got any damaged armor plates lying around...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(The ship looks worse than I imagined. There's no way it'll hold on for much longer...)

nodes.snippet: 是李莫吧，不好意思跟你說了那麼多失禮的話
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#姐姐，轨道上的不明物体与我们即将交会，分析是长约2标准尺的物件...

讯号微弱，要试图捕捉吗？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#Eddie, we're coming up on an unidentified object. Analysis has revealed that it's about 2 standard meters long...

The signal is really weak, should we try to salvage it?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

nodes.snippet: 一！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
收到母船的登陆讯号，
同时又收到伪造的禁止登入讯号，
趁着对方正感到困惑时，
红楼迅速远离。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The boarding vessel received the mother ship's docking signal at the same time we sent them a signal prohibiting them from docking.

While they were trying to figure out what was going on, Red Chamber sped away.

nodes.snippet: 別說話，會咬到舌頭
nodes.snippet_CHS: 別說話，會咬到舌頭
nodes.snippet_EN: 別說話，會咬到舌頭
nodes.snippet_CHT: 別說話，會咬到舌頭
nodes.snippet_JP: 別說話，會咬到舌頭

nodes.snippet: 你們到底是誰啦！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 你們到底是誰啦！
nodes.snippet_EN: 你們到底是誰啦！
nodes.snippet_CHT: 你們到底是誰啦！
nodes.snippet_JP: 你們到底是誰啦！

nodes.snippet:
脫離白幫根據地6 標準時後

廢棄貿易站「梅費爾」
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们将自己伪装成高级军官，
运输队对自己的误认连番致歉，
在艾妲斥责下，甚至付出了封口费，
只希望我们别说出他们的丑事。
nodes.snippet_EN: We pretended to be high-ranking military officials, and the transport crew was unable to stop apologizing. Eda reprimanded them so much that they ended up paying us to not let anyone know about their mistake.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
伪造讯号不算太成功，
只有争取到极短的时间远离登陆艇轨道，
对方母船的炮火掠过了红楼装甲，
造成了不少伤害。
nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal didn't work too well. We were able to bide enough time to move away from the boarding vessel. However, the mother ship attacked, and Red Chamber was hit pretty hard.

nodes.snippet: 他們也幫了我，菈米亞接受他...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 他們也幫了我，菈米亞接受他...
nodes.snippet_EN: 他們也幫了我，菈米亞接受他...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 他們也幫了我，菈米亞接受他...
nodes.snippet_JP: 他們也幫了我，菈米亞接受他...

nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号才刚出去，红楼就收到了讯号

「傻子等着船给我们回收吧」

海盗的火网整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。
nodes.snippet_EN:
As soon as they received the signal, they responded immediately. "Hey dummy dumbs, we coming for your ship!"

A hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.

nodes.snippet: 不需要就下船啊，麻煩帶著你的僕役
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲希望透过伪造成烛龙商会，去帮忙说情，
但计划没有成功。

希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda tried to pose as the Myrian Ignis Guild and get them help, but it didn't work.

To this day, I still pray that they made it out.

nodes.snippet: 他是我的親衛，不准妳這樣說話！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对方是非法基地台「兔窟二」的业务船，上面的防火墙当然不好惹。

一个操作失误，对方的系统便反向入侵了红楼。造成了多处系统失灵。
nodes.snippet_EN:
It came as no surprise that the firewall on the illegal base station's service vessel wasn't easy to get past.

As soon as one of Remi's operations failed, they counter-attacked, hacking into Red Chamber and causing multiple systems to go haywire.

nodes.snippet: 要命！少主...成熟點...咳！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
伪造的讯号失败了，
记得在一阵惊慌中，我们急忙驾船远离，
对方的炮火却炸坏了红楼装甲数个洞。
nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal failed and I remember us flying off in a panic. Even though we got away, the ship fired off several rounds and managed to puncture Red Chamber's armor with a few holes.

nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲试图捕捉对方的位置，但可能是花了太多时间，对方怀疑我们的身份，随即对我们展开攻击。红楼好不容易才脱险。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda tried to pin down their location, but it must have taken too long. They got suspicious and immediately opened fire.

Red Chamber barely got away.

nodes.snippet:
好了，我們都在同一艘船，
彼此都不准吵
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时的我们，面对每一次伪造讯号的失败，变得越来越难信任菈米亚。
nodes.snippet_EN: Each time Remi's modified signals failed to work, it got harder for us to trust her in situations like this.

nodes.snippet: 菈米亞，通訊恢復了嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 讯号一出去，货柜的自动安检系统运作了起来，爆裂后的碎片击中红楼的甲板。
nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as the signal went out, the container's auto-safety mechanisms were triggered and it exploded into a million pieces. Some of the flying fragments hit Red Chamber pretty hard.

nodes.snippet: 沒辦法...系統壞得徹底，這原本不是大問題但...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 沒辦法...系統壞得徹底，這原本不是大問題但...
nodes.snippet_EN: 沒辦法...系統壞得徹底，這原本不是大問題但...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 沒辦法...系統壞得徹底，這原本不是大問題但...
nodes.snippet_JP: 沒辦法...系統壞得徹底，這原本不是大問題但...

nodes.snippet: 手邊沒有任何零件的備料...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼透过计算机计算，发布复杂的航道导引，终于在空域统一了运输船的航行路线，直到龙洞探险公司的回收船抵达，航行的船只都没有遇到互抢轨道的危机。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber calculated a complex route for all the freighters in orbit and broadcast it out. The ships made it to Luma Caverna without causing any crashes or clogging up the orbit.

nodes.snippet: 附近是龍脈衝突的戰場，有可能有通訊設備的零件嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼没能瞒过对方。对于劝阻不听的民船，警备船也毫不犹豫地展开攻击。
nodes.snippet_EN: We were unable to trick them, and they were more than happy to unload their guns on a civilian vessel that wouldn't obey orders.

nodes.snippet: 咳！
nodes.snippet_CHS: （不会发生）

nodes.snippet: 大魁...還好嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
伪造的编码遭到识破，
红楼因为妨碍公务而被攻击。
nodes.snippet_EN: The modified signal was cracked, and we were attacked for obstructing justice.

nodes.snippet: ...亂七八糟的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
红楼透过讯号伪造，宣称自己是直属于军方高层的女巫长，该女巫是执行不可说的机密任务，对方见状只能放弃追捕。

「希望师父也有人能帮她。」 事后聊起这件事，艾妲只默默如此说，没有欣喜。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Red Chamber used a modified signal to pose as a high-ranking witch in the military. We told them that the witch was on a top-secret mission, so they had no choice but to give up the chase.

When I brought it up later, Eda only responded quietly, "I wish my master had someone to help her."

nodes.snippet:
這樣吧...瀛海人，
你希望醫療你的僕...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
新闻船的通讯设备损坏严重，菈米亚维修后也只恢复有限的通讯能力。
但足以让特派员传讯给协会了。
nodes.snippet_EN: The news ship's comms system was pretty badly damaged. Remi was able to fix it up, but could only restore some of its functions. Still, it was enough for them to send the message.

nodes.snippet: 親衛，菈米亞，說很多次
nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号传入广播船，对方暂停了盖台，
但片刻后便识破红楼的伪装。
护卫的矿联巡逻船逼近，
威吓以重罪起诉。
红楼拼了命才逃离。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The signal was picked up by the broadcasting vessel and the attempted jam was stopped in its tracks. They saw through Red Chamber's disguise and the United Mining patrol ship responsible for protection closed in on Red Chamber, threatening us with prosecution for serious crimes.

We escaped... But only barely.

nodes.snippet: 當然！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
干扰失败，警备船认定我们是海盗展开攻击。
幸好他们还是以保护运输队为优先任务，
驱离一段距离后，便停止追击。
nodes.snippet_EN: The interference failed, and the guard ship attacked us after figuring we were pirates. Lucky for us, their primary job was ensuring the safety of the freighters. After we put some distance between them, they eventually stopped.

nodes.snippet:
如果你幫我拾荒，
倒是可以幫忙找個醫生
nodes.snippet_CHS:
尽管对方没有登陆红楼，但在追逐时，
对方母船发出的一轮炮火，
将我们装甲打穿了数个凹洞。
nodes.snippet_EN: While they weren't able to board the ship, during the chase, the mother ship fired off a few rounds that pierced several holes in Red Chamber's armor.

nodes.snippet: 別趁人受傷時說這種話
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「...这里没有这个星球的名字，你骗人！」

机器人艾姆说着，转头回到空间站深处，我再也没有看到他了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"There's no such planet here! You liar!"

The robot named Emeth disappeared into the depths of the space station and we never saw him again.

nodes.snippet: ...上船總得做點事吧
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们通话才说完，对方火网突然整片撒了过来，菈米亚费尽心力，才成功脱出交战的空域。
nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as we finished speaking a hail of gunfire rained down on us, and it took all of Remi's skills to get us out of there.

nodes.snippet: 別聽她的，你不幫忙我們，也會幫你找醫生的
nodes.snippet_CHS: 希望他们能度过难关，至今我依然祈求。
nodes.snippet_EN: To this day, I still pray that they made it out.

nodes.option: 為了大魁，答應吧
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们屏蔽了对方的广告讯号，艾妲严格禁止菈米亚黑进对方计算机的提案。
菈米亚照做了，但还是在旁边抱怨了好一会才停。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We were getting bombarded with ads, but Eda forbid Remi from hacking into their computer.

Remi listened, but she sat there complaining for quite some time before settling down.
nodes.option_EN: Remi, enough with the pranks.

nodes.snippet_EN:
"May your fortunes shine upon us, and cast away the darkness." After they boarded the ship and described the countless goods on hand, we picked out a valuable Myrian antique.

It wasn't until they left that we found some suspicious cracks on it...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「愿您出手如光，远离黑暗」
他们上船后跟我们介绍了无数文物，
我们挑了一份万道珍奇的古董。

直到对方离开后，
却发现古董有些微妙的破损...

nodes.snippet_EN:
"Shouldn't be flying one of their vessels."

We tried to be friendly, but they opened fire right after sending us this message.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「怪你们开的是矿联的船吧。」

我们试着表达友善的信息，
对方却撂下这句话展开攻击。

nodes.snippet: 啊啊，真是...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
在菈米亚的抱怨中，
我们拆卸了船上的部分装甲组件交给对方，
我常在想，如果艾妲当时信任菈米亚多点，
我跟菈米亚会不会少点冲突。
nodes.snippet_EN: As Remi complained, we dismantled a few armor plates and handed them to the other vessel. I often wondered if Eda trusted Remi more, would we have argued any less?

nodes.snippet:
姊姊，就讓他們待一下，
反正也沒多久
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲始终明确知道重点是什么，
坚定着自己的方向，
至少那时我以为如此。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was always focused on her goal, and never wasted time on things that didn't help her reach it. At least that's what I thought at the time.

nodes.snippet: ...如果李莫願意的話
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲当作没有这回事离开，她不喜欢矿业联合。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda acted like she didn't know what the woman was talking about. Boy, she did not like United Mining.

nodes.snippet: 我現在就幫你們拾荒，但群山多半是廢棄的戰場，可能會需要探勘設備
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管我们很努力，但要快速沟通全空域中的交通船只并不容易，有些频道甚至没有开启，最后在一片混乱中，我们只得默默离开。
nodes.snippet_EN: We tried our best, but it was difficult to communicate with all the ships in the airspace in such a short period of time, especially since some ships didn't even turn on their communication channels. In the end, we just silently drifted away from the chaos.

nodes.snippet: ...菈米亞，跟李莫說設備放在哪裡
nodes.snippet_CHS:
菈米亚那时没被艾妲信任，
渐渐有了芥蒂，虽然最后逃走，
但不论装甲还是心里，都多有损伤。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda didn't think Remi would be able to convince them, so we charged through, leaving Remi a bit hurt. Even though we managed to escape, both the ship and their relationship were slightly damaged.

nodes.snippet: 有找到什麼嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 警备船看我们不听劝，反而加速前进，磁轨炮烧过红楼的装甲，我只记得一片白色的光芒...
nodes.snippet_EN: When the guard ship saw that we were not only disobeying, but also attempting to speed off, they fired their rail cannon. It scorched Red Chamber's armor, and all I remember is a flash of white light.

nodes.snippet: 有的，再給我點時間，還有看到可能有用的東西...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
红楼的讯号伪造不成，对方船队的反电子战专家发现了干扰来源，随即转而追捕红楼。
尽管成功逃脱，最后却付出惨痛代价...
nodes.snippet_EN:
The modified signal failed. Their electronic warfare defenses discovered where the interference was coming from, and they caught up to Red Chamber.

Even though we managed to escape, we paid a heavy price.

nodes.snippet: 系統重開機中...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼没能直接联络上协会，最后只能透过一些非法通讯商，将加密的讯号辗转传到协会手中。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber wasn't able to send the message directly to the association. We ended up going through some illegal channels to send it as an encrypted message.

nodes.snippet: OPUS-03龍脈探測船，輔助人工電腦重啟動
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「民间船...这样还算得体...」
对方收到款项后离开。

虽然对矿联军的蛮横作风十分不满，
不想惹事的艾妲，做出了我觉得不荣誉，
但不得不的决定。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Hmm... That'll do..."

They left right after they got the money.

Eda did not appreciate United Mining's crude way of doing things, but she didn't want to stir things up. I thought it was a bit dishonorable, but she had no choice.

nodes.snippet: 您好，菈米亞主人
nodes.snippet_CHS:
印象里非常顺利，但当我深入地下100标准尺时，却视线突然一阵模糊。

起身时已经在医护室里面， 艾妲说我好像血压过低昏厥过去， 担心地守在我身旁， 只记得菈米亚小小啐了一声。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Everything was going smoothly until I hit 100 standard meters, when my vision suddenly went blurry.

When I came to my senses, I was already in the medical tent. Eda sat by my side, visibly worried, and said I had passed out because my blood pressure was too low. Remi just kept mumbling about what a terrible job I'd done.

nodes.snippet: 傻孩子起得真晚
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得深入地下150标准尺时，我听见巨大的龙鸣声，我以为我可以，意识却开始模糊。

终于回到地面时，听到了剧烈的欢呼声。 那天的记忆有点遥远， 但我被列在纪录中的第二名... 连菈米亚都难得的笑了出来。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Once I got to 150 standard meters, I heard a booming starsong. I was sure that I was going to make it, but my consciousness started fading out.

When I returned to the surface, I could hear the roar of the crowd. My memory is a bit fuzzy, but I ended up getting second place all-time for the deepest run. Even Remi smiled.

nodes.snippet:
上次來時是這邊嗎？
分析頻譜的訊號異常...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
透过龙脉探测船的通讯阀， 讯号转眼送往全小行星带， 至今我都还记得节目的内容开头：

「藏于群山的黑暗之心，我们必将奋起。」 那是白帮的口号， 原来是星环自由战线的起义船歌...
nodes.snippet_EN:
The communication module on our vessel instantly sent the signal throughout the belt. To this day, I'll never forget how they started the show:

"Hidden in the shadows of the Peaks, we shall rise again." It was the Bones Brigade's motto. I suppose it's no surprise that this was also the space shanty the Ring Liberation Front used as a cry for revolution.

nodes.snippet: 沒事，這種程度可以輕鬆解析
nodes.snippet_CHS: 沒事，這種程度可以輕鬆解析
nodes.snippet_EN: 沒事，這種程度可以輕鬆解析
nodes.snippet_CHT: 沒事，這種程度可以輕鬆解析
nodes.snippet_JP: 沒事，這種程度可以輕鬆解析

nodes.snippet:
好了，李莫，到了鬼方後，
你親衛的傷就有救了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
回想起艾妲作为船长，
总是能冷静地做出不少决定，
是我该学习的地方。
nodes.snippet_EN: Thinking back on it, Eda really was an exceptional captain. No matter what decision had to be made, she always stayed calm. To this day, I'm still learning from her.

nodes.snippet: 沒救我們也不負責就是
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我不太想回忆，
但当初能帮上艾妲的忙，还是蛮好的。
nodes.snippet_EN: I don't like to think about my experience acting. Still, I was happy to help Eda.

nodes.snippet: 夠了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得节目的台词才一读，艾妲就不发一语的离去，弄得全场一片尴尬。

那原来是描述邪恶的女巫，
如何被群山人民赶出的故事。
nodes.snippet_EN:
As soon as Eda saw the script, she walked away without saying a word, leaving the set in awkward silence.

Apparently, it was about an evil witch, and how the people managed to drive her from the Peaks.

nodes.snippet: 羅素醫生是龍脈衝突後的退伍軍人，以前是醫官，現在人在協會幫忙
nodes.snippet_CHS: 羅素醫生是龍脈衝突後的退伍軍人，以前是醫官，現在人在協會幫忙
nodes.snippet_EN: 羅素醫生是龍脈衝突後的退伍軍人，以前是醫官，現在人在協會幫忙
nodes.snippet_CHT: 羅素醫生是龍脈衝突後的退伍軍人，以前是醫官，現在人在協會幫忙
nodes.snippet_JP: 羅素醫生是龍脈衝突後的退伍軍人，以前是醫官，現在人在協會幫忙

nodes.snippet: 舉凡探勘的意外治療，民間礦脈的授權，她都能處理，很可靠的
nodes.snippet_CHS: 舉凡探勘的意外治療，民間礦脈的授權，她都能處理，很可靠的
nodes.snippet_EN: 舉凡探勘的意外治療，民間礦脈的授權，她都能處理，很可靠的
nodes.snippet_CHT: 舉凡探勘的意外治療，民間礦脈的授權，她都能處理，很可靠的
nodes.snippet_JP: 舉凡探勘的意外治療，民間礦脈的授權，她都能處理，很可靠的

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「别死了，小鬼们。」

对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Just don't go dying on me, kids," the man grunted. 

When we first set out, given how young the crew was, most people didn't think much of us.

nodes.snippet: 謝謝你們幫忙
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「随便你」

对方轻哼了一声，我们早期冒险时，由于队伍太年轻，很多人没把我们当回事。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Yeah, yeah. Whatever," the man grunted. 

When we first set out, given how young the crew was, most people didn't think much of us.

nodes.snippet: 不會，師傅說過，女巫如果能拯救自己，自然也能拯救別人
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不會，師傅說過，女巫如果能拯救自己，自然也能拯救別人
nodes.snippet_EN: 不會，師傅說過，女巫如果能拯救自己，自然也能拯救別人
nodes.snippet_CHT: 不會，師傅說過，女巫如果能拯救自己，自然也能拯救別人
nodes.snippet_JP: 不會，師傅說過，女巫如果能拯救自己，自然也能拯救別人

nodes.snippet_CHS:
虽然金额不多，但输了还是让我有点愧疚，
果然不能碰赌博这种事。

艾妲跟我说，至少你买到当下的快乐，我不懂。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Even though we didn't lose a lot, I still felt guilty. Gambling was not for me.

Eda said, "Well, at least you had some fun." I didn't know what to make of that.

nodes.snippet: 抱歉，我只能做一些緊急處理，我沒想到這麼嚴重
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我拒绝后，菈米亚悻悻然离去，
像是打坏了她的乐趣，我趁机试着跟她说：

「赌博是没荣誉的事，不需在意。」

结果她好阵子没跟我说话。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Remi walked out after I refused, clearly upset, like I had ruined her fun. I tried to tell her that gambling is dishonorable, and that it's not worth it.

After that, she didn't talk with me for quite some time.

nodes.snippet: 所以大魁...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 所以大魁...
nodes.snippet_EN: 所以大魁...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 所以大魁...
nodes.snippet_JP: 所以大魁...

nodes.snippet: 走路什麼還可以，但主要是超加速的組織內傷，那不好說
nodes.snippet_CHS:
尽管观赏过程菈米亚觉得小不耐，
但印象中艾妲却看得出神，不时拭泪。

我不记得我有没有握住她的手，我希望那时我有。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Throughout the performance, I could tell Remi was a bit annoyed. But Eda was spellbound, and would occasionally wipe tears from her eyes.

I forget if I held her hand... I hope I did.

nodes.snippet:
尤其上週黑幫的礦脈衝突，
地方械鬥死傷多有
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙脉长歌是一出感人的神话，最终部没能跟艾妲一起观赏，至今我依然很遗憾。
nodes.snippet_EN: Melody of Starsong was such a moving story. I really regret not being able to see the end with Eda.

nodes.snippet: 能用的藥材，還是機械義體都缺，沒個標準週是送不到這偏遠地方的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得那天那夜，艾妲的嗓声透过基地台广播到群山行星带内，多年后还有许多人怀念。
当时有人希望她为电台工作，她只回说

「我是为了自己的灵魂而唱，不是远方的太阳。」
nodes.snippet_EN:
That night, Eda's voice was broadcast across the Peaks. Even after many years, there were throngs of listeners who still remembered the performance.

Some people even asked if she would like to work for the station. She just said, "I sing for my own soul, not some distant star."

nodes.snippet: 你們可以冒險橫跨小行星帶，前往鐵嵐城的大醫院
nodes.snippet_CHS: 离开的时候，我记得艾妲的神色多有忧伤，喉咙无法随意的唱，她始终有点自卑。
nodes.snippet_EN: When we left, I could see on Eda's face how upset she was. Her inability to sing whenever she wanted to had always made her feel inferior.

nodes.snippet: 或是在這等，沒什麼選擇
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我没有龙脉的消息，但我能跟你分享我们的太阳，烛龙的故事...

「愿烛龙光照，今日众善奉行...」 记得传道师翻开手中的书本，喃喃说出古老神话。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I don't have any lumen intel, but I can share with you the story of our great sun, Ignis...

"May Ignis shed light upon your good deeds..." The preacher turned the pages of some scripture as he mumbled the ancient myth.

nodes.snippet: 反正頂多最後換成機械義體，鬼方多得是不能走的傷殘軍人...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
传道师看了我几眼，仿佛认出了什么，突然说

「...背弃群山的瀛海人，愿黑洞大荒与你同在」

我还记得传道师离去时所说的话语。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The preacher took a few looks at me, as if he had noticed something. Then, all of a sudden, he said:

"...East Oceaner, betrayers of the Peaks. I hope Excidium is with you always."

I'll never forget the chilling words he left me with.

nodes.snippet:
失禮！
瀛海武人不能走跟死了沒兩樣
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「头痛，别找麻烦。」

菈米亚正要动手前，医生抓住了她，
她不满的啐了一声。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Hey kid, quit causing trouble."

Right before Remi made her move, the doctor grabbed her. She murmured something and sulked away.

nodes.snippet: 喂，艾妲，這男人到底是誰？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲说完这话后消失了一阵子，回船时只轻轻的说

「她不是刽子手，她是我师父。」

这几年来，我发现艾妲表面冷静，
但只要惹到她时，她比谁都冲动。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After speaking, Eda disappeared for a period of time. When she got back to the ship, she whispered:

"She's not a killer... she's my master."

Eda may have looked calm on the outside, but I quickly found out that if something upset her, she would get really aggressive.

nodes.snippet: 我是——
nodes.snippet_CHS:
为首的女巫是黑龙探索队的训练教官，
矿业联合似乎为了黑龙积极的训练船队。
目睹这些事情，让艾妲对巫塔是彻底死心。
nodes.snippet_EN: The lead witch was the training officer for the Banshee mission. It seems that United Mining spent significant energy training a crew for Banshee. Hearing this made Eda lose all her remaining faith in the Witching Tower.

nodes.snippet: 我問的是艾妲，男人
nodes.snippet_CHS: 事后我听艾妲分享这段经验，她似乎是太紧张了，录下的音讯只有一片杂音。
nodes.snippet_EN: Afterward, Eda tried to tell what me what had happened. Apparently, she was too nervous and was unable to record anything but a bunch of static.

nodes.snippet: 這位跟病人，兩位都是我的恩人
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲匆忙地离开，
她说她当时很怕牵连红楼，
但我希望她能为自己多想一点。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We left in a hurry. Eda said she was afraid of getting Red Chamber involved.

Sometimes I wished she thought more about herself.

nodes.snippet: 跟妳師傅一樣，總是惹麻煩...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得整理到指定法时我多少提出疑问，结果一开口就被菈米亚骂回去。

最后吵架的时间似乎占据了工作时间，艾妲在受不了的情况，只好终止这次协作。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I had a few questions when we were organizing the information about the Lumen Mining Act, and each time Remi would shout in my face.

Most of our time was spent arguing. Eda got fed up with us and politely told them we were unable to help.

nodes.snippet: 喂，你先出去，我有事要跟艾妲講
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「我是怕菈米亚太忙，才只找你帮忙喔」

我还记得艾妲的表情，当时我在龙脉日报待了一天，结束后，龙脉日报赶上了修正法特刊发行的日期，还一并给了我...
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Oh, looks like Remi's too busy to help. We should be able to handle it, right?"

I still remember the look on Eda's face when she said that. I was at the Daily Lumen all day, and they were able to make the deadline for their Mining Act Amendment Edition. They even sent me a little gift.

nodes.snippet: 我要看著大魁
nodes.snippet_CHS:
那是个黑暗发着蓝光的大会议室，矿业联合的学者分析着小行星的构造，并将挖掘方式分门别类

「没有黑龙的任何情报...」艾妲离开后略有失落。 「倒是知道遇到龙脉，要怎么干净的把它榨干」
nodes.snippet_EN:
The conference room was dark, with a bluish light. United Mining's scholars were analyzing the structure of asteroids and various methods of extraction.

"Nothing on Banshee..." Eda was a bit frustrated when we left. "But at least we now know how to suck lumen dry when we come across some."

nodes.snippet: 想救他，現在就出去
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲突然冒出的话语让对方瞬间变了脸色。

「那个任务是一级机密，新来的吗，别乱说话。」

研讨会的门马上关闭，我们的线索也中断了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The scholar's face stopped cold when he heard the word "Banshee".

"That mission's top secret. You're new, aren't you? Well, think before you speak."

The doors of the conference hall closed abruptly, along with any hope of learning more about Banshee.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「下次再一起逛吧。」 记得艾妲解释龙脉运作到一半，突然响起的广播就将她唤走，当时我有点小落寞，不懂是什么心情。

之后透过女巫的仪式，艾妲成功将万道的神明移灵，对方也对女巫报以深深的感谢。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Let's come back some other time." Eda was explaining how the cave operated when the loudspeaker sounded out and she was called away. I felt a little bit lonely, but back then I didn't understand why.

Through their rituals, Eda and the witches were able to move the spirits in peace. The people there were extremely grateful to the witches for their help.

nodes.snippet: 沒事的，李莫，醫生是我的朋友
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那天艾妲在菈米亚不知情时，主动带我去看万道的神坛，但当我俩回到船上时，被留下的菈米亚发了很大的脾气。让我也有点内疚。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda brought me to see a Myrian shrine without letting Remi know. When we got back to the ship, Remi exploded on Eda for leaving her alone. I felt pretty guilty about that.

nodes.snippet: 小女孩，這傢伙是妳情人嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我始终掌握不到仿声器的使用要领。在测试的过程中，还导致实验室的汜水储存槽震荡爆炸。
nodes.snippet_EN: From the very start, I had no idea what I was doing. I even managed to cause the vats filled with lumenide to explode, and seriously damaged the laboratory.

nodes.snippet: 不是啦！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管当时首要目标是寻找黑龙，不该有外务，但没被艾妲信任，我还是有点伤心
nodes.snippet_EN: Even though it was true that our mission was to get to Banshee and that we shouldn't have been taking side missions, I was still a bit hurt that Eda didn't believe in me.

nodes.snippet: 看得出來。我說過了好幾次了，妳該放棄探索龍脈了
nodes.snippet_CHS: 看得出來。我說過了好幾次了，妳該放棄探索龍脈了
nodes.snippet_EN: 看得出來。我說過了好幾次了，妳該放棄探索龍脈了
nodes.snippet_CHT: 看得出來。我說過了好幾次了，妳該放棄探索龍脈了
nodes.snippet_JP: 看得出來。我說過了好幾次了，妳該放棄探索龍脈了

nodes.snippet: 我今天不想談這個，醫生
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲请菈米亚发送了多次爆破讯号，
让对方错估了引爆的火力，
瞬间矿场陷入汜气的火海，虽然无人伤亡，
却让我看到艾妲的另一面。

她那阵子心情真的很糟。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda told Remi to broadcast several blast signals that would cause them to misjudge the firepower of the blast.

The mine exploded and lumium blasts were going off left and right. Even though no one got hurt, I was surprised to see that side of Eda. She wasn't in a good place at the time.

nodes.snippet: 妳遲早會把自己跟船員害死，這次事情搞這麼大，我怎麼跟妳師傅交代？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「哪位高官我不认识，
没有要支援就快走，下次记得要穿制服。 」

对方说完，就离开了我们视线
nodes.snippet_EN:
"I don't know who you're talking about, I'm just a damn guard. If you're not here to help, get the hell out of here. And put on your uniforms next time!"

After yelling in our faces, he turned around and left.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
一阵激烈的撞击——菈米亚赶在警备船开火前驶过航道，成功延误了对方的追击，我们也因此付出惨痛代价，受到严重损伤。

事后艾琳达依照约定，将答应的龙脉情报赠与我们。
nodes.snippet_EN:
CRASH!!!—— Remi rushed into the path of the guard ship before they opened fire, and was able to delay the attack. Our decision was not without cost, as our ship suffered heavy damage.

Afterward, Arrigo was true to her word and gave us the lumen intel she promised.

nodes.snippet: 醫生，讓我加入龍脈協會
nodes.snippet_CHS:
矿业联合拒绝回答我们的三方通信，
没多久，传送港前一阵火光，
所有人都知道有船被击落，
船队的众人为此沉默了一阵，
或许我能做一点什么，但都太迟了。
nodes.snippet_EN: United Mining rejected our request for communication. Before long, a blaze of fire flashed before the transport station. Everyone knew a ship had been shot down, and we sat in silence. Maybe there was something I could have done, but it was already too late.

nodes.snippet: 放棄探索龍脈
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「你搞错了，办事员。」 「尽管是龙脉花卉，但这些枝干如果拆开，认列只是一般的药草。」

艾妲成功的解释，让海关最后放行了对方。她说当年跟师父进出贸易时，把能钻的漏洞都看了一遍。

领头的女子感谢艾妲，却好像认出什么： 「我们都在找她，你师父一定还活着...」 她从口袋中拿出...
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Sir, this is a simple misunderstanding." "Although these are lumen plants, once the stems are separated from the plant, they are classified as ordinary medicine."

After successfully persuading customs to let them go, Eda explained that she learned all the loopholes from her time travelling the trade routes with her master.

The woman in charge thanked Eda, and seemed to recognize her. "We're all looking for her. Your master must still be alive," she said, and took something out of her pocket.

nodes.snippet: 那還我紅樓的軍用設定數據
nodes.snippet_CHS: 如果有能力帮忙的话，我希望当年的我们能多做一些什么。
nodes.snippet_EN: Now looking back on it, I wish I could have done more in situations like these.

nodes.snippet: 拜託你根本不該駕駛那種軍用船
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时只要遇到矿业联合，艾妲通常是不予理会。
nodes.snippet_EN: If it was United Mining, Eda didn't want to have anything to do with them.

nodes.snippet: 那至少幫幫我們！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「大概距离这边六标准尺，天井附近有三处破裂，你们快去就是。」

艾妲很快地指出问题，对方还以为遇到哪位女巫高管，但我没从艾妲的表情感受到喜悦。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Pipeline 3 is broken about six meters from here, near the atrium. Hurry up and fix it."

Eda quickly pointed out the problem. The woman thought she had run into one of her superiors, but Eda was not at all pleased.

nodes.snippet: 死脾氣跟妳師傅一樣，妳看到了這傷口有多嚴重
nodes.snippet_CHS:
尽管那时船只的气氛不好，
但菈米亚做起事来却没有马虎，
新闻台播送时被中断了将近十几秒，
导致收视率跟公信力都下降不少。

会长为了感谢我们，给了我们点酬劳。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Even though the atmosphere on the ship was tense, Remi wasn't the least bit careless with her work. When the news channel broadcast the signal, it cut out for several seconds, causing a drop in views and public support.

The president even compensated us for our troubles.

nodes.snippet: 何況你們還經歷超加速，重力把組織都給壓壞了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲婉拒了会长的请求，
迅速地离开现场。
听说后来节目播出，
由于龙脉指定法经过协会的背书，
让推动变得顺利许多...
为许多探勘人诟病。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda politely refused the president's request and left in a hurry. I heard that after the interview was broadcast, the Lumen Mining Act was endorsed by the association, making it easier to push through. Most runners, however, denounced it.

nodes.snippet: 不幫就算了，我自己想辦法
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「我喜欢巫塔的大家，虽然大家不喜欢我。」
「但没关系，我有师父就好。」

那天，艾妲一人从巫塔返回后如此说，
接着默默的将她找到的东西，收回自己的房间。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"I liked everyone at the Witching Tower, even though they may not have liked me."
"But it's okay... I have my master."

That's what Eda said when she returned. She collected the things she had found, and silently retreated to her room.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「不会再来了。」

那天艾妲回到红楼不发一语，
仿佛陷入遥远的回忆。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"I'm never coming back again."

Eda didn't say a word after she returned to the ship, as if she was lost in some distant memory.

nodes.snippet: 喂
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「没有师父的线索呢...」

艾妲回到红楼后这么说，带回一本名册的她，与其说在寻找师父的线索，不如说她在努力跟过去的自己告别。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Couldn't find any clues about my master..." Eda said as she returned to the ship. 

She had a registry with her that she said would help find her master, but it seemed more like she was trying to say goodbye to her former self.

nodes.snippet: 再會
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「这里再找下去，也不会有师父的线索...」

艾妲回到红楼后这么说，我总有种感觉，她在努力跟过去的自己告别。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"It's not worth it, there won't be any clues about my master here..." Eda said as she returned to the ship.

Somehow it felt like she was trying to say goodbye to her former self.

nodes.snippet: 好啦！不是沒有辦法
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得他伸出机械义体的手跟艾妲表示感谢，
艾妲提过那触感冰冷，但却有一股暖意。

「这书给你。」他留下了一本书给红楼，
只说那是兄弟们的回忆
nodes.snippet_EN:
I remember him reaching out with his bionic arm to express his thanks to Eda. She said that even though it was cold to the touch, she could still feel the warmth.

"Here, take this." He offered us a book, saying only that it contained the memories of his brothers.

nodes.snippet: 什麼？什麼辦法
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲那时默默的离开，
我只希望任何曾经奋斗过的勇士，
最终能得到应有的荣耀，如同大魁。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda left in silence.
I just hope that any warrior who fights for what they believe in gets the honor they deserve... like Kay.

nodes.snippet:
你們都一樣...
決定了都沒在管別人怎麼說的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记忆中，是空的棺材。

信仰万道的居民，认为人死后该回归烛龙，
艾妲说这类棺材常会出现在废墟中，
多半是宇宙葬禁止后，被检举抛弃的棺材。
nodes.snippet_EN:
It turned out to be an empty casket.

The followers of Myria believed that those that passed should return to Ignis. Eda said that these types of caskets could often be found in ruins. Most of them were abandoned caskets that had been reported to the authorities after space burials were banned.

nodes.snippet: 等我的信，我會發資料給妳
nodes.snippet_CHS:
改变轨道后，不明物体持续它的路线。
菈米亚追查后，发现那是往烛龙投入的物体。

「应该是宇宙葬的棺材。」

我还记得艾妲说时的表情。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After getting out of its way, the object continued on. Remi kept looking into it and found out it was headed for Ignis.

"It's probably a casket for a space burial."

I still remember the look on Eda's face when she said that.

nodes.snippet: 至少把混合汜氣加滿吧
nodes.option: 購買東西
nodes.snippet_CHS: 至少把混合汜氣加滿吧
nodes.snippet_EN: 至少把混合汜氣加滿吧
nodes.snippet_CHT: 至少把混合汜氣加滿吧
nodes.snippet_JP: 至少把混合汜氣加滿吧
nodes.option_EN: 購買東西

nodes.snippet: 自己注意安全，龍脈探測船的油量儲量高，但裝甲不厚
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们默默地离去，那时我还没有发现，
艾妲真正在寻找的东西是什么。
nodes.snippet_EN: We left in silence. At that time, I still didn't know what Eda was really looking for.

nodes.snippet: 小行星帶多半是被礦業聯合趕走的人，看到女巫專用的龍脈探測船，就算沒有懸賞，也不會對你們太友善
nodes.snippet_CHS:
当时我实在很傻，只想找到无人发现的龙脉，
却没能理解艾妲真正在意的目标是什么，
nodes.snippet_EN: I was so foolish back then. All I wanted was to find an undiscovered cave. I was oblivious to Eda's true motives.

nodes.snippet: 醫生還是老樣子...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 醫生還是老樣子...
nodes.snippet_EN: 醫生還是老樣子...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 醫生還是老樣子...
nodes.snippet_JP: 醫生還是老樣子...

nodes.snippet: 什麼「有辦法找到龍脈的話」，連方位都給了，還有困難嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
他们当时把我缴纳小量探索设备堆到仓库间，
几声吆喝后，探勘队出发，
电子合同送到了我手中，
互相承诺了彼此的抽成金额...

尽管像是他们的日常，但直到今天，
我依然很难体会。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I put a small amount of excavation equipment in their warehouse. The digital contract was sent to me and we all agreed on how much we'd earn...

That was life in the Peaks. And to this day... I still haven't learned.

nodes.snippet: 菈米亞，準備
nodes.snippet_CHS:
瀛海探勘人追逐龙脉而生，唯有亲手接触岩壁，
感受龙脉的律动，才是荣誉的瀛海人。
nodes.snippet_EN: East Ocean runners were born chasing lumen. We must feel the pulse of lumen ourselves to maintain our dignity and honor.

nodes.snippet: 喉嚨沒問題吧
nodes.snippet_CHS:
当时我没有理会对方的嘲讽，默默离去
大魁说过「龙脉自存于心，没有输赢。」
nodes.snippet_EN:
I paid no attention to the mockery and quietly walked away.

Kay used to say, "Lumen exists within you. There is no winning and losing."

nodes.snippet: 擔心什麼，我有紅樓跟你的幫忙
nodes.snippet_CHS:
大荒是个深邃的巨大龙脉，
里面充斥着不同的探勘小队，
他们深入洞穴，
在小行星内的万道遗迹穿梭...

当时我差点没跟上，记得最后找到的是...
nodes.snippet_EN:
Ignis No.1 was a dark, massive cave. There were numerous excavation squads deep inside, shuttling among ancient Myrian ruins.

I was barely able to keep up, but I eventually found something.

nodes.snippet: ...你們真的能直接搜尋龍脈？
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...你們真的能直接搜尋龍脈？
nodes.snippet_EN: ...你們真的能直接搜尋龍脈？
nodes.snippet_CHT: ...你們真的能直接搜尋龍脈？
nodes.snippet_JP: ...你們真的能直接搜尋龍脈？

nodes.snippet: 只憑一個抽象的地理方位描述...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
说完后，我只记得一片蓝色的汜气光，我晕了过去，待我醒来后，却再也不见对方踪影。

「将小行星带的意志传承下去，永远别让矿联进出我们的故乡。」 一股声音传进我的脑海，我发现我手上竟然是...
nodes.snippet_EN:
As soon as I finished speaking, a blue lumen light flashed before my eyes and I passed out. When I came to, the man was nowhere to be found.

"Carry on the will of the belt, and never let United Mining encroach on our homeland." I heard a voice whisper these words, and in my hands was something he had left me.

nodes.snippet: 一般人是不行，但女巫的話有機會
nodes.snippet_CHS: 一般人是不行，但女巫的話有機會
nodes.snippet_EN: 一般人是不行，但女巫的話有機會
nodes.snippet_CHT: 一般人是不行，但女巫的話有機會
nodes.snippet_JP: 一般人是不行，但女巫的話有機會

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「年轻人，说错话是很不敬的事...」

话语方落，我意识突然消失，头痛欲裂。
等我醒来，那人却已经不见踪影。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"You better watch your mouth, boy..."

As soon as he spoke, I blacked out. Later I woke up with a splitting headache, and the man was nowhere to be found.

nodes.snippet: 怎麼，不喜歡我歌聲嗎，來不及了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
他们把我当作自己人，
一边引导如何切开瓦砾，
找出过往冻僵的伙伴，
跟我聊着当年与矿业联合作战的种种，
并渴望群山常保和平，永无战争。

结束后作为感谢，他给了我们...
nodes.snippet_EN:
They treated me like one of their own. As they taught me how to cut open chunks of rubble, and as we uncovered their frozen comrades, they spoke of what happened to them during the war. They said that all they wished for was peace in the Peaks and for war to never break out again.

They paid me graciously for the help I provided.

nodes.snippet: 跟大魁說的一樣，妳真的是女巫？龍脈衝突時的......活體雷達？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 跟大魁說的一樣，妳真的是女巫？龍脈衝突時的......活體雷達？
nodes.snippet_EN: 跟大魁說的一樣，妳真的是女巫？龍脈衝突時的......活體雷達？
nodes.snippet_CHT: 跟大魁說的一樣，妳真的是女巫？龍脈衝突時的......活體雷達？
nodes.snippet_JP: 跟大魁說的一樣，妳真的是女巫？龍脈衝突時的......活體雷達？

nodes.snippet_CHS: 于群山冒险时，有时会看见这种让人伤心的情境，我只能无声默默离开。
nodes.snippet_EN: It wasn't uncommon to see tragic sights like this adventuring around the Peaks. I had no choice but to leave the elderly crew in peace.

nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管菈米亚一边碎碎念为什么不听她的，我依然成功操作探索设备，拆除了数个诡雷。就在思考为什么这里是军事据点时，我找到诡雷后的仓库门...里面是...
nodes.snippet_EN: Remi was upset that Eda didn't listen to her, but I was able to dismantle several traps with the exploration kit. While I was wondering why there would be a military stronghold there, I found the door to a storage room.

nodes.snippet: 以上，今日起從五樓除名，褫奪女巫適任者資格
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲才决定后没多久，诡雷判定热源不符规定，瞬间爆炸，碎片数次冲撞了红楼，差点穿透甲板。
nodes.snippet_EN: Not long after Eda made her decision, a trap determined that our heat signal was an attack target and exploded. Several pieces of shrapnel slammed into Red Chamber and nearly penetrated the armor.

nodes.snippet: 別灰心，108號，就算回到四樓，未來你還是可以參加巫塔事務
nodes.snippet_CHS: 別灰心，108號，就算回到四樓，未來你還是可以參加巫塔事務
nodes.snippet_EN: 別灰心，108號，就算回到四樓，未來你還是可以參加巫塔事務
nodes.snippet_CHT: 別灰心，108號，就算回到四樓，未來你還是可以參加巫塔事務
nodes.snippet_JP: 別灰心，108號，就算回到四樓，未來你還是可以參加巫塔事務

nodes.snippet: 才兩年就變成這樣，真沒想到...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲使用共振仪努力寻找可能的声音，
然而却没有听到一丝回响，
围绕我身旁的光点，不久后也消失了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda tried using the reso-scanner to pick up on something, but she didn't hear a single sound.

The lights that surrounded me soon disappeared.

nodes.snippet: 還以為她是天才呢...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
循着光点，穿越过被洗劫一空的坑道，
我来到了矿场的深处。
在凌乱的坑道地面上，
我找到了一块熟悉的石版...
nodes.snippet_EN:
Following the lights, I passed through a tunnel that looked like it had been ransacked.

When I got to the deepest parts of the cave, I found a familiar stone disc on the ground, amid the rubble and debris.

nodes.snippet:
大人說他那救不了，成年後聲音反而會漸漸壞掉

所以重要的歌法，會變得發不出聲音...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那时的艾妲很担心船员是否又有意外，大概是医生的话造成的。
nodes.snippet_EN: At the time, Eda was really worried about our safety. I think the doctor's words really affected her.

nodes.snippet: 她過來了，說話小聲點...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 她過來了，說話小聲點...
nodes.snippet_EN: 她過來了，說話小聲點...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 她過來了，說話小聲點...
nodes.snippet_JP: 她過來了，說話小聲點...

nodes.snippet: 幹嘛、她以前驕傲的，一副什麼都會的樣子，我偏要——
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「你就为龙脉跟姐姐捐出命吧，是你的幸运。」

当时菈米亚通信虽这么说，指示却明确清晰。
最后找到了异常辐射来源，在她协助下，
我关闭了来源的机房动力，
还找到了不少战前留下的商贸纪录。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"It should be an honor for you to sacrifice your life for lumen and Eddie." Despite Remi's message, she did a good job guiding me.

With her help, we found the source of the radiation and shut off the power supply. We also stumbled across several trade records from before the war.

nodes.snippet: 嘿！騙子，不是說自己很行嗎！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 嘿！騙子，不是說自己很行嗎！
nodes.snippet_EN: 嘿！騙子，不是說自己很行嗎！
nodes.snippet_CHT: 嘿！騙子，不是說自己很行嗎！
nodes.snippet_JP: 嘿！騙子，不是說自己很行嗎！

nodes.snippet: 現在變回四樓，還想爬上來嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
为了安全起见，我撤离了此地。
太乙垂怜，过程中没有遇到危险...
nodes.snippet_EN: Safety first. I left without completing the exploration, and by Taiyang's mercy, I didn't run into any trouble...

nodes.snippet: 喂！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 为了查清真相，我忍着心中不安，顺着痕迹小心前进。坑道终点是当年的战情室，贵重资产已被洗劫一空，抽屉里，我找到一份被随意弃置的文件...
nodes.snippet_EN:
For the sake of uncovering the truth, I stomached my uneasiness and continued onward, following the marks on the wall. 

At the end of the tunnel was a war room that had been completely plundered. I opened a drawer and found a discarded document...

nodes.snippet: 儀式中安靜！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲结束探索，默默的回到船上，
眼神略有哀伤。
再怎么说，巫塔都是她生活十几年的地方。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda finished up and silently returned to the ship.
There was a bit of sadness in her eyes.
After all, this was her home for several years.

nodes.snippet: 不會唱歌的女巫，哈哈哈！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不會唱歌的女巫，哈哈哈！
nodes.snippet_EN: 不會唱歌的女巫，哈哈哈！
nodes.snippet_CHT: 不會唱歌的女巫，哈哈哈！
nodes.snippet_JP: 不會唱歌的女巫，哈哈哈！

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「好像有人在找我呢...」回来船后，艾妲苦笑的说

「我实在搞不懂汜在想什么，大概要安慰我吧。」

她从燃烧殆尽的纸堆中，找到了...
nodes.snippet_EN:
"I guess someone came looking for me..." Eda said wryly as she got onboard.

"I have no idea what the lumen was doing... I think it was trying to console me."

She brought back something she found in a pile of ashes...

nodes.snippet: 住嘴，巫塔內不准說三道四！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「她如果平安长大，也是你这个年纪」

通讯端的她，看着菈米亚缓缓说，原来她受吉普赛公主临终时委托，希望寻找公主与议长的私生女，却无能达成。
事后她登船交付我们最后的请求，接着转身跃入黑暗的宇宙空间。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"If she was able to grow up, she'd be about as old as you," she said softly as she looked at Remi over the comms system. Apparently, before the princess passed, she was asked to find the child the princess had with the chairman but was unable to complete the task.

She boarded our ship and left us with her final request. Then she turned, and leaped into the darkness of space.

nodes.snippet: 天才卻當不成女巫！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当年冒险时，总会遇到碍于现状，无法帮助的人群，直到今天，有时我还会后悔。
nodes.snippet_EN: During our years adventuring, we encountered countless people we were unable to help because we had our problems to deal with. To this day, I still regret not being able to do more.

nodes.snippet:
...嗯，但比起活體雷達，
你稱呼我女巫會比較好
nodes.snippet_CHS:
...嗯，但比起活體雷達，
你稱呼我女巫會比較好
nodes.snippet_EN:
...嗯，但比起活體雷達，
你稱呼我女巫會比較好
nodes.snippet_CHT:
...嗯，但比起活體雷達，
你稱呼我女巫會比較好
nodes.snippet_JP:
...嗯，但比起活體雷達，
你稱呼我女巫會比較好

nodes.snippet: 得找出龍脈的位置...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
最后，我待的时间久得艾妲以为我出了意外，
在被销毁的文件海中，我找到了曾经的荣耀。
nodes.snippet_EN: I stayed inside for so long that Eda thought something had happened to me. In the swirling sea of ruined documents, I discovered the glory of my clan's past.

nodes.snippet: 只要在那裡找到門蘭芝，醫生就能替李莫的親衛治療傷口了...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
时至今日，我依然会想起领主室内于真空中飘散，结冻的文件
还有墙壁脱落的瀛海字画
「太乙垂怜」
nodes.snippet_EN:
To this day, I still think back on those frozen documents floating through the vacuum of my family's residence, and the East Ocean calligraphy that had come off the wall:

"By Taiy's mercy."

nodes.snippet: 應該在這附近了...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
感谢我们的配合，对方将一本手册交给我们，「记得把我们的故事传下去。」
等我离开时，矿场传出一阵崩塌声，
我才知道他打算死在这里。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After thanking us for cooperating, he handed us a book. "Our story must be told," he said.

When we left, the sound of the cave collapsing could be heard. That's when I knew that he planned on dying there.

nodes.snippet: 插入兵籍卡與密碼：權限確認
nodes.snippet_CHS:
才刚开口拒绝，下一秒我就失去了意识。
直到我回神后，身边的探勘装备已经被拿走了。
我再也没有见到他。
nodes.snippet_EN:
As soon as the words came out of my mouth, I blacked out.

When I came to, all my scavenging equipment was gone and the man was nowhere to be seen.

nodes.snippet: QBC-OPUS-03龍脈探測船，生物增幅偵查器啟動
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我找到传送港附近一个显眼的太空残骸，将自己固定在上面，等待救援。
不知过了多久，我已经开始意识恍惚时，红楼总算抵达，让我保住一命。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I found a conspicuous piece of wreckage near the transport station and waited to be rescued.

I don't know how much time had passed before my consciousness started to fade. Red Chamber eventually arrived, but I barely made it out alive.

nodes.snippet: 同步對象：艾妲
nodes.snippet_CHS: 同步對象：艾妲
nodes.snippet_EN: 同步對象：艾妲
nodes.snippet_CHT: 同步對象：艾妲
nodes.snippet_JP: 同步對象：艾妲

nodes.snippet: 聲音調校，啟動龍脈共振儀
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我当时几乎丧失了意识，只记得在残骸堆中看到一个光点，我努力抓着它...

那东西带着我，我从它引领的方向听见艾妲的歌声，终于我回到了红楼，手上多了一个圆盘，那似乎是万道的祈祷用具...
nodes.snippet_EN:
I was about to pass out when I saw a glimmer of light amid the wreckage. I grasped for it...

The light led the way, and I started to hear Eda's voice. When I finally got back to the Red Chamber, I had a disc in my hand that looked like a Myrian relic used for prayer...

nodes.snippet: 輕輕的唱...試著尋找能與我歌聲共鳴的龍鳴...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 輕輕的唱...試著尋找能與我歌聲共鳴的龍鳴...
nodes.snippet_EN: 輕輕的唱...試著尋找能與我歌聲共鳴的龍鳴...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 輕輕的唱...試著尋找能與我歌聲共鳴的龍鳴...
nodes.snippet_JP: 輕輕的唱...試著尋找能與我歌聲共鳴的龍鳴...

nodes.snippet:
使用 #ACTION:Directions#
讓艾妲的歌聲與小行星的龍鳴交融
再使用 #ACTION:Confirm# 進行共鳴
nodes.snippet_CHS: 大门开启后残存的电力突然启动，无人管理的农业卫星，不知不觉让植物蔓延了整个温室，其中不乏珍贵的龙穴植物研究。
nodes.snippet_EN: Once the door opened, whatever electricity was left suddenly turned on. The greenhouse on the unmanned agriculture satellite was teeming with life. Among the several varieties of plants, there were even a few valuable research specimens.

nodes.snippet: 沒錯了，就是這裡！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 突破了机关，非常幸运地没有引爆任何东西。不过实验室似乎在冲突时期就被搬空了，没有找到什么先进仪器。
nodes.snippet_EN: I disarmed a few traps and luckily didn't set off anything. Still, the lab must have been cleaned out during the war, because there wasn't any advanced equipment to be found.

nodes.snippet: 太好了...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 当时我离开了现场，有些事情不值得冒险。
nodes.snippet_EN: I left without anything of value, but some things were not worth risking.

nodes.snippet: 你們...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
拆开大门后是一个墓园。
冰蓝的汜晶石环绕墓碑放置，
漂泊的汜光点宛如灵魂。

每个墓碑上都写着同一个年份：「8506年」，
这些墓碑属于第一次龙脉冲突时，
引发暴动的矿场死者。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After I took apart the door, I found a cemetery. Ice-blue lumenite surrounded the graves, and the light of lumen lingered around like spirits.

Each tombstone had the same year written on it: 8506. They were for the protestors whose death had triggered the Lumen War.

nodes.snippet: 貴族，現在不是該開心嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲始终把别人的安危当成第一位，我后来才知道，那是因为她对自己的价值无法肯定。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda always took the safety of others first. I later realized that was because she was unable to see the value in herself...

nodes.snippet: 啊...謝謝
nodes.snippet_CHS: 啊...謝謝
nodes.snippet_EN: 啊...謝謝
nodes.snippet_CHT: 啊...謝謝
nodes.snippet_JP: 啊...謝謝

nodes.snippet:
接下來就是你的事了，
下龍脈我可不擅長
nodes.snippet_CHS: 经过数小时的挖掘后，我发现了当年来不及起飞的船舰残骸。船舰被遗忘在此地，直到今日才重见天日。
nodes.snippet_EN: After a few hours of digging, I found the remnants of some ship that couldn't get out in time. This was the first time in years that it saw the light of day.

nodes.snippet: 這個東西帶著
nodes.snippet_CHS: 這個東西帶著
nodes.snippet_EN: 這個東西帶著
nodes.snippet_CHT: 這個東西帶著
nodes.snippet_JP: 這個東西帶著

nodes.snippet: 這是...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我离开了舰队基地遗址，这里留给他们的后人挖掘就行了。
nodes.snippet_EN: I left the ruins of the base for their later generations to uncover.

nodes.snippet: 我的聲音
nodes.snippet_CHS:
原以为是古老的破损信标，却没想到，
信标的防火墙反过来入侵了红楼系统，
并且无限制的提高引擎功率，
导致不小的爆炸...
nodes.snippet_EN: We thought it was an old, damaged beacon. We never expected the firewall to counter-attack and hack into our system. It raised the engine's power output higher and higher, until it caused a large explosion...

nodes.snippet: 我是瀛海的探勘人，我自己可以透過演奏法...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
通讯很快的恢复了，毕竟是冲突前的旧信标，
过时的防火墙被轻易地破解，在关闭信标前，菈米亚顺手下载了冲突前的档案，结果她大叫了出来，那竟然是...
nodes.snippet_EN: The signal soon came back online. Since it was an old, pre-war beacon, the outdated firewall was easy to break through. Remi downloaded the old files, and when she opened them she was surprised at what she saw.

nodes.snippet:
聽說你被抓時，
是用姊姊的聲音才開門？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
通讯无回应，我花了不少时间在残骸间穿梭，
终于找到总开关，关闭后通讯恢复。

讯号一方却是艾妲跟菈米亚争执的声音，艾妲似乎差点自己下船来找人。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Having not received a response, I shuttled through the wreckage for quite some time, before I finally found the breaker. When I turned it off the signal went back to normal.

I could hear the sound of Eda and Remi arguing, and it sounded like Eda was about to get off the ship and come looking for me.

nodes.snippet: 那是特殊狀況...！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没能通知到艾妲，哨站隐蔽的火炮便启动了，尽管菈米亚千钧一发之际脱离火网，但仍被数发命中。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I couldn't get ahold of Eda and the sentry station fired off its covert weapons system.

Remi managed to evade most of the attacks, but Red Chamber still got struck several times.

nodes.snippet: 不好意思，就當作為了你伙伴吧
nodes.snippet_CHS:
那次又是拿着探索设备，把所有探索机器人抛出的记忆，印象中警报大作，火炮启动的最后一刻我成功中断了系统。

就在我以为没事后，
眼前的屏幕却突然播放起来，那是...
nodes.snippet_EN:
I had taken some exploration kits, so I let all the robots get to work. I heard the alarms blaring, and just as the system was about to attack, I managed to disable it.

Just when I thought everything had settled down, the screen turned on and started to play some old recordings.

nodes.snippet: 還有這個
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#警告...12点钟的龙脉探测船...你们..是矿业..联合..吗？

这附近是英灵们的空域...视你的回答，我..们会决...定是否开火#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#通讯端传出警告的信息，研判是战后灭亡，星环自由战线的旧部

船只已经是战损严重，我该回应吗？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#This is a warning... to the lumen seeking vessel at 12 o'clock... Are you... United... Mining...?

You're approaching the resting place of our fallen brothers. We'll decide whether to open fire... depending on your response.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#We're getting warning signals. It looks like an old sect of the Liberation Front that was supposedly wiped out after the war.

The ship looks like it's been damaged in battle. Should we respond?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

nodes.snippet:
你認不得龍脈的植物吧，
什麼「門蘭芝」的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警告：导航系统异常 距...离目标标标终点...无法判判判断

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#姐姐！是电磁风暴，红楼的导航系统没有反应了！

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（这样会迷失在宇宙空间之中...因此落难的船不知道有多少...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: Navigation system error. Distance to... d-d-d-destination... unknown.

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#Eddie! It's an electromagnetic storm! Red Chamber's navigation system isn't responding!

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(If we don't fix this, we're going to get lost in space... Who knows how many ships have gotten stranded like this...)

nodes.snippet: 這是探勘用的簡易掃描裝置，可以幫助你辨識龍脈中的花草的種類
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountNobleA_N##NONAME#我只是晚了点回来，为了创作龙脉长歌，这些外出取材是必须的！

再不打开通讯，我就把家族的八卦全抖出来！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#有一艘罗登家族的船占用了空域中的公用频道，建议是管他的家族，干脆把它黑客掉

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#任何家族都会有自己的困难， 帮帮忙吧#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountNobleA_N##NONAME#So what if I came back a little late! It's for "Melody of Starsong".

I had to go out and do research, get inspired!

If you don't turn on your communication channel, I'm gonna spill all the family secrets! You just watch me!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#One of the Rodin ships is hogging the public channel.

They're going on about family stuff, let them deal with it.

Let's just hack in and turn it off.

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Every family has its problems. We should help them out.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet: 希望你伙伴早日健康
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#前面的船只，你已经进入了矿业联合阅兵的演习场，请立即停驶

报上你的船籍编号，所有人姓名，如果不听从指示，我们将依法处理#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#姐姐...我以为轨道无人抄了近路，但这里是矿联未公开的阅兵仪式预演地，我们碰上警备船了！

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#......

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（怎么跟上次龙脉一样又出事了...最近状况越来越糟...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Vessel ahead, you are encroaching on a United Mining military parade rehearsal. Please stop immediately.

Report your ship ID and all members of the crew. If you do not comply, we have the right to deal with you according to law.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#Eddie... I didn't think there'd be anyone on this shortcut.

United Mining didn't announce they'd be rehearsing a military parade here! That's a guard ship!

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#......

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(This is just like what happened at the cave... Why do things seem to be getting worse...?)

nodes.snippet: ...失禮了，謝謝
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警吿，温室汜气供应异常， 浓度下降约3.4% 预计7标准时后，将有植物死亡...

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#傻孩子红楼又在大惊小怪，这种程度的数值异常，调整一下管线流量，几分钟就能排除了

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#这样好吗？我觉得还是让艾妲聆听，找出管线哪里出问题，比较保险#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: Error found in the greenhouse's lumium supply. Concentration has dropped by 3%. Plants will begin to die in 7 hours...

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Silly computer is going off again. Adjusting the pipe flow will fix this in no time.

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I think Eda should be able to hear where the problem is. That'd be much safer.#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

nodes.snippet: 不用謝，我對龍脈花卉還算熟悉，太空船也有儲存的空間
nodes.snippet_CHS:
毕竟别人的家务事，我们也没什么好介入。
红楼对航道上的船视而不见，
照样航向基金会的空间站。
nodes.snippet_EN: We decided it wasn't best to stick our noses in the affairs of others. Red Chamber continued on the spaceway until the ship was out of sight, and headed towards the Culture Foundation's space station.

nodes.snippet: 多餘帶回的話，可以賣到蠻好的價格，很公平的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
红楼尝试联系罗登家族的空间站，
但却伪装失败，反而被对方当成花边新闻的记者，一个不察，对方的自动防御系统竟然开火，红楼的甲板受到不少损伤。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We tried contacting the Rodin family space station with a modified signal, but it failed, and we were mistaken for gossip journalists.

Unfortunately for us, the automatic defense system didn't bother to identify us and dealt significant damage to our ship.

nodes.snippet: 小行星-龍脈-819
nodes.snippet_CHS:
通讯的人是大名鼎鼎的「费拉・罗登」，龙脉长歌的创作人。

似乎是为了创作很少回家，差点被家里赶出去。在红楼的协助下，我们成功让他跟家中接上线，调解了纠纷。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The one online was Felis Rodin, the creator of "Melody of Starsong". He spent so much time working on the opera that he rarely went home, and his family nearly kicked him out.

Red Chamber was able to get him in touch with his family and help resolve the issue.

nodes.snippet: 大魁、李莫，聽得到我的訊號嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
那是群流亡许久，急需补给的游击队，
理解自己误认后，他们登船致歉，
并将一些手边的配给酒类赠与我们。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We found out that it was a group of guerillas that had been drifting for a long time, and needed serious help.

After realizing that they'd made a mistake, they boarded Red Chamber, apologized, and even gave us something as a gift.

nodes.snippet: 發信狀況很清楚
nodes.snippet_CHS:
还来不及解释，游击队船只的武器已经发射，
造成红楼不少损伤。

在通讯不良的小行星带，善意的表达总是困难。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We weren't able to respond in time, and the guerillas shot several rounds, which damaged the ship.

The poor signal quality in the asteroid belt made it difficult to express goodwill.

nodes.snippet: 我跟菈米亞都會支援你們，有狀況就直接回報
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们默默的继续移动，
远方断断续续地电磁讯号逐渐变弱，
直到完全消失不见。
nodes.snippet_EN: We kept on moving, slowly but surely. The intermittent signals coming from afar gradually grew weaker, until they finally disappeared completely.

nodes.snippet: 李莫...咳！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们依赖着艾妲的指示，
她说感应到一个巨大的宇宙空间站，
菈米亚跟着艾妲的指示在风暴中移动，
最后出现在眼前的是...
nodes.snippet_EN: We followed Eda's instructions and she said she picked up on a massive space station. With Eda guiding the way, Remi flew through the storm and we eventually found a way out.

nodes.snippet: 大魁，你不該跟我下來的
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲努力的感应着龙脉，试图寻找安全的航道继续飞往回收站「白冢」，然而我们却像瞎子一样，一头与航道的船只发生冲撞
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda did her best to listen for lumen, trying to find a safe pathway to the Shiratsuka recycling plant. We were flying like we were blind, and ended up crashing into another ship.

nodes.snippet: 少主...保護你是我的任務...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记忆中艾妲的判断总是准确，
电磁风暴后来逐渐远离，
系统在随后不久便恢复了正常
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda always knew what to do. The storm eventually faded, and the navigation system started working just fine in no time.

nodes.snippet: 咳咳！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们宣称自己是参与阅的矿联船只，
和警备船的军官多次致歉后，混入阅兵队伍离去。

虽然那时总跟菈米亚吵架，但她的确成功让我们躲过不少危机。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We announced ourselves as a United Mining vessel that was attending the parade. After repeatedly apologizing to the officer, we slipped among the troops before slipping away.

Even though I often argued with Remi, she sure helped us get out of a lot of dangerous situations.

nodes.snippet: 這樣是怎麼保護，回去！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号才出去，我们突然就遭到警备船围攻，
红楼受到致命的重创。
nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as the signal went out, the guard ship opened fire and Red Chamber was nearly destroyed.

nodes.snippet: 沒事的...我現在意識很清楚
nodes.snippet_CHS:
想不到什么解决方法，红楼加快马力，
想甩开前面的警备船。

对方觉得我们心中有鬼，对红楼展开炮击。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Unable to think of another option, Red Chamber raced forward, attempting to throw off the guard ship.

They must have thought that was pretty suspicious, because a barrage of enemy fire rained down on us.

nodes.snippet: 那醫生對少主態度雖不好，但緊急處理倒是沒話說
nodes.snippet_CHS:
故障的源头，是汜水混合器出了异常。
艾妲最后自己简单调整了温室的供水状况，
一切又回复正常。
菈米亚对此却有点不满，但她没有说出口。
nodes.snippet_EN: The source of the problem was the lumium hybridizer. Eda adjusted the lumium supply to the greenhouse and things just returned to normal. Remi was a bit upset, but she didn't say anything.

nodes.snippet: 看，只是走路沒什麼大礙
nodes.snippet_CHS: 那阵子菈米亚心情不好，很容易出错，尽管艾妲说可以协助，坚决自行处理的她，最终让含有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，发生了小爆炸。
nodes.snippet_EN: During that time, Remi wasn't doing too well, and often made mistakes. Eda said she could help, but Remi insisted that she could do it herself. She didn't mean to, but some impurities got into the lumenide, which leaked into the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.

nodes.snippet: 這...會是門蘭芝嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...这是瀛海在龙脉冲突前，建立的空间站
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#This space station was built by East Ocean before the Lumen War...

nodes.snippet:
艾妲說門蘭芝通常長在小行星的中心
...看來沒那麼容易

nodes.snippet: 看起來龍鳴箱都被植物破壞了...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我再三向对方保证，不会告发他，随即离开现场。
我仍然记得离开时，他冰冷而危险的眼神，
现在想起来还是余悸犹存。
nodes.snippet_EN: I promised I wouldn't report them several times before leaving the cave. I can still see his ice-cold, menacing stare. Just thinking of it makes me shudder.

nodes.snippet: 這得找找看，不知道有沒有進入裡面神壇的方法
nodes.snippet_CHS:
为了阻止龙穴被破坏，
我和盗采者展开了一阵扭打。
对方眼看情势不对，装备也不管了，拔腿就跑。
现在想起来，真不知道我那时哪来的勇气。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I dove in to prevent the cave from being irreparably damaged, and a fight erupted. The pirates didn't like the way things were looking and took off running, leaving their equipment behind. 

I have no idea where I got the courage to stand up to them.

nodes.snippet: 不用你操心
nodes.snippet_CHS:
醒来时，已经倒在地上好一会了。盗采者不知去向，龙穴内的珍贵遗迹也被破坏殆尽。
现在回想当时能保住一条命，也是足够了。
nodes.snippet_EN: When I awoke, I had been sprawled out on the ground for some time. The pirates were gone, and valuable relics were shattered on the ground. Still, at least I didn't lose my life.

nodes.snippet: 這壞得也太嚴重了...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
打开后，里面是大量的龙脉花卉，
并放着一本奇妙的经书，

后来才知道，那是献给黑洞之神的棺材。
nodes.snippet_EN:
It turned out to be full of lumen flowers, with a mysterious scripture placed neatly beside them.

Later, I found out it was a casket to be offered up to the black hole deity.

nodes.snippet: 女巫的聲音也沒用嗎...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我没有管那些货柜，
群山的龙脉总是不乏文物盗采者。
nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't think too much about the container. Caves in the Peaks were full of robbers looking for relics.

nodes.snippet: 幾萬公里外聽到的聲音，唱得稍不準就不能用的
nodes.snippet_CHS: 幾萬公里外聽到的聲音，唱得稍不準就不能用的

nodes.snippet_JP: 幾萬公里外聽到的聲音，唱得稍不準就不能用的

nodes.snippet:
我得請艾妲下龍脈嗎？
讓她聆聽地脈的聲音...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 安全起见，我离开了那扇大门。
nodes.snippet_EN: Safety always came first. And so, I left.

nodes.snippet:
有經驗的探勘人不靠女巫，
跟我來

nodes.snippet: 這裡的龍脈很豐沛，應該不難找
nodes.snippet_CHS:
德拉格雷不愧是龙穴与万道研究首屈一指的专家。协助他考古，我对龙穴探勘与万道研究有了全新的理解。
想到以前急躁的下龙穴方式，不禁为之汗颜。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Lagrée was an expert cave and Myrian researcher. I learned to look at cave excavation and Myrian research from a completely different perspective.
Thinking back on the impulsive methods I employed in the past, I couldn't help but feel ashamed.

nodes.snippet:
這是地底滲出的汜水，
雖然純度不會太高
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我在协助挖掘时，分享了我过往发现的龙穴现象和考古数据。
德拉格雷显得十分高兴，我描述的现象，连他也是第一次听说。
nodes.snippet_EN:
As I helped dig, I shared all the archaeological knowledge I'd learned in the caves.
Lagrée was clearly excited, and even noted that he had never encountered much of what I'd seen.

nodes.snippet:
但如果演奏得好，
開個門應該沒問題
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我在协助挖掘时，分享了我过往发现的龙穴现象和考古数据。
我分享的信息没有引起德拉格雷的兴趣。那些错误的信息，反而让他对红楼的评价大为降低。
nodes.snippet_EN:
As I helped dig, I shared all the archaelogical knowledge I'd learned in the caves.
However, Lagrée was clearly not interested. He even said that much of the information was incorrect, which lowered his opinion of Red Chamber.

nodes.snippet:
將你的仿聲器探進去，
看看收音會聽到什麼
nodes.snippet_CHS:
將你的仿聲器探進去，
看看收音會聽到什麼

nodes.snippet: 懂吧，不用依靠女巫那種兵器
nodes.snippet_CHS: 成功了

nodes.snippet: 用這音源演奏看看
nodes.snippet_CHS: 打不开龙门

nodes.snippet: 這是什麼...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
幸好及时关闭风转箱，才没有酿成灾害。
问了才知道，他们来收集共振数据，风转箱不知为何就超载了。为了表达感谢，他们分享了一些最新的研究数据给我。
nodes.snippet_EN: Luckily, I was able to turn off the transmutation chamber in time and prevent a disaster from occurring. They told me they were gathering resonance data, and the chamber suddenly overloaded. To thank me, they shared the latest research with us.

nodes.snippet: 我想起第一次教你探索龍脈的時候，現在動作這麼快
nodes.snippet_CHS:
才刚疏散完研究小组，龙穴便在轰隆巨响中崩塌了。
还好没被落石命中，我好不容易才爬出那堆废墟。
nodes.snippet_EN: Just as the small research team made it to safety, the cave collapsed as it echoed roaring bellows. Luckily, I didn't get hit by any falling debris and I was able to pull myself out of the rubble.

nodes.snippet: 別說無聊的話，這要怎麼過去？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对着岩壁共鸣不久，岩壁中的生物像一团发光的烟雾般扭动着，消失无踪，岩壁突然向内坍塌。
烟尘散去后，碎石中发现了罕见的汜晶体。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Not long into the performance, the organisms in the wall twisted like wisping smoke, and as they disappeared into thin air, the craggy wall suddenly collapsed inwards.

When the dust had settled, I found a rare lumenite crystal amid the debris.

nodes.snippet: 別急，那些是汜水管破裂造成的，冷靜地關掉來源就好
nodes.snippet_CHS:
才开始挖掘汜晶岩壁，岩壁中的生物扭动发出哀鸣。
整个洞穴开始震动坍塌，我赶紧夺路而逃。龙穴稳定后回去搜索，已经找不到神秘的生物了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
As I started to dig, the organisms within the wall began to squirm and mournful wails were heard.

The whole cave began to vibrate and signs of collapse could be seen. I scrambled for safety, and when the cave settled down I went back to look for the mysterious organisms, but I couldn't find a thing.

nodes.snippet: 頭有點...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 頭有點...
nodes.snippet_EN: 頭有點...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 頭有點...
nodes.snippet_JP: 頭有點...

nodes.snippet: 別亂來，龍脈的能量「汜」被認為是遠古的靈魂，會攜帶各種意識
nodes.snippet_CHS: 费了点时间搞懂这里的汜水管结构，引出汜水后，我拿到了那株植物。
nodes.snippet_EN: After spending some time understanding the structure of the pipes and draining the lumenide, I pulled out the plant.

nodes.snippet: 隨便亂碰意識會被捲進去，最後分不清楚自己是誰...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我低估了水池的深度。才踏入池中，汜水能量差点让我失去意识，
nodes.snippet_EN: I underestimated the depth of the pond, and as I fumbled about, the lumen energy nearly made me lose consciousness.

nodes.snippet: 找到什麼東西了？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我谨慎地婉拒了矿联探勘团的提案。
他们出乎意料地居然没有继续施压。
nodes.snippet_EN: I politely refused the "offer" proposed by United Mining's excavation party. Surprisingly, they didn't force me to do it.

nodes.snippet: 這...看起來很像瀛海的東西？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 不得不说，我觉得艾妲很容易乱买东西。
nodes.snippet_EN: I have to say it, Eda was a bit of an impulsive buyer.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「自以为是的外地人...」

对方碎碎念了几句后，头也不回的转身而去。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Self-righteous bastards..."

After mumbling a few curt words, the merchant turned around and left without looking back.

nodes.snippet: 之前探勘人留下的吧，別在意
nodes.snippet_CHS: 之前探勘人留下的吧，別在意
nodes.snippet_EN: 之前探勘人留下的吧，別在意

nodes.snippet: 看來這裡是極限了呢
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「 （｀ｴ ´ *＼ 」

记得通讯纪录上，对方传了很奇怪的文字给我们，
我对群山这种神奇豚类，没有太多好印象。
nodes.snippet_EN:
（｀ｴ ´ *＼

The communication records showed a message written in some unusual language. I didn't have many positive encounters with these strange capybaras from the Peaks.

nodes.snippet: 不准跟過來，你回去太空船
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对方领受了装甲的货柜组件后离去，
尽管菈米亚跟我都不赞成，
但当时艾妲的善行，竟然为她换来了...
nodes.snippet_EN: They left right after taking a container filled with armor. Remi and I did not approve, but Eda's kindness ended up paying off.

nodes.snippet: 當然，我可爬不上去
nodes.snippet_CHS: 當然，我可爬不上去
nodes.snippet_EN: 當然，我可爬不上去
nodes.snippet_CHT: 當然，我可爬不上去
nodes.snippet_JP: 當然，我可爬不上去

nodes.snippet: 做什麼你
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「上头直接找民间船来送货吗，行。」
感觉是十万火急，对方连看到红楼的船籍不对也不疑有它，马上请我们去领货柜。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"So, they started hiring civilian ships? Whatever works."

The place was complete chaos. They were so busy that they didn't even question Red Chamber's identity, and immediately told us to pick up some containers.

nodes.snippet: 我送你回去，再過來
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对方吆喝着追上来，我们被警备队逮到，就在我们以为完蛋时，一位矿业联合的长官帮我们解了围，

「执行任务小心点。」

他说得小声，我们发现，他手指上是万道六山戒。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Screaming as they chased us, we were eventually captured by the guards. However, just as we thought we were finished, a United Mining officer appeared and helped us clear everything up.

"Be careful on these missions."

He spoke softly, and we noticed he was wearing a Six Peaks Ring.

nodes.snippet_CHS: 不用

nodes.snippet_JP: 不用

nodes.snippet_CHT: 走不動的話，我背你
nodes.snippet_JP: 走不動的話，我背你

nodes.snippet: 要命，饒了我吧，你非得一直跟在我身邊嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「以罗登家族的名誉发誓，他们是自己人」 透过罗登的别针，我们谎称自己是罗登家族，硬是把拉马送了进去

「烛龙在上，我一直有看你们新闻，就知道你们会成为大人物。」他笑着走入了会场，走前给了我们难忘的礼物。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"On the Rodin family name, I swear, they are one of ours." Using the Rodin family brooch, we pretended to be members of the Rodin family and pulled Lamar in with us.

"Ignis above, I've been keeping up with your news. I knew you'd make it big!" He laughed boisterously as he entered the meeting room, leaving us with something unforgettable.

nodes.snippet: 你是傷患！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「以罗登家族的名誉发誓，他们是自己人」

尽管我们这么说，但矿业联合只觉得可疑。最后整件事不了了之。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"On the Rodin family name, I swear, they are one of ours."

We tried convincing them, but United Mining remained suspicious, and in the end, nothing came of it.

nodes.snippet: 兩位還好嗎，信號顯示你們不動了？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我在风暴中透过红楼的绳索小心前往风暴中心，剧烈的风暴让太空防护衣各种读数爆表，恍惚中我失去了意识...

等我醒来时，我回到了红楼，倒在艾妲身旁 「抱歉...不该让你冒险」她很愧疚地说。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Using Red Chamber's tether, I carefully made my way to the center of the storm. The intensity of the storm caused the readings of the spacesuit to go off the charts and, in a daze, I slowly lost consciousness...

When I came to, I was inside Red Chamber, on the ground by Eda's side. "I'm so sorry... I shouldn't have let you go out there," Eda said. I could sense the regret in her voice.

nodes.snippet:
喂，女巫，
每個船員都有生命追蹤器吧？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
红楼顺着电磁波最强烈的地方靠近，亚空间裂口闪烁着雷光...

下一瞬间，红楼就因为电磁异常突然爆发了小型的火灾。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Red Chamber moved in closer to where the electromagnetic waves were most intense. Flashes of electricity could be seen in the subspace rift...

Then, all of a sudden, a small fire broke out in Red Chamber, caused by some electromagnetic abnormalities.

nodes.snippet: 我的生命反應如何？幫我告訴他
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我的生命反應如何？幫我告訴他
nodes.snippet_EN: 我的生命反應如何？幫我告訴他
nodes.snippet_CHT: 我的生命反應如何？幫我告訴他
nodes.snippet_JP: 我的生命反應如何？幫我告訴他

nodes.snippet:
...跟下船時比起來，
上升7.2個百分點
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼加速闯越矿联巡逻船的封锁，但是被多次击中。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber plowed ahead and managed to break free of the blockade set up by the patrol ship, but was hit multiple times on the way out.

nodes.snippet: 要命，我不知道龍脈還有恢復的力量
nodes.snippet_CHS: 伪装的签证派上用场，巡逻船的船长虽然觉得奇怪，但是没多说什么，放我们过去了。
nodes.snippet_EN: We pulled out the forged visa and sent it to the patrol ship. The patrol captain thought it was a bit strange, but he didn't say much and just let us go.

nodes.snippet: 沒事了，謝謝
nodes.snippet_CHS:
以为瞒过巡逻船了，没想到对方只是在等我们靠近。
我们逃脱追捕，红楼却受到严重损害。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We thought we'd pulled one over on the patrol ship, but it turns out they were just waiting for us to get closer.

We avoided getting arrested, but Red Chamber was hit pretty bad.

nodes.snippet: 別跟我開玩笑...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼尝试闯过舰队的拦阻，尽管对方没追上，却因此遭受严重的打击。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber tried to charge through the barrier. Even though they didn't pursue us, our ship was badly damaged.

nodes.snippet: 少主，記得我說的，別那麼衝動
nodes.snippet_CHS: 老样子，我们打出讯号，谎称自己是矿联的贵族，对方研究了很久，无法理解为什么我们会开着民间船，最后还是放我们通行。
nodes.snippet_EN: As always, we sent out a signal pretending to be United Mining nobles. They looked it over for a long time, and even though they weren't able to figure out why we'd be flying a civilian vessel, they eventually let us pass.

nodes.snippet: 慢慢來，總有一天你會成為家主
nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号出去没多久，巡逻舰的炮火就扫了过来，
或许打从开始，他们就没有打算放过我们。
nodes.snippet_EN: Not long after we sent out the signal, the patrol ships sent a barrage of attacks our way. Perhaps they never even planned on letting us go.

nodes.snippet: 扯太遠了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对方听着音档的内容非常震撼，
直说这可能是战争前的计划，

「谢谢你的帮忙，如果这种消息公开出来，对矿业联合是一大打击...」，

事后她给了我们一笔丰厚的酬劳。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The reporter was shocked after listening to the audio file, noting that these might be plans for war.

"Thank you so much. If this gets out, it'll be a serious blow to United Mining..." She then compensated us handsomely, as promised.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「吉普赛家族的故事很有趣，但只能当八卦新闻」

收货的对方苦笑，她似乎知道发送这本书的老人是谁，最后给了我们点酬劳。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Very interesting. But a history of the Rumani Clan would only go as gossip."

She smiled wryly, almost like she knew the old man who had given us the book. Still, she paid us a little bit.

nodes.snippet: 做什麼...?
nodes.snippet_CHS: 影像残缺的片段太多，对方说大众看了只会同情矿业联合，不甚满意，最后给了我们点酬劳。
nodes.snippet_EN: The video was seriously damaged, and the reporter said its content would make people feel sympathetic towards United Mining. She was not happy, but paid us anyway.

nodes.snippet_EN: 少主，手伸出來
nodes.snippet_CHT: 少主，手伸出來
nodes.snippet_JP: 少主，手伸出來

nodes.snippet_CHT: 現在不是做這種事的時候
nodes.snippet_JP: 現在不是做這種事的時候

nodes.snippet: 以鳶家榮耀起誓
nodes.snippet_CHS: 以鳶家榮耀起誓
