nodes.snippet_CHT: 以鳶家榮耀起誓
nodes.snippet_JP: 以鳶家榮耀起誓

nodes.snippet: 別搬出家族的...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 別搬出家族的...
nodes.snippet_EN: 別搬出家族的...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 別搬出家族的...
nodes.snippet_JP: 別搬出家族的...

nodes.snippet: ...以鳶家榮耀起誓
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得通讯传来了这样的信息：

「天佑矿联，尊贵而来的远方船只，我们会将您护送至安全的地点。」

我一时无法相信，菈米亚则露出了自信的微笑。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I still remember the response they sent back... "Glory to the united. Honorable vessel, traveling from afar, we will escort you to a safe location."

For a second, I couldn't believe what was happening. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with confidence.

nodes.snippet: 夠了...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 夠了...
nodes.snippet_EN: 夠了...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 夠了...
nodes.snippet_JP: 夠了...

nodes.snippet:
我親衛，大魁・佛朗，
與少主性命相連，誓死保護少主，
直到成為家主那天
nodes.snippet_CHS:
记得通讯传来了这样的信息...

「天佑矿联，尊贵而来的远方船只，我们会将您护送至安全的地点。」

我一时无法相信，菈米亚则露出了自信的微笑。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I still remember the response they sent back... "Glory to the united. Honorable vessel, traveling from afar, we will escort you to a safe location."

For a second, I couldn't believe what was happening. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with confidence.

nodes.snippet: 咳！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 咳！
nodes.snippet_EN: 咳！
nodes.snippet_CHT: 咳！
nodes.snippet_JP: 咳！

nodes.snippet: ...連手都握不穩
nodes.snippet_CHS: ...連手都握不穩
nodes.snippet_EN: ...連手都握不穩
nodes.snippet_CHT: ...連手都握不穩
nodes.snippet_JP: ...連手都握不穩

nodes.snippet: 探索龍脈別逞強，有狀況就說一聲
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我还记得拉马门口争执的背影，他似乎没有看见我们，只希望他不会被矿业联合带走。
nodes.snippet_EN: I still remember Lamar arguing as he was pushed out the door. I don't think he saw us. I just hope he wasn't taken away by United Mining.

nodes.snippet: 逞強的是你
nodes.snippet_CHS: 逞強的是你
nodes.snippet_EN: 逞強的是你
nodes.snippet_CHT: 逞強的是你
nodes.snippet_JP: 逞強的是你

nodes.snippet: 真想看見你找到龍脈神壇的樣子
nodes.snippet_CHS: 真想看見你找到龍脈神壇的樣子
nodes.snippet_EN: 真想看見你找到龍脈神壇的樣子

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#来修补纪念塔的吗？好手好脚的，这里没有你的空间

等哪天你困顿得过不了日子，再回来找我们
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#You're here to fix the memorial? Sorry, we don't have work for healthy folks like you.

Come back when life becomes too hard to handle.

nodes.snippet: 好好，我這就回去了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#你们！是寻找龙脉的冒险家吗？ 点一杯酒，和大家说说你的故事吧

没故事也不要紧，如果哪天探勘不顺的话，来帮我做事挣点钱吧！
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#Hey! You a bunch of adventurers looking for lumen? Come in, have a drink, and tell us a tale!

Don't worry if you ain't got no story. If you got no luck cave running and you need a few coins, I've got plenty of work here!

nodes.snippet: 回太空船記得立刻躺著，知道嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#如何，在梦幻之城玩得愉快吗？

玩到没钱的话，我们也有不少工作可以让你帮忙，随时欢迎
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Having fun in the City of Dreams?

If you spent all your money, we've got plenty of jobs. Just drop by when you need the credits.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#停泊的探勘人，没事就闪一边去，我还得工作养家，不像你们没事乱跑

你要是没钱，想找份正经的工作，再来垃圾山吧
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#If you ain't doing nothing, get the hell outta the way. I've gotta family to raise. Not like you rascals, running around doing nothing.

If you run out of cash and want to find a normal job, you just come on back to Trash Mountain.

nodes.snippet: 別太逞強，冷靜行事
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#二向无常，年轻人，会来到这里都不是偶然

今天我们的相遇，或许注定着未来我需要你的日子，希望征兆到来那天，你会来到我这里
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#Neverlasting paths. It's no coincidence that you've arrived here, young man.

The fact that we've met may mean we'll need you someday in the future. I hope when you receive a sign... you will return.

nodes.snippet: 少主，我很驕傲能訓練你
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#你们是红楼船队吧？提醒你，九禄这边什么人都有，犯罪活动抓不胜抓

听说你们当年在这交易广场识破了诈骗的信息

哪天等上头有预算下来，你也来分享点经验给我们吧，该付的佣金我们不会少给的
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#You're the Red Chamber crew, right? Better watch out, crime rate in Fortune 9 is at an all-time high.

Hey, I heard you guys busted a pirate operation at the Migrant's Bazaar back then.

You should come share your experience with us, once we have the budget to pay for your time, of course.

nodes.snippet: 快回去太空船
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#龙脉协会的年轻人吗？年纪轻轻就创那么多纪录，现在真是人才辈出

上次协助搜救没什么空好好道谢，以后你遇到困难，记得让我还这人情

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#（是指不久前拯救移民团的事情吗，被记得真的太好了）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantC_N##NONAME#Ah, the young'uns from the association? Look at you! Setting so many darn records at your age. Real talents, I'll tell you what.

I didn't have the time to properly thank you for helping with the rescue. If you're ever in a bind, you just come find me.

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#(Is she talking about the immigration convoy? How nice of her to remember us!)

nodes.snippet: 大魁，這裡好不可思議
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterManB_N##NONAME#年轻人，这里是凭吊死者的地方，没有要悼念谁，就快点离开吧

要是你缺钱，倒是有不少事让你做，但没事别在这肃穆的广场闲晃
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterManB_N##NONAME#You there, young man. This is a place for remembrance. If you have no business here, please be on your way.

If you're low on credits, we got plenty of work. But please don't disturb the solemnity of this space.

nodes.snippet: 怎麼，你看到龍了嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#对发射台有兴趣吗？抱歉，这可不是给人随意欣赏的玩具

这里很缺临时工，搞不好哪天你会有攀上发射台的机会
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#You all interested in the launch platform, huh? Well, sorry. This isn't some toy that you can just screw around with.

But... we're short on workers around here. Maybe one day you'll have a chance to get up there.

nodes.snippet: 別開我玩笑
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#红楼商船队，你们不打听龙脉消息来这做什么？

大人物别来我们这种地方，哪天等你们的龙脉申请下来了，这些货柜可都你们的了

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#（船队目前很宽裕，应该没有需要找工作，专心寻找黑龙吧）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#Ah! The great Red Chamber crew, what brings you here? Shouldn't you be out looking for intel?

With the number of mines under your name, after your applications go through, I'm sure you'll be able to buy this place.

#AVATAR:Girl_Smile1#(We're doing pretty good right now. I don't think we need to take on any work. Best focus on finding Banshee.)

nodes.snippet: 形容一下吧
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#要申请矿权认证吗？去那边填写文件，有消息会再通知你

如果来排工作的，预算下来我们才会增聘人员，如果两者都不是，请回吧
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#Applying for mining rights? Fill in the documents over there. I'll notify you when we get any news.

If you're looking for work, we'll start hiring when the budget comes in. If you're not here for either, then get moving.

nodes.snippet: 我無法形容，四處都是光...

龍脈的影響，
的確是神壇的最深處了

nodes.snippet:
二輪十天十三地
乙皇賜福，
僅以此紀念乙皇千萬歲
nodes.snippet_CHS:
穿越的过程我们遭受数次射击，
一阵惊慌之下我们勉强穿过了火网。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The ship took multiple hits as we charged through the enemy line.

After some panicked maneuvering, we managed to escape enemy fire.

nodes.snippet: 這就是萬道的神壇...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
印象中，对方通讯官发现自己弄错有点不解，
却依然放行了我们。
nodes.snippet_EN: From what I remember, the communications officer seemed confused about his mistake, so they just decided to let us go.

nodes.snippet: 大魁聽到回答！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
破旧的通讯器材似乎没有奏效
对方瞬间就拆穿了我们的伪装讯号，瞬间炮火齐上
虽然逃脱成功，红楼却受了严重的伤
nodes.snippet_EN:
The old signal modifier failed to convince them. They immediately saw through the trick, and responded with a barrage of attacks.

Although we managed to escape, Red Chamber took quite a few hits.

nodes.snippet: 你身處神殿深處，礦脈中心的汜水是最乾淨的
應該能聽到完整的龍鳴聲，但記得別踏進水中，昏迷我可救不了你

你那邊怎麼沒有引擎聲，
還沒回太空船嗎？

我回到登陸口附近，
做好你手邊的事
The flowers will quench your inner flame, so you can remain at my side.

龍脈殘留的古老意識嗎...
不能被帶走...
大魁，我現在就過去了，我們準備回太空船

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantD_N##NONAME#探勘人，需要帮忙吗？依据龙脉公约，不论身份，只要船队有群山公民，我们将会提供人道支援#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是龙脉协会的巡逻队，他们询问我们是否需要协助！#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantD_N##NONAME#Hey there, you all need some help?

According to association regulations, if any member of your crew is a Thousand Peaks citizen, we will provide you with any assistance you need, no questions asked.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad! They asked if we need any help.#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#

nodes.snippet: 聽到嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#龙脉常在，风水引路...欢迎...群山落难的伙伴...我们随时可以援助#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#一艘讯号无法辨识的商船，自称可以协助民间的落难船...这该怎么办？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#Endless lumen, light the way... Welcome... stranded comrades of the Peaks. We are always ready to assist those in need.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#I'm getting unidentified signals from a trading vessel claiming to provide fuel for stranded ships... What do we do?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

nodes.snippet: 奇怪，訊號怎麼了？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅将我们带回补给处，更为我们将油量做了一定的补给
nodes.snippet_EN: Announcing that we were the Red Chamber crew was not only enough for the squad to escort us back for resupplies, they even offered us some fuel.

nodes.snippet: 大魁！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 通讯一段有着细碎的抱怨声，他们似乎很常处理这种遇难的船只，默默地将我们带回最近的空间站
nodes.snippet_EN: We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end as they towed us back to the nearest space station. Dealing with stranded ships seemed to be a regular occurrence for them.

nodes.snippet: 艾妲，妳聯絡得到大魁嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲交涉失败，对方认为我们可能是别有意图的民间船，沉默后自行离去。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was unable to convince them. For some reason it raised their suspicion, and after a brief moment of silence, they left without a word.

nodes.snippet: 目前沒有接收到通訊
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一拒绝，对方的炮火就落了下来，但幸亏决定得早，红楼只有些许损伤。
nodes.snippet_EN: As soon as we declined, we were met with a barrage of enemy fire. Fortunately this was expected, and the ship took minimal damage.

nodes.snippet_CHS: 商船将我们带回了可以补给的地方，运输红楼的过程中，电讯一端的对方聊着自己过往从军的经历。
nodes.snippet_EN: We listened to them reminisce about their days in the military as they towed us back to a resupply point.

nodes.snippet: ...有些奇怪的狀況
nodes.snippet_CHS:
那时红楼突然遭到登陆艇的撞击，是伪装的海盗。

尽管最后击退了对方，却受到了严重的伤害。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The pirates made their intentions clear, as their boarding vessel smashed into our ship.

While we managed to fight them off, the ship took considerable damage.

nodes.snippet: 附近偵測到多空間泛用引擎的熱源
nodes.snippet_CHS: 附近偵測到多空間泛用引擎的熱源
nodes.snippet_EN: 附近偵測到多空間泛用引擎的熱源
nodes.snippet_CHT: 附近偵測到多空間泛用引擎的熱源
nodes.snippet_JP: 附近偵測到多空間泛用引擎的熱源

nodes.snippet: 說清楚點？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 說清楚點？
nodes.snippet_EN: 說清楚點？
nodes.snippet_CHT: 說清楚點？
nodes.snippet_JP: 說清楚點？

nodes.snippet:
姊姊的意思是，
附近可能有別的探勘船
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#警告六点钟方向的龙脉探测船伙伴， 朝山巡逻队要逮到我们了

货都在你那里，快丢掉它们，假装我们不认识#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#有艘船籍不明的飞船接近，推测是走私船

他们想栽赃给我们，故意用公开频道对我们发送信息，建议是直接离开#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#离开...不就更让巡逻局误以为走私品在我们船上

我们主动澄清就好，不用担心

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#（巡逻队马上要来了， 听谁的比较好...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel at 6 o'clock. The Mt. Aurora patrol squad is after us.

The product is with you. Toss it out and act like you don't know us.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#There's some unknown ship trying to get close to us. I'm guessing it's a smuggling vessel.

They're trying to frame us by sending a message to us on the public channel. I think we should just get out of here.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Leave? Isn't that going to make the patrol squad even more suspicious?

Let's clear this up ourselves. It won't be an issue.

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#(The patrol squad is already headed our way... What should we do?)

nodes.snippet: 推測不是群山本地船，熱源頻譜和你的太空船類似...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#公告：最近电波干扰频繁

自从一位女歌手颂唱伪神经典「烛龙创世经」，大量人透过非法通讯收听来自「兔窟」的节目...

通讯局怀疑歌手为女巫，如果能提供相关数据，行星通讯局感谢您的协助#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#「烛龙创世经」...难不成是姐姐那次帮忙造成的...

#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#（这是我害到她吗， 这要怎么澄清...）

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲你别冲动， 这跟你一点关系都没有！
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#Warning: Signal interferences have recently been on the rise.

Ever since a female singer sang the heretical scripture "Ignis' Genesis", a large number of people have been using illegal networks to listen to Rabbit Newswire.

Unison Telecom believes this woman is a witch. Anyone who can provide us with her information will be greatly appreciated.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Ignis' Genesis... Wasn't that what Eddie performed last time...?

#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#(Did I get her in trouble...? How am I going to clear this up...?)

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, calm down! It's got nothing to do with you!

nodes.snippet: 龍脈裡可能有別人
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterScavengerA_N##NONAME#破烂的龙脉探测船，混到别人的空域做什么？

我们要在这里进行回收作业了，闪远点！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#姐姐，是垃圾山的残骸搜寻队！

他们找到有价值的太空残骸后， 便会霸占空域，等待拆船队抵达#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterScavengerA_N##NONAME#Now what's a rusty, crusty lumen seeking vessel doing creeping into other people's airspace?

We're recycling here. So scram!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Eddie, it's scavengers from Trash Mountain!

They found some valuable debris and are hogging the airspace, waiting for the disassembly crew to arrive.#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

nodes.snippet: 大魁，你有聽到嗎！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，红楼收到奇怪的通讯，现在播放出来，请判断是否回覆...

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#哈哈哈，敬告周遭的...平民？也是要去桃源乡玩的吗？

嘻嘻，那边可好玩了啊！什么？我很清醒！船我自己开就行了#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#船名是「像我流浪的人」...

这不会是是丝洲酒吧的老板吧...卖酒的自己喝成这样...

这要怎么处理...
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, we're getting a weird signal. I'm gonna play it and you tell me if we should respond...

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#Wahaha! My fellow Peakers... heading to Taoyuan to party?

Hehehe, boy is it fun. Hey, what? I'm fine, I'm fine! I can fly, trust me!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#He looks like a good guy...

Wait... Is that the barkeep from Silk Oasis? Never thought I'd see a barkeep this drunk... What should we do?

nodes.snippet: 這麼愛操心怎麼當得了家主呢
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:CabyMerchantB_N##NONAME#烛龙在上，是一样在回避矿业联合追捕的朋友吗？

看你们装甲七零八落的，我可以帮忙补给，只收一点点心意就好...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，这船有点可疑...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#谁都知道很可疑，别多嘴#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:CabyMerchantB_N##NONAME#Ignis above. Just like me, huh? We're united in so far as we're both runnin' from United, wouldn't you say?

Looks like your armor is a messy mess. I can help you fix that, if you let me wet my beak a little...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, I don't like the looks of this...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#We know. Shut it already.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet: 這麼做就能關閉通訊嗎...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#有一艘船籍不明的飞船尾随我们许久，刚刚要求通讯，现在接通

#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#你们就是传说中的红楼吗？ 我找你们好久，听说横行小行星带的白帮是你们瓦解的？

我是刚加入龙脉日报的新人，正在做一篇报导

愿意让我上船，多了解你们一点吗？#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（不知不觉间，我们已经变得这么有名了吗...）#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#There's an unidentified spaceship that has been trailing us for some time now.

They just sent us a message. I'm putting it through.

#AVATAR:MountCaveRunnerA_N##NONAME#Are you really the Red Chamber? Boy, have I been looking for you. You're the ones who wiped out the Bones Brigade, right?

I'm a new guy over at the Daily Lumen and am writing an article about you.

Could I come onboard and get a better understanding of the crew?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Excited##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(I had no idea we'd gotten this famous...)#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#（歌声）龙脉常在，风水引路～ 小行星必将奋起！

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#你唱歌小声点，有人呢

孩子，矿业联合早被我们赶出去了小行星带，不去空间站享受，来这纪念碑做什么？

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（刚刚这里还没有人，这群星环自由战线的老兵是怎么靠近我的...？）

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#也罢，我们群山人就是热爱冒险， 来，给你个好东西...

这是刚燃烧的「龙茴香」，打仗时我们都靠这玩意，吸一口，它会让你看见最美好的事物...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#*Singing* Endless lumen, light the way~ That the belt may rise again one day!

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#Shhh! Someone's here.

Child, we kicked United Mining out of the belt long ago. What are you doing in a place like this? Shouldn't you be out having fun?

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(Just a minute ago, there was no one here. Where did these old Front veterans come from?)

#AVATAR:BelterGuerrilla_N##NONAME#Come now, us Peakers love ourselves a good adventure. Here, we gotta little gift for you...

This stuff right here... lumen fennel. We used this back in the war. Inhale just a little and you'll see wonderful things...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#

nodes.snippet_CHS:
一阵晕眩中，我见到燃烧的星群...少女的朦胧身影，以及响彻穹苍的巨大龙鸣——

我吓得醒来，心里被满满忧伤包围， 就在我回头想找出那位星环老兵时， 却再也不见他的踪影。
nodes.snippet_EN:
A wave of dizziness came over me, and I saw the stars ablaze... the hazy silhouette of a young woman, and a booming starsong that resounded throughout the heavens...

I awoke, startled and frightened. My heart was wrapped in sorrow, and I turned my head to find the veterans, but not a shadow could be found.

nodes.snippet: 安靜多了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我头也不回的离去，直到对方说出 「保重了，群山的孩子们。」 我才默默回头。

但除了地上散落的龙茴香灰烬外， 却连一个人影也没有。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I planned on leaving without looking back, but then I heard: "Children of the Peaks. Take care."

I turned my head, but besides a few wisps of smoke, not a soul was to be found.

nodes.snippet: 隊長是怎麼走的？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Surprised##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#瀛海的神坛...完全没有被破坏的痕迹，像被人细心照料一样...

这是神迹吗？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Surprised##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#An East Ocean shrine... not even slightly damaged, almost as if someone has been taking care of it all this time...

Is this some kind of miracle?

nodes.snippet:
龍脈衝突時一片混亂，在戰場就被幹掉了

一樣，都猜內部暗殺，畢竟隊長是第七子的親衛，他們沒什麼勢力
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。
在冥思之中，我仿佛听见了神明的低语。
当我进入神坛后，发现一扇未被打开的密门，里面放着一本破旧的书...
nodes.snippet_EN:
I implored Taiyang to grant me permission to enter this sacred ground. As I prayed, I felt as though I could hear the god whispering.

After I entered the shrine, I found a secret door that had not been opened. Inside was old tattered book...

nodes.snippet_CHS:
多年后我常回想起，
那漂浮于无重力空间的祭坛。
如今的我是否可以骄傲地回去呢？
只希望，那瀛海的宁静之地，
可以永远保持下去...
nodes.snippet_EN: Many years later I thought back on that shrine, drifting in space. Could I return there now and stand proudly before the gods? I only hope that this tranquil piece of East Ocean is preserved into eternity...

nodes.snippet: 支持好人錯了嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 支持好人錯了嗎？
nodes.snippet_EN: 支持好人錯了嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHT: 支持好人錯了嗎？
nodes.snippet_JP: 支持好人錯了嗎？

nodes.snippet: ...別難過了，想想之後要去哪吧
nodes.snippet_CHS:
红楼迅速地改变航道，远离前方的船只。
对方发现通讯的请求没回应，默默的驶离了。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber quickly changed its route and put some distance between us and the vessel. When they found out we hadn't responded to their request, they slowly crept off.

nodes.snippet: 搞什麼鬼，內鬥成這樣，什麼鬼家族
nodes.snippet_CHS:
一位老者的声音从通讯设备传来，
我认出那声音，
是之前收下引魂盘的白冢老人。

他说因为感谢我馈赠引魂盘，得知我是瀛海人，
特地带给我这几年他搜集的珍宝...
nodes.snippet_EN:
The voice of an old man came through the comms system. I recognized it as the man from Shiratsuka, who I had given the Binarii prayer disc to.

He was hoping to thank me for what I had done. So, knowing I was from East Ocean, he brought me some treasure he had found years ago.

nodes.snippet:
我看是剩不到幾年的日子了
不如早點投靠別的室子，我看第六子行事還正派
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尝试发送的讯号强度在电磁风暴中出现异常，我们被当成是黑客，对方瞬间进入全副武装，而面对庞然巨兽，我们只能仓皇而逃。
nodes.snippet_EN: The message we tried to send got distorted traveling through the electromagnetic storm. As a result, we got mistaken for hackers and the vessel entered attack mode. We found ourselves face to face with a colossal monster, and had no choice but to scramble away.

nodes.snippet:
沒門！隊長待我們如此，
說這種沒榮譽...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
巡逻局扣押了我们两艘船，上红楼稽查后发现，这的确是误会一场。为了不要影响巡逻局的名声，他们运用局里的预备金，做了些补偿...

尽管结果不坏，
但当时菈米亚很不满艾妲没听她的。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The patrol squad detained both the ships, and after a thorough inspection of Red Chamber, they realized we had been falsely accused. In order to prevent damaging the reputation of the patrol squad, they used part of their reserve funds to compensate us.

Although things turned out alright, Remi was still upset that Eda didn't listen to her.

nodes.snippet:
...拜託主人都垮台了，
你談什麼榮譽呢
nodes.snippet_CHS:
巡逻局的船追上来，
在逮捕过程数度开火，红楼的船体损坏。
尽管最后证明无罪，
巡逻局却以干扰执法为由，拒绝赔偿。
nodes.snippet_EN: The patrol squad caught up to us, and in the process fired some artillery our way, damaging Red Chamber. In the end, we were able to prove we were innocent, but they argued they had reason to suspect us and refused to compensate us for the damage they had caused.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲差点跑去跟矿联声称是她的歌声，
让我想起她是会在记者会冲出去的人。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda almost ran up to United Mining and told them it was her. It reminded me that she was the kind of person who would make a scene at a press meeting.

nodes.snippet: 要命...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲直接说那是她唱的，
但对方看到艾妲喉咙的辅具，
形式上给了点感谢通报的酬劳，
随手就将她打发。

毕竟不能唱歌的女巫，怎么可能是那位女歌手，
我庆幸没出事，但不知为何开心不起来
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda just straight up said that she had sung it. But after seeing her vocalizer, they politely thanked her for the tip and paid her. Then they waved her off.

After all, a witch who can't sing couldn't possibly be that singer. While I was grateful that nothing happened to her, for some reason, it didn't feel good.

nodes.snippet: ...你做什麼，別拉
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「还好你们识相，不然我们打捞的残骸又要多一艘了，送你们一箱，别说我们抢生意。」

记忆中是个轻浮的声音，随后红楼船队收到了一箱抛射的货柜，船队似乎希望这能打发我们。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Thanks for understanding. Otherwise, we'd have to scrap an extra ship, if ya know what I mean, hehe. Here, take this. Now don't go around saying we're hogging all the work!"

Despite their mocking tone, they did send us a container. I think they were just trying to get us out of there.

nodes.snippet: 這小鬼誰？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
搜寻队的小型快艇突然弹射大量的残骸，
跟红楼撞了满怀，
冲击之下红楼偏离了轨道，
电讯中传出他们的笑声跟抱歉声，
显然是故意的。
nodes.snippet_EN: The small speeder suddenly ejected large amounts of debris that smashed into Red Chamber. The collision pushed us off our path, and we could hear them snickering as they apologized over the comms system.

nodes.snippet: 太乙垂憐，第八子，你不認識嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲对着通讯简单说了点恭维的话。
酒吧老板乐不可支，不久，
对方船的气闸打出一个货柜，送往红楼，
他说那是定期跟桃源乡的贵人集团交易的好货。

记得里面装的是...
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda spoke highly of the other ship, and the barkeep was ecstatic. Soon after, a container was seen heading for Red Chamber. 

He said he regularly traded with Fortuna Entertainment, and that this was one of their better products.

nodes.snippet:
走開，這群子來子去的，
我現在看到就煩
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼沉默以对，通讯一端充满酒吧老板的叫嚣声，然后慢慢的就沉默了。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber remained silent, but the other side of the comms system was filled with alcohol-fueled hooting and hollering. After some time passed, things settled down and they turned off their mic.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
豚鲸商社的船与我们接泊后，
动作迅速俐落的为我们补给。

他说他们商社有66位，
如果有缘遇到他们其他兄弟，
帮他说声好 ／ ｀ ｴ）
nodes.snippet_EN:
The Capybara Merchant Society ship docked and rapidly helped us with the armor.

He said there were 66 members in the society. If we ever came across one of his brothers, he hoped we could pass on this message: ／ ｀ ｴ）

nodes.snippet: 人走了後，有人說家裡都走光，剩這孩子一人，他每天會來這裡跟他母親說話，很有名呢
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对方听我们说明事情的经过后，坦承其实白帮是他的恩人。

「看来你们还帮白大哥一把...不用动手太好了。」

他感伤地把一个礼物交给我们，说那原本要交给白老大，但既然你是白牙的恩人，那这就归你了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After we told him the whole story, he confessed that Bones had helped him a great deal. "Looks like you did Bones a big favor... Well, I'm glad I didn't have to do nothing to ya'll."

With a melancholy look on his face, he handed us a gift that was meant for Bones, saying that we deserved it for what we did.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「白帮的弟兄，我来替你们报仇了！」

通讯切断前，我们只听到这个声明
那名商人的船上，有着超过普通行商的火力，他对着我们展开一阵炮轰，红楼差点支撑不住...
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Bones Brigade, this is for you!!!!"

That was the last thing we heard before the signal cut out. The firepower on that trading vessel was not that of some common peddler. He unleashed a hail of gunfire, and Red Chamber was barely able to make it out.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
当时我没有回应，对于龙脉冲突，
瀛海人的心情其实是复杂的。
最后老人有些失望的摇了头，
转头离去。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I remained silent at the time. Coming from East Ocean, I had my own thoughts about the war.

The old man shook his head in disapproval as he walked away.

nodes.snippet: 你把他帶走
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「那就不要在这里挡路，后面还有很多人在等。」

办事员不想花心思理我们，回头继续和其他事。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Well then, get out of the way. There are people in line."

The man behind the counter didn't want to waste anymore time on us. He turned away and continued on with some other work.

nodes.snippet:
帶走捨不得啊...
小子，家主不能亂說的，誰教你的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「也是，你们光接委托都忙不完了呢。」

经理无奈的离去。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"True. You probably have so much work you'll never finish."

The director looked a bit disappointed as he walked away.

nodes.snippet: ...母親
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「改变主意可以来找我，我们非常缺人。」

专员头也不抬，挥手打发我们，低头继续处理那些数量庞大的申请文书。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Well, if you change your mind, please come back. We need the help."

The woman didn't even look up as she waved us away. She just kept trudging away at the pile of applications in front of her.

...你母親還想保護大家啊？
對，她希望能保護像她一樣的人
像她一樣的人是什麼人
nodes.snippet_CHS:
通讯一端有着细碎的抱怨声，似乎很多崇拜太阳烛龙的信徒常会冒死前来朝圣，导致救援队不堪其扰。

他们给我们补给少量的油，「这够让你们飞到鬼方。」说完就默默离开了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
We heard some mumbled complaints on the other end. Those that worshipped Ignis would risk their lives on pilgrimages that went dangerously close to the sun, and it was clear that it annoyed the rescue crew.

They gave us a little bit of fuel and said, "This is enough to get you to Guifang," before flying off in silence.

nodes.snippet: 哭的人，被欺負的人，像大哥這樣
nodes.snippet_CHS:
察觉红楼的身份，协会的人不仅协助我们修复部分装甲，直说这附近闪焰很频繁，希望能帮到你们，还为我们油量做了一定的补给。

「这是红楼应得的。」他们说。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After learning that we were the Red Chamber crew, they not only repaired some of our armor, but also gave us some fuel after telling us that the solar flares around here were frequent.

"For the Red Chamber, this is the least we could do," they said.

nodes.snippet: 母親說過，家主應該要照顧所有人，才不會有跟她一樣傷心的人

nodes.snippet_CHS:
「烛龙在上，我们很遗憾。」

24时后，电子合同传送了结果，
上面标记了探勘的移动路线，
似乎是挖掘的坑道崩塌，尽管没人伤亡，
但我那次的投资是没有任何回报的。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Ignis above. We're truly sorry."

24 hours later, we got sent the digital contract with the results. On it was the excavation route they had taken.

It appeared one of the tunnels they had dug out collapsed. Luckily no one died, but we didn't make any money on our investment.

nodes.snippet:
少主，我大魁．佛朗...
永遠是你的親衛
nodes.snippet_CHS:
那天我深入龙脉多时，最后的记忆却是躺在医护室，我很自责，但艾妲却叫我不要在意。

探勘多有风险，当年的我面对失败，有时还不能好好自处。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I was in the cave for a long time, and the last thing I remember was waking up in the medical tent. I was pretty hard on myself, but Eda told me not to worry about it.

Excavation has always been a risky endeavor, but when I was younger I was unable to accept failure.

nodes.snippet: 把對講機切斷，別人會擔心呢
nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...
nodes.snippet_EN:
They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.

Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...

nodes.snippet: 快出來
nodes.snippet_CHS:
一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电。

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message: "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."

Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.

nodes.snippet:
可惜，我以為你看到我留下的預告，
就懂該怎麼做了
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们拼命想冲过火网，但是完全逃不出矿联军船射程范围。

最后我只记得一阵白光...
nodes.snippet_EN:
We risked our lives trying to charge through enemy lines, but we were unable to escape the military vessel's range of fire.

The last thing I remember was a blinding white light...

nodes.snippet: 無聊，我不可能背叛少主
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#警告，前方的OPUS-03 龙脉探测船，你已步入了矿联的合法领空

请立即停泊接受检查，若拒绝，我们将有权将你击落#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（龙脉协会提过，矿联对龙脉探测船的盘查，十次有九次是趁机勒索情报跟金钱...该怎么处理？）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the lumen seeking vessel ahead, OPUS-03. You have entered United Mining airspace.

Please allow us to board for an inspection. If you refuse, we are legally authorized to shoot you down.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(The Lumen Association said lumen seeking vessels almost always need to bribe United Mining... What should we do?)

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是龙脉协会的巡逻队，他们询问我们是否需要协助！#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#Do you need help, runner?

According to association regulations, if any member of your crew is a Thousand Peaks citizen, we will provide you with any assistance you need, no questions asked.

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad! They asked if we need any help.#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#

nodes.snippet: 你們好紅呢，連在邊境也四處懸賞
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「所以才不该出事，小鬼啰唆什么」

医生懒得理我们的证明，将红楼慢慢拖回鬼方，艾妲过程中很开心地跟对方聊天，似乎很享受这种互动。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"All the more reason why this shouldn't be happening."

The doctor didn't seem to care, and slowly dragged us back to Guifang. Eda was happily chatting away, almost as if she enjoyed these types of interactions.

nodes.snippet: 退開，饒你一命
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「艾妲，你作为船长，自己要注意点...看在是你们的份上，我会稍微补一些油」

医生一边抱怨，一边将我们拖回鬼方的龙脉协会。

艾妲过程中始终笑着，她觉得医生还是老样子。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Eda, as the captain, you have to pay more attention to these things. Since it's you and the crew... I'll give you some fuel." The doctor pulled us back to Guifang's Lumen Association, complaining the entire trip.

Eda, on the other hand, was smiling, clearly accustomed to the doctor's grumpy attitude.

nodes.snippet:
護著這傢伙幹嘛？
族裡的礦脈就是因為他被徵收殆盡
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「这理由也太烂了...
是看在红的份上，我才帮你这一次」

发现艾妲是因为管理不当，才导致油量不足，医生不满的说，却还是把我们带回安全的地方。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"What a terrible excuse. I'll help you once... for Red."

The doctor was not pleased after she found out that Eda wasn't even able to manage her fuel, but she still towed us to safety.

nodes.snippet:
他是為了你們這些不出頭的傢伙...
拼上命跟王爭取權益！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#你...对...你这叛徒怎么会出现在这里！你不是被我亲手...

你...抱歉我认错人了...你跟当年的公主太像...

那叛徒应该三十几岁了...如果不是她的话...我们就不会灭亡了

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#（胡说八道什么，每天看李莫跟姐姐心情已经很差了，这老人想让我丢进引擎烧掉吗？）

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#菈米亚，在瀛海老人如同书般珍贵，我们可以听听他说什么...#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#You... Yes... it's you! Traitor! How dare you show your face around here! I... I thought I had taken care of you...

Ah! Forgive me, I... I mistook you for someone else. You look just like the princess...

She must be 30 years old by now... maybe more. If it weren't for her, the Rumani Clan would still be here today!

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#(What the hell is he talking about?)

(I'm already mad enough seeing Jun and Eda together. Is this geezer trying to get tossed into the engine?)

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Remi, in East Ocean, the elderly are said to hold more wisdom than any book.

Maybe we should listen to what he has to say?#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#

nodes.snippet: 然後得罪了王害死我們，就讓我把他獻給王，用人頭換回龍脈吧
nodes.snippet_CHS:
印象中菈米亚气得离去，老人却对着我滔滔不绝： 「如果你遇到流亡在外的吉普赛族人，把我们的故事告诉他...公主一人为了爱...宁可陪上全族的性命...」

老人上接不接下气的说着，希望为他的族人留下一点历史，我能体会那种心情。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Remi stormed away, but the elderly man kept on speaking: "If you come across one of the Rumani, please tell them our story... The princess was willing to sacrifice the clan... for her own, selfish love..."

Exasperated, the man hoped to ensure the true history of his clan was known. Given my situation, it wasn't difficult for me to feel for him.

nodes.snippet:
李莫會戴罪立功，
帶回更多龍脈！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
当时我不清楚菈米亚为何如此愤怒，
或许是不愿惹上麻烦，
毕竟在矿业联合的地盘，凡事小心。
nodes.snippet_EN: I wasn't sure why Remi got so upset. Maybe she just didn't want any trouble. After all, in United Mining territory, you had to be extra careful.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（什么东西，这又是在说什么）

算了这种事也轮不到我来问，白军官留给你们的装备，都在第七号码头仓库了#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#Hey, OPUS-03? The lumen seeking vessel? How long you gonna keep us waiting? We've got your container, sign right here.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(What are they talking about?)

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#This is high-quality stuff. You some special squad? What do you need with this...

Whatever... It's not for me to ask. The supplies Officer White left for you are at Port No. 7.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: 大魁請回答
nodes.snippet_CHS:
货柜里面是边境各种查禁的货柜，其中一块角落标记着红楼商船的名称。 以及一封信，内文的字体娟秀

"李莫妈，加油吧，最好动作比我快。 不然黑龙可会被我抢走。 "

那家伙会让我这么怀念，真的不是没有原因。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Inside the massive container were several smaller confiscated containers. One of the corners was marked with Red Chamber's name. There was also an envelope. Inside was surprisingly elegant handwriting.

"Jun, mate. Gotta step it up. I just might have to take Banshee before you do."

There's something about that guy. I miss him, and that's not for no reason.

nodes.snippet_CHS:
尽管当时那么想，但回到红楼停泊的宇宙港时，菈米亚却一个人坐在巨大的货柜之前。

「啐，我退不了，你又做了什么好事。」说完塞了封信给我就转身， 内文的字体娟秀。

"李莫妈，加油吧，最好动作比我快。 不然黑龙可会被我抢走。 "

那家伙会让我这么怀念，真的不是没有原因。
nodes.snippet_EN:
At least that's what I thought. Yet when Red Chamber docked, I found Remi sitting in front of a massive container.

"Tsk... I had no choice. Boy oh boy, what'd you do now?" She then stuffed an envelope into my pocket and turned away. Inside was surprisingly elegant handwriting.

"Jun, mate. Gotta step it up. I just might have to take Banshee before you do."

There's something about that guy. I miss him, and that's not for no reason.

nodes.snippet: 回答！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 回答！
nodes.snippet_EN: 回答！
nodes.snippet_CHT: 回答！
nodes.snippet_JP: 回答！

nodes.snippet: 李莫，大魁的生命指數在下降，怕遇到什麼狀況！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「我的万道是师父教我的，与普遍的信仰不同。」

记得艾妲如此说，我们就离开了当地。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"My master taught me everything I know about Myria. It's different from the commonly accepted, mainstream beliefs."

After leaving the students with that, we left.

nodes.snippet: 該死，發生什麼事了？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「好，那第一课，我们先从种花开始。」

艾妲的第一句话，让副会长跟小孩傻在当地，
我差点忘了她是离开巫塔的女巫...至今我都还记得她上课的内容。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Okay then. So, for the first class... we'll start by planting flowers."

The vice-president and the children didn't know what to make of that. Sometimes I forgot she had left the tower's teachings behind. To this day, I still remember what she taught the students.

nodes.snippet: 沒反應...結構被植物破壞了嗎？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「汇款至下面帐号，感谢您的配合」

对方甚至不需要登船，直接加密信息将私人户头传送过来，打款完成后便快速离去。

我慢慢理解，为什么群山人对矿联多少都有敌意。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Transfer the credits to the account provided. Thank you for your cooperation." Without even boarding the ship, they sent some personal bank account info via an encrypted message.

Once they received the payment, they left immediately. That's when I started to realize why Peakers were so opposed to United Mining.

nodes.snippet: 李莫快點，大魁的生命指數很不穩！
有什麼船會跟鯤的熱源頻譜一樣...
大魁，聽到回答！
發生什麼事了？
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我向太乙求告，希望得到进入这片圣地的许可。
但没有任何回应，或许太乙认为我还没有准备好。
nodes.snippet_EN: I implored Taiyang to grant me permission to enter this sacred ground, but I received no response. Perhaps Taiyang thought I wasn't ready yet.

nodes.snippet: 咳咳！打了場架...而已...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 咳咳！打了場架...而已...
nodes.snippet_EN: 咳咳！打了場架...而已...
nodes.snippet_CHT: 咳咳！打了場架...而已...
nodes.snippet_JP: 咳咳！打了場架...而已...

nodes.snippet: 誰對你動手！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
尽管我什么都没找到，但艾妲也没责怪我，

当时我还不知道艾妲真正寻找的东西，
到底是什么。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Even though I didn't find anything, Eda didn't blame me. 

At that time, I still hadn't found out what she was really looking for.

nodes.snippet: 咳咳！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 由于红楼的通讯阀是老旧的古董，菈米亚花了很多时间希望把两边的讯号接起，但缓不济急，最后错过了节目播出时间。
nodes.snippet_EN: Red Chamber's communication module was basically an antique. Remi spent a lot of time trying to connect the two signals, but it ended up taking too long and we missed the show's broadcast time.

nodes.snippet: 沒事的，我們馬上回太空船
nodes.snippet_CHS: 菈米亚似乎找我们很久，一等到我跟艾妲两人回去时，她除了叫我滚开外，更强烈抱怨艾妲没有听到她的通讯，导致错过了一则采访。
nodes.snippet_EN: Remi seemed to have been looking for us for a long time. As soon as we returned, she told me to get the hell away. But she was even angrier at Eda for not responding to her message and missing some interview.

nodes.snippet: ...啊等等！要命，別動傷口...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
听到我要上赌桌，
菈米亚难得凑在我旁边给了一堆意见，
虽然没有赚到多少，但当下我的确忘了悲伤。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Hearing that I was heading to the betting tables, Remi did something she never did: came to my side and offered me some advice.

We didn't win much, but it definitely made me feel better.

nodes.snippet:
艾妲！大魁受傷了，
需要急救！
nodes.snippet_CHS:
当时我不知道我怎么了， 听到我想赌这么大，艾妲皱了下眉头， 结果真的越输越大，就在我以为要输光的时候...

最后我成功翻了盘， 但赌博这种事，还是少做为妙。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I didn't know what came over me. When Eda heard how much I wanted to bet, she raised her eyebrows. The bets got larger and larger, and just when I thought I was going to lose it all...

My luck turned around and I pulled it together. Still, the less betting the better.

nodes.snippet: 怎麼會，我馬上下去，你們等著！
nodes.snippet_CHS: 尽管菈米亚不满，但紧凑的剧情很快将她的注意力拉走，艾妲更是看得目不转睛，尤其是神明后土说出那悲伤的台词时...
nodes.snippet_EN: Remi wasn't too happy when I sat next to Eda, but the captivating plot soon drew her attention away. Eda was even more focused on the stage, and was visibly affected when Terra spoke those tragic lines...

nodes.snippet: 來不...及了，李莫聽我說...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 就在我寻找位置时，排山倒海的人群将我淹没，等我坐下时，已经远得连舞台都看不见了。
nodes.snippet_EN: As I searched for a seat, a flood of people completed engulfed me. By the time I sat down, I couldn't even see the stage.

nodes.snippet:
是鳶家的刺客...
我猜是第三、第五子合謀的
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲仿佛沉浸在过往的回忆般，闭着眼感应汜气好一阵子，我不好打扰。
之后她只是摇摇头，放弃了探索。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Eda seemed to be lost in memory, as she closed her eyes to resonate with the lumen. I didn't want to interrupt. 

She then shook her head, and stopped exploring.

nodes.snippet: 什麼？
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我没有提出把引魂盘交给对方的要求，现在想想有点后悔
nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't even ask the crew. Thinking back, I regret not doing so.

nodes.snippet: 我趕走他了，你之後要小心...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「果然...我还不能放弃...」 老人露出感激的表情，小心翼翼地将它挂在墙面上，缓缓说起了故事，

「你这尊二向，原本是挂在瀛海传送港的神，在万道信仰中，它负责镇守时空之门...如果够虔诚，迟早你想见的人，就会在门后等你。」 他留下这句若有深思的话，离开了现场。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Just as I thought... I can't give up just yet." A look of appreciation came across the old man's face as he carefully hung the prayer disc on the wall and began telling us his story.

"Ah yes, Binarii... So this was hanging in the East Ocean Interstellar Transport Station. In Myrian belief, Binarii guards the gates of space and time... If you are pious enough, those that you wish to see will wait for you behind those gates." He left us contemplating his abstruse statement.

nodes.snippet: 沒想到連這種邊境也找得到...大概是懸賞的情報造成的...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
信用点才一落款，孩子笑得像花开一样

「妈妈说要把这给愿意帮忙的探勘人。」

他说着给了我们...
nodes.snippet_EN:
As soon as the credits were transferred, the children broke into laughter.

"Mama said to give this to any runner that helps us!" They smiled as one of them handed me something.

nodes.snippet: 咳咳咳...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲转身就离开了，我认为那是她的选择。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda turned around and left without a word. I suppose that was her choice.

nodes.snippet: 要命，看不太到了...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们默默的离开，毕竟也没有线索。
nodes.snippet_EN: Since we had no clues concerning his disappearance, we slipped away.

nodes.snippet: 別說話，我們馬上回船
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「别说傻话了，那精力旺盛的家伙怎么可能死掉？」

一反我的悲伤，护士跟家属反而笑得开心，为了答谢找到线索，家属给了我们些报酬，但我只注意到，家属胸口握得紧紧的录音笔。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Pfffft! Ridiculous! I know James. That bugger has so much damn energy there's no way he's dead."

I felt terrible, but the nurse and his family couldn't stop laughing. To thank me for providing them with the information, the family gave me a small reward. They seemed in high spirits, but I noticed that they were clutching tightly to the recorder.

nodes.snippet: 咳咳...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#长官，上头说精练的步骤，需要依照研讨会的内容修正！我们必须去除意识扰动的现象，提高纯度0.5个百分点

#AVATAR:PMUCitizenA_N##NONAME#研讨会又不是每个人都去，谁知道怎么做...临时修改制程不说清楚，真是够了

铁火之神，谁来告诉我们研讨会的内容吧，只要有数据，要我泄漏多少机密都可以...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#研讨会...这我好像听过...要不要用这机会交换黑龙的相关情报？#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#Sir, the higher-ups said we need to adjust the refinement procedures according to the research presented at the conference!

We've got to remove the interference caused by consciousness and increase the purity by 0.5 percent.

#AVATAR:PMUCitizenA_N##NONAME#We didn't all go to the conference! Who knows how to do that? They can't just tell us to adjust the procedures!

Who can tell us what happened at the conference? I don't care how much top-secret information I need to leak to fix this...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#Conference? I think we went to that... Maybe we should try to get some Banshee intel?#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#

nodes.snippet:
真丟臉...
我算什麼親衛
nodes.snippet_CHS:
对方将大量的货柜送上红楼，
里面是满满的酒水与食物，
作为群山粮食供应商的矿业联合，
这或许才是他们最大的统治武器。
nodes.snippet_EN: They stuffed Red Chamber with containers, most of which were full of alcohol and food. The fact that United Mining was the food supplier for the Peaks was probably their greatest means of control.

nodes.snippet: 別說話
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「没听说有媒体要来这里啊...奇怪」

对方似乎不疑有它，
农场内部的保全不如外面森严
让我们躲过一劫，
幸好没有发现我们的身份。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Hmm... Didn't hear anything about the media coming..."

They didn't think much more about it. The security inside wasn't nearly as intense as outside, and we luckily got by without them discovering our true identities.

nodes.snippet: 少主...你記得
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「愿铁火于星辰闪耀」，对方感激地接受了研讨会的简报，接受艾妲的访问

可惜的是，却没有调查到任何师父与黑龙的情报。对方理解这点，给了我们些信用点作为补偿
nodes.snippet_EN:
"May fire and iron light the stars." The woman eagerly took the presentation and was happy to listen to Eda's request.

Unfortunately, she was unable to find any information on Eda's master or Banshee. Still, the woman was kind enough to give us some credits to thank us.

nodes.snippet: 做事不要太衝動...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲很快的离开了现场，汜精炼的步骤这几年让她觉得恐怖，因为过程逐渐破坏了汜传出的龙鸣声，对她来说像是扼杀了某种灵魂。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda left in a hurry. She was frightened by the progress of lumen refinement procedures in recent years. Since it destroyed the starsongs emitted by the lumen, it seemed to her like something was killed in the process.

nodes.snippet_CHS: 群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有愤怒与天罚的神话，我们终于体会到了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.

That day we were unfortunate enough to experience this firsthand.

nodes.snippet: 還有，別忘了你說過的...
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲向来对这些事没很关切，我们默默就离开了。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda never cared about dealings like this, so we just left in silence.

nodes.snippet: 保護大家，不受欺負
nodes.snippet_CHS:
太可惜了，我们豚鲸商社都是好人，怎么不相信我们呢...
对方说完后，切断了通讯。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Oh what shame, what a shame. The Capybara Merchant Society is filled with nothing but kind souls. How could you not trust us..."

Then the comms system cut off.

nodes.snippet:
找到龍脈...
成為一個好家主...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
一阵令人窒息的沉默后，对方的通讯来电：

「尊贵的矿联一级士官，艾妲女士，请原谅我们打扰您的航行之旅。」

我记得艾妲一脸受不了，还有菈米亚得意的表情。
nodes.snippet_EN:
After a period of suffocating silence, we received a message: "Miss Eda, please forgive us for disturbing the journey of a First Class United Mining Officer."

Eda looked annoyed. Remi, on the other hand, was beaming with self-satisfaction.

nodes.snippet: 好
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我们一度以为侥幸的冲过火网，但是巨大的磁轨炮却从远方狙击而来，我印象只剩一片红色的闪光...
nodes.snippet_EN:
For a while, we thought we had gotten lucky and passed through enemy lines, but a rail cannon sniped us from a distance.

The last thing I remember was a blinding flash of light...

nodes.snippet:
之後的日子裡，我回到了瀛海， 為了打聽白龍的消息，我常往返群山。

偶而會找到真的龍脈，但多半是假的消息， 不是白龍，

nodes.snippet:
至今，我依然想起母親，臨走前跟我說的話。

瀛海第九家族「鳶」
家主李莫
