nodes.snippet: It's been a while since the last time I was here, when I met Jun...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#好久没有回来了...这是遇到李莫的地方...

......

菈米亚还没有跟我们下船吗，是被入港程序困住了？

...啊！这边怎么突然这么多人？

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#应该是有戏剧要公演... 叫做「龙脉长歌」？

这是你们群山文化中的一环吗，想挤进去看看吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#（龙脉长歌描写的是乙皇与后土的爱情故事...我该...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#It's been a while since the last time I was here, when I met Jun...

......

Why isn't Remi here yet? Is she still going through docking procedures?

Hey! Where did all these people come from?

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I think there's going to be some sort of performance, an opera called "Melody of Starsong", or something like that.

I've heard this is real, local Thousand Peaks culture, right?

Should we try to get a seat?

#AVATAR:Girl_Blush#(Helius and Terra's love story... So awkward... Should I...?)

nodes.snippet: Melody of Starsong was a love story, through and through, and it made me a littl
nodes.option: Okay... Let's go.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
龙脉长歌的故事是完全的爱情神话，
这让我有点不适。
但我意外的，是艾妲看得非常投入，
她比我想像中还喜欢这种题材。
nodes.snippet_EN: Melody of Starsong was a love story, through and through, and it made me a little uncomfortable. I was surprised to see Eda fully engaged. I never knew that she liked love stories.
nodes.option_EN: Okay... Let's go.

nodes.snippet: Runners, do you need help...?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Doctor_Enough#探勘人，需要帮忙吗...？ 我还想说是什么紧急落难，需要临时支援...没想到是你们这群头痛的小鬼#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是医生率领的龙脉协会巡逻队，这下获救了！

#AVATAR:Doctor_Angry#听着，虽然依据龙脉公约，只要船队有群山公民，我们都会提供人道支援

但你们最好解释落难的理由，不然绝对把你们丢在小行星带 #EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Doctor_Enough#Runners, do you need help...?

Eh? I thought this was a vessel in distress... Didn't expect it to be you kids.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association Patrol Squad that Doc runs. We're saved!

#AVATAR:Doctor_Angry#Listen, even though association regulations state that we'll help any crew with a Thousand Peaks citizen...

You better tell us why this happened or we're tossing you into the belt.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet: You the transport crew? Put the container in Warehouse Four.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#是运输队吗？请把货柜放在第四号仓库，请遵照秩序，听从分装指示

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，我们真的有必要协助矿业联合做这种货运工作吗

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，我想法不同，竟然我们答应了对方，还是尽量做到吧#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#You the transport crew? Put the container in Warehouse Four.

Please follow protocol and separate the packages according to the instructions.

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, do we really have to help United Mining with these shipping jobs?

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, we already promised them we'd do it. Let's just get it done.#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#

nodes.snippet: Eddie, Red Chamber just got an encrypted message from the Daily Lumen.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#姐姐，红楼频道收到龙脉日报的加密信息

他们为了回避矿业联合的眼线，选择在船只较少的轨道寻找第一手新闻

#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#群山龙脉，川流不止，请轨道上的龙脉探勘人注意，我们是龙脉日报，高价收购各种情报...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#手边有什么情报呢...？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#Eddie, Red Chamber just got an encrypted message from the Daily Lumen.

To avoid being detected by United Mining, they're looking for leads on less crowded orbits.

#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#Lumen of the Peaks, flow without end. This is the Daily Lumen.

Runners in orbit, please note that we will pay a handsome reward for any intel...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#Do we have any intel?

nodes.snippet: "Starting today, the Cave Verification Bureau will be outsourcing work. For part
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#「即日起认证保护局接受外聘人员，请有意愿者于排队线等候」

（矿业联合终于也知道龙脉认证的速度太慢了吗...）

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#后面的上前！你是来申请工作的吗？

愿意的话，就在合约上签名，然后快点开工，待办的龙脉认证文件已经堆积如山了#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#"Starting today, the Cave Verification Bureau will be outsourcing work. For parties who are interested, please line up and wait patiently."

(So United Mining has finally figured out that the verification process is taking too long...)

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerA_N##NONAME#Come forward! Are you here for work?

If so, please sign the contract and let's get to it. The applications are piling up and they're not filling themselves out.#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: Our experience with excavation allowed us to speed through a large number of app
nodes.option: Some work could be good for the crew...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
因为有着龙脉探勘的实地经验，我快速地完成大量申请审查。

但艾妲对于我突然跑去当矿业联合的临时工，只有不满。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Our experience with excavation allowed us to speed through a large number of applications in no time.

Still, Eda was not happy that we were doing work for United Mining.
nodes.option_EN: Some work could be good for the crew...
nodes.option_CHS: 这样多少可以帮助红楼...

nodes.snippet:
"We will not do any work for United Mining!"

Not soon after I had agreed to the
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「别帮矿业联合做任何事！」

我才答应对方没多久，艾妲发现我接下来这差事，直接跟对方理论后将劳动契约终止，弄得双方很不愉快，还付出了违约金。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"We will not do any work for United Mining!"

Not soon after I had agreed to the work, Eda found out and had the contract terminated. Both parties were not happy, and we even had to pay a fee for violating the contract.

nodes.snippet: Things workin' out for you in the Peaks? There's a bunch of unlucky bastards in
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#怎么，在群山的冒险还顺利吗？酒吧里多得是不受命运眷顾的倒霉蛋，

说点你的故事，为自己换杯酒吧

还是手头有急需，那也不要紧，要不要来帮我做点事？

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#（手头有点紧，李莫如果不介意的话，丝洲的工作报酬不会太差）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#Things workin' out for you in the Peaks? There's a bunch of unlucky bastards in the bar that fate just don't seem to care for.

Tell you what. You tell us a tale and I'll pour you a drink.

And if you're short on credits, I got plenty of work around here.

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#(We do need the money... If Jun doesn't mind, the pay in Silk Oasis isn't that bad.)

nodes.snippet: The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer a
nodes.option: (Jun, please...)
nodes.snippet_CHS:
老板领我走下后面的密门，
里面藏着大型的烘干机与切丝机，
那是用来制作私烟的器具，
原来这才是老板真正的收入，
我迅速地协助分装。

事成后对方十分满意，给了我...
nodes.snippet_EN:
The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer and shredder used for making smokeable sticks. It turned out that this was where the real money came from. I helped him package the goods as fast as I could.

After I finished up, the barkeep was quite happy with the results and paid me as he had promised.
nodes.option_EN: (Jun, please...)

nodes.snippet: The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer a
nodes.snippet_CHS:
老板领我走下后面的密门，
里面藏着大型的烘干机与切丝机，
那是用来制作私烟的器具，
原来这才是老板真正的收入，

但因为想到大魁让我不是很专心，
被老板念了一顿...事后我只得到...
nodes.snippet_EN:
The barkeep took me into a secret door around back. Inside was a massive dryer and shredder used for making smokeable sticks. It turned out that this was where the real money came from.

Unfortunately, I couldn't stop thinking about Kay and was unable to focus. The barkeep raised his voice and let me know he wasn't happy with the results. Still, I did get paid.

nodes.snippet:
"Bummer! Well, if you ever need to make a few bucks, just come on back!"

The ba
nodes.option: Sorry, our crew is pretty busy with cave running.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「太可惜了，有需要记得来找我啊！」

老板笑了笑，就回去后面继续工作了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"Bummer! Well, if you ever need to make a few bucks, just come on back!"

The barkeep laughed and went around back to continue working.
nodes.option_EN: Sorry, our crew is pretty busy with cave running.
nodes.option_CHS: 抱歉了，但我们船队还忙着探勘龙脉

nodes.snippet: You're from out of town, aren't you? It's people like you that started the war.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#你外地来的吧？就你们这些人搞什么龙脉冲突...真不想跟你接触...

算了，垃圾山缺工，就不计较那些了，等着解体的废船多著呢，随时都可以上工#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#You're from out of town, aren't you? It's people like you that started the war. Don't really want to get involved with you...

Ah, screw it. There's too many ships that need to be disassembled. You can start working whenever.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: Hey runner, you carry yourself pretty well, and that body of yours ain't too bad
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#那边的探勘家，看你的气质和仪态，应该出身不错吧？

我就是需要你这样的人，有矿联的大人物要来了

我们现在人手不足，帮个忙，我们需要有人...特别服务

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（特别服务...是指什么...）

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#对了...如果你手边有龙参，对这工作会很有帮助。#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Hey runner, you carry yourself pretty well, and that body of yours ain't too bad.

I think you're the exact guy we need. There are some pretty important people from United Mining heading in.

We don't have enough hands onboard to do the job. Basically, we need someone to help us provide some... special services.

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(Special services... What is she getting at?)

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenA_N##NONAME#Ah, yes... If you've got any lumen jinseng on you, it'd help a lot with the job.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: Lumen seeking vessel OPUS-03, Red Chamber. We are searching for a vessel of the
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#OPUS-03-龙脉探测船「红楼」， 本空域正在搜索同型号的探测船

第十六探索分队的女巫「艾琳达」 拒绝服役，并狭持军船逃逸

如果你们是窝藏女巫的同伙，请留心军法审判，还请配合上船搜索！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#姐姐，刚刚确实有引擎的特征掠过我们轨道...

应该是不久前逃过海关的龙脉探测船...

我们该帮他们吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#（够了，害了师父还不够吗？）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#Lumen seeking vessel OPUS-03, Red Chamber. We are searching for a vessel of the same model you are flying.

A witch of the 16th expedition squad, Arrigo, took control of a military vessel and deserted.

If you are hiding her, you will be punished according to military law. Please allow us to dock for an onboard inspection!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#Eddie, we just got some signals indicating that a ship crossed our path...

It was probably the lumen seeking vessel that escaped customs not long ago...

Should we help them out?

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#(Wasn't hurting my master enough?)

nodes.snippet: It's an honor to be graced with the presence of such great members of the associ
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#协会的大红人光临，我倍感荣幸，很想访问你们有没有新的故事，却抽不开身...

龙脉指定法修正案要强行通过，我们打算出特刊，用舆论让矿联知难而退

...但数据太多，人手真的不够...

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#姐姐，让矿业联合难堪的机会呢

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，虽然没有龙脉的情报，但这些人需要帮助

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（难得两人想法一致...但这两人一起安全吗...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountJournalist_N##NONAME#It's an honor to be graced with the presence of such great members of the association.

I would love to interview you, but I'm simply too busy... United Mining is trying to amend the Lumen Mining Act.

We're planning on publishing a special edition, hoping that public opinion will make them back down.

...Unfortunately, we don't have enough people to get it done...

#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#Eddie! We can't give up a chance to catch United Mining with their pants down!

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I know there's no intel involved, but these people need help, Eda.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(Wow... Can't believe they agree. But... are they going to be able to work together?)

nodes.snippet: So, young man, you've come to Ignis No. 2 to test your luck, eh?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#年轻人，你来烛龙二号找运气吗？

我们这里跟一号可不一样，不用你亲自动手，只要你出手如光，一点代价即可

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#今天被委托的探勘团「大荒」，可是小行星带的一流的探勘队

就投资一把，谁知道他们会帮你捞到什么呢？

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#（也太会做生意了吧...这让李莫决定好了。）#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#So, young man, you've come to Ignis No. 2 to test your luck, eh?

We do things differently from Ignis No. 1. You don't have to lift a finger. Just let your fortunes shine and treasures will come.

#AVATAR:BelterBarkeeper_N##NONAME#The excavation squad commissioned to take the cave, Excidium, is one of the best in the belt.

Just invest a little, whatta you say? I'm sure they'll pay you back real nice.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#(Boy, are they slick... I should let Jun decide.)#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: You look like a tough guy... You think you can take on our cave?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#不怕死的，想要挑战我们烛龙矿场...

这里跟二号不同，你可以亲自动手，亲自体验

现在矿场已经挖到100多标准尺深，万道的秘密宝藏就在眼前...谅你不可能不兴奋

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#但凭你这种瘦弱的体格，真的找得到什么有价值的东西吗？

我怕你连50标准尺的深度都下不去了...#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#You look like a tough guy... You think you can take on our cave?

We do things differently from Ignis No. 2. You do all the work yourself, really... soak up the experience.

The mine's already reached 100 standard meters. Secret treasures of Myria await... Exciting, huh?

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantA_N##NONAME#Still... a runt like you... Are you really going to be able to find anything?

I doubt you'll even make it past 50 meters...#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: Eda, do you want to keep exploring? This place has already been discovered.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#艾妲，要继续探索吗，确定是已发现的龙脉

可能不是医生指出的，谣言中的龙脉#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#还没有探索前你怎么会知道，就算不是，你也至少也带点东西回来

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#（这里对我而言， 的确没有探索的意义了...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Eda, do you want to keep exploring? This place has already been discovered.

I don't think this is the rumored cave that the doctor was referring to.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#How would you know? You haven't even gone in yet.

Even if this isn't the one, you can at least try to bring something back.

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#(Jun's right, there's nothing here for me...)

nodes.snippet: I need to do more to help out. This old United Mining sentry station should have
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...我必须帮上艾妲她们，矿业联合的废弃哨站应该能找到飞船的零件

怎么有人...？

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#兄弟，你不像我们龙脉遗族抚恤会的人，如果你是来拾荒的，小心别动到勇士们的英灵

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（是龙脉冲突后，清理战场的拾骨人...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#I need to do more to help out. This old United Mining sentry station should have some spare parts lying around.

Huh? Is someone here?

#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Brother, you don't look like you're from the Relief Foundation.

If you're here to scavenge, don't mess with the spirits of our fallen warriors.

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(It's the people responsible for gathering the remains of soldiers from the battlefields of war...)

nodes.snippet: E...d-d-d-da... The s-situation isn't l-l-looking too good... The closer I get t
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#艾...妲妲妲，状状状..况不太...稳，我越越越靠近信标...通讯干扰就...越严重...继续续续任务吗...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#姐姐，战前的信标一直发送错误讯号，严重干扰通讯

我虽然不在乎瀛海人消失在太空，但这会影响红楼的航道计算， 要处理吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#当然要处理，不然李莫会有危险！
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#E...d-d-d-da... The s-situation isn't l-l-looking too good... The closer I get to the beacon... the w-worse the interference...

Should I c-c-continue...?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Serious#Eddie, the pre-war beacon keeps sending out error signals. It's creating serious interference.

I don't care if the Oceaner gets lost in space, but that's gonna mess up our navigation. Should we take care of it?

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#Of course we should take care of it! Otherwise, Jun's going to be in serious danger!

nodes.snippet: ...Eda... C-C-Can you h-hear me? W-W-Weird... What's with the interference?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...艾妲...听到到到吗，奇怪...怎么...突然有有有有电磁干扰？#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#系统留言启动： ...群山的游击队，你们以为自己赢了吗...和我们一起困在这个哨站吧...

启动自动拦截系统，发射倒数...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（糟了，难怪会有干扰电波...这应该是冲突时期的自动防御系统...）

（放任不管可能让红楼被攻击， 没时间了！ ）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...Eda... C-C-Can you h-hear me? W-W-Weird... What's with the interference?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:PMUComputer_N##NONAME#System message activated: ...Guerillas of the Peaks... Did you think you'd won? How about sticking around the sentry station with us?

Initiating automatic spaceship interceptor...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(Crap! This must be some auto-defense system from the war...)

(Red Chamber is going to get attacked! I've got to do something!)

nodes.snippet:
Eda, can you hear me?
The computers at the trade station keep displaying garbled
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#艾妲，你听得到吗？

信贷所交易室的计算机持续显示乱码，电磁辐射快超过标准值了

辐射一直...一直在升高，我不知道这里发生什么事#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#姐姐，李莫又来报告状况了，他说辐射一直在升高

我觉得废空间站没什么道理发生这事，建议他继续执行任务

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（听起来有点异常， 要放弃这探索机会吗？ ）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Eda, can you hear me? The computers at the trade station keep displaying garbled code.

Also, the electromagnetic radiation levels is getting dangerously high.

I don't know what happened here... But it won't stop rising.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#Eddie, Jun's back with his problems again. He says the radiation keeps rising.

I don't see why that'd be happening here, though. Tell him to keep going.

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(Hmm... That doesn't sound right. Should we just give up?)

nodes.snippet: Jun here. The exploration is just about done. I'm preparing to head back to Red
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#这里是李莫，探索的任务差不多了，这里准备回到红楼。

......

艾妲，听得到吗？

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#李莫？你还在在在...线上吗？

5标准分前，电磁风暴暴暴...干扰突然增强，红楼定位不到你的讯讯号！#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#该死，这里的电磁风暴在干扰通讯，红楼完全联系不上...怎么办？

要自己试着回去吗...#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Jun here. The exploration is just about done. I'm preparing to head back to Red Chamber.

......

Eda, can you hear me?

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#Jun? Are y-y-you still... online?

The storm... started going crazy 5 minutes ago. The interference is getting w-w-worse! We can't locate your s-signal!#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Damn it, the storm is interfering with the signal. I can't get a hold of Red Chamber. What should I do?

Should I try and get back on my own? #AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#

nodes.snippet: By the blessings of Helius, just the man I need.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#乙皇赐福，给我遇见大人物了，你是红楼船队的李莫...

来这里刚好...能不能帮我们看看这土壤发生什么事？

#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#龙脉协会委托整修这里...但这老精炼厂被矿联破坏的乱七八糟了

脉象乱成一团...土质跟水质根本分析不来啊...

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，精炼厂应该是建立在龙脉上，探勘是我的强项，可以帮忙

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#重点是寻找龙脉，前往朝山吧， 别浪费时间#AVATAR:Girl_Think#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#By the blessings of Helius, just the man I need.

Jun, of the Red Chamber crew, right?

Perfect timing. Could you give us a hand and help us figure out what happened to this soil?

#AVATAR:MountWorkerA_N##NONAME#The Lumen Association was commissioned to fix the whole joint, but United Mining really screwed up this old refinery.

The pulse of the lumen is a mess... Can't even get a reading on the soil or the water...

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, the refinery is probably built on a lumen cave. With my excavation skills, I'm sure I could help.

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#We're looking for caves. Let's head to Mt. Aurora and quit wasting time here.#AVATAR:Girl_Think#

nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Soul_N##NONAME#......

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#看来这里是以前瀛海的矿场，龙脉的储存量应该很大

到今天都有汜的余光...

希望有一天，我也能发掘这样的龙脉...

#AVATAR:Soul_N##NONAME#......

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（...这些光点为什么一直围绕我？）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Soul_N##NONAME#......

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Looks like an old East Ocean cave. It must've had large reserves of lumen...

The glow of lumen still lingers even after all this time...

I hope that one day I'll find a cave like this...

#AVATAR:Soul_N##NONAME#......

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(Why are these lights surrounding me?)

nodes.snippet: Eddie, be careful. You don't have much time left in there... Hurry up and come b
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，小心点，探索时间没剩多久...早点回到红楼吧#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad##OUTFITS:Girl_SpaceSuit#我知道...就回去了

......

（以前每天都要来对后土祈祷，照着歌本唱颂...）

（渐渐早课人变少， 大家都去打仗...）

（我也变成走了运...因为缺陷不用打仗的孩子...）

#AVATAR:Soul_N##NONAME#......

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2##OUTFITS:Girl_SpaceSuit#...什么东西，这里怎么会有汜的灵光？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, be careful. You don't have much time left in there... Hurry up and come back to the ship.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Sad##OUTFITS:Girl_SpaceSuit#I know... I'm coming.

......

(I used to pray to Terra every day, singing from the hymnal...)

(Then the morning class grew smaller and smaller. Everyone had gone to war.)

(But my disability made sure I wasn't one of them...)

#AVATAR:Soul_N##NONAME#......

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2##OUTFITS:Girl_SpaceSuit#...What's the lumen doing here?

nodes.snippet: Finally... I found it. My clan's residence from when they were still in the Peak
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#找到了...是家族当年在群山的领主室

...应该是匆忙中被抄的吧，东西感觉被查过一轮，乱成这样

荣耀的鸢家，不该如此...
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Finally... I found it. My clan's residence from when they were still in the Peaks.

...It must have been raided. The whole place looks like it was turned upside down.

A fate such as this should not have befallen a clan as honorable as ours.

nodes.snippet: Those marks on the tunnel walls... It looks like there was a gunfight.
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#前方的坑道里，都是些打斗痕迹和弹痕...可恶，没法判断何时留下的，该继续前进吗？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#Those marks on the tunnel walls... It looks like there was a gunfight.

But I can't tell when it happened... Should I keep going?

nodes.snippet: Hold it, scavenger. You've entered asteroid belt territory, and this is the sacr
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#别动，这位拾荒人 你已经进入小行星阵线的地盘了 这边是兄弟们神圣的墓碑 立刻放下你手边的拾荒器材，离开这里

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（这里是游击队的地盘，这下麻烦了。 他感觉是在清理过去战争的遗物...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterVeteransA_N##NONAME#Hold it, scavenger. You've entered asteroid belt territory, and this is the sacred graveyard of our fallen brothers.

Put down whatever you've got on you and leave immediately.

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(Oh no... Guerilla fighters. It looks like they're cleaning up the remnants of some battle...)

nodes.snippet: I'm getting an abnormal communication request. It's coming from a ship inside th
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#收到了异常的通讯要求，来源在是废墟之中的船...船籍...

是应该已经灭亡的...吉普赛家族...

#AVATAR:BelterMissionaryA_N##NONAME#愿酒神与银河诸神同在...谢谢你们接受通讯，我是吉普赛家族的遗民，公主的随从，席雅。

我们已经流亡了数年，如今年纪够大，再也躲不了矿业联合的追杀...

想回来这里求安息，相见有缘，不知道能不能答应我们最后的请求...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#姐姐，吉普赛家族是十六年前，假同盟之名，试图暗杀矿业联合失败的势力，作风反覆，不一定可信...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#...看起来不像坏人
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_AngryNervous#I'm getting an abnormal communication request. It's coming from a ship inside the ruins...

It's from the Rumani Clan... but I thought they had all disappeared long ago...

#AVATAR:BelterMissionaryA_N##NONAME#May the god of wine bring merriment to the pantheon of deities... Thank you for receiving this message.

This is Shiyaa of the Rumani Clan, servant to the princess.

We have been on the run for many years. At this age, I am unable to continue fleeing from United Mining's assassins...

I wanted to return here to end my days in peace. It must be fate that we have met.

Would you be so kind as to fulfill my final request?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Eddie, 16 years ago, the Rumani Clan pretended to be United Mining's ally in order to attempt an assassination.

I'm not sure they can be trusted...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#...She doesn't look like a bad person.

nodes.snippet: The tunnel is blocked... I'd better take another path.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#这坑道堵住了... 换条路走好了

等等...坑道另一头有声音？

喂！那边有人吗？

#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#大家振作点，有人来了。 喂！这边！

我们是龙脉协会协会编号347的探勘团「流浪节拍」，被困在坑道另一头了。

你那边有组气阀面板，压在石堆中。照我们指示释放汜气，应该能炸开通道。 帮个忙吧！#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#The tunnel is blocked... I'd better take another path.

Wait... is that someone on the other side?

Hey! Is someone in there?

#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#Okay everybody, pull yourselves together. Someone's here!

Hey! Over here!!

We're the Lumen Association's 347th excavation party, Nomadic Rhythm. We got trapped on the other side of the tunnel.

The control panel for the lumium valves is trapped under all those rocks. We'll tell you how to release more lumium.

That should be able to blow open the tunnel. Please, help!#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: Hey Oceaner, this is an old United Mining and Rumani Clan battleground.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#瀛海人听好，这边是吉普赛家族跟矿业联合的旧战场，目标是要探索龙脉矿场有没有飞船可用的零件。#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#我知道...但前面废墟通道坍塌了，剩下的空间根本过不去

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#我觉得有点危险，李莫，你还是放弃任务，早点回来吧#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#（该怎么做比较好...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#Hey Oceaner, this is an old United Mining and Rumani Clan battleground.

Go see if there are any usable parts in there. Got it?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#...Sure. But the passageway ahead has completely collapsed. There's no way I can get through.

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#It looks dangerous. Jun, forget the mission and head back.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#(What should I do...?)

nodes.snippet: The electrical lab for the processing plant. Great, there must plenty of spare p
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#是加工厂的电子实验室，太好了，这应该会有很多红楼的零件...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_N#
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#The electrical lab for the processing plant. Great, there must plenty of spare parts lying around here...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio##AVATAR:Girl_N#

nodes.snippet: The path ahead is blocked off by the main gate.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#前方的路被大门挡住了

这个锁头是被故意破坏的吧？恐怕得把整个门拆下来才过得去...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#太危险了，李莫，只是个废弃矿场，不会是黑龙，不需要去特别探索

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#...我以为他的任务就是协助探索

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#是在不出生命危险的情况下，协助探索#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#The path ahead is blocked off by the main gate.

Was this lock broken on purpose? I think we'll have to tear down the door to get past...#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Serious#It's too dangerous, Jun. This is just an abandoned cave.

If it isn't Banshee, we don't need to explore that far.

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#...I thought he was supposed to do the exploring.

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#Yes. When it's not so dangerous that Jun might lose his life.#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#

nodes.snippet: A Koomsung stronghold... They were once such a powerful faction, but the war has
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#有名金城舰队基地，在冲突后也只剩下被炸毁的废墟了吗...
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuit#A Koomsung stronghold... They were once such a powerful faction, but the war has left nothing but pulverized ruins.

nodes.snippet: Tsk... Someone found us...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##NONAME#啐，居然会被人看见...

喂！你是哪条道上的？龙脉协会认可的探勘家，还是跟我一样的自由探勘人？

干嘛一脸惊讶，不过就是破坏龙穴而已，谁不是这样干

难道你想抓我吗？#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterManA_N##NONAME#Tsk... Someone found us...

Hey! You with the Lumen Association? Or are you free runners, like us?

What's with that face? We're just blasting a few holes to get to the good stuff! That's how everyone does it!

What, you gonna do something about it?#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: Who the hell's there? Not the Lumen Association again? What're we gonna do with
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#该死谁来了，又是龙脉协会吗？这些花怎么办...

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#贵重的文物带走就好，那些再采，大不了用买的也行，走了！

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我不是龙脉协会，我只是探勘人...

......

...跑这么快，算了这些盗采者走了也好

留下的这些这奇怪货柜又是什么...
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:BelterRefugees_N##NONAME#Who the hell's there? Not the Lumen Association again? What're we gonna do with these flowers...

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantB_N##NONAME#Take the documents! We can pick them later... or buy them! Let's go!

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#We're not with the Lumen Association, we're just runners...

......

Geez, those robbers got out of here quick. I suppose it's good that they left.

I wonder what's in these strange containers they left behind...

nodes.snippet: Looks like a fight broke out here... there are even traces of explosives.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#这是...爆破和打斗的痕迹...
有人想直接炸开龙门...盗采者还在里面吗？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Looks like a fight broke out here... there are even traces of explosives.

Someone was trying to blow the Myrian gate open... I wonder if the pirates are still inside?

nodes.snippet:
Why hello there, stranger.
By the looks of your outfit, you must be a part of th
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#陌生的探勘人，您好

看服装，你应该是红楼团成员吧？我看过龙脉协会的报告，你们不简单啊

这个龙穴的规模超乎预期，你愿意协助我们的考古研究吗？

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#您是...德拉格雷？探险世家罗登最著名的领队...您居然听过我们的名字， 真是太荣幸了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:YingManA_N##NONAME#Why hello there, stranger. By the looks of your outfit, you must be a part of the Red Chamber crew.

I've seen your Lumen Association reports. Quite a crew you've got there... quite a crew.

This cave is way bigger than we expected. Would you, by any chance, want to help out with some archaelogical research?

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_SpaceSuitHelmetOff#Are you... Lagrée? The leader of the Rodin expedition party... I can't believe you've heard of us. What an honor.

nodes.snippet: #AVATAR:TowerStaff_N##NONAME##AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:TowerStaff_N##NONAME#（未完）外地女巫组成的探勘队伍，她们在龙穴中因为坍方受困，需要李莫支援#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:TowerStaff_N##NONAME##AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: The ground... it's shaking... Koris! What are you doing?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#整个地板...都在震动，图鲁斯你做了什么？

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#我没有啊，我只是在测试机器，谁知道风水机关就动起来了！

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#这些朝山来的大学生在干什么，想炸掉龙穴吗？
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantB_N##NONAME#The ground... it's shaking... Koris! What are you doing?

#AVATAR:BelterMerchantC_N##NONAME#Eh? Nothing! I'm just trying out the machine. Who knew the transmutation engine would start up?

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#What are these college students from Mt. Aurora doing? Are they trying to blow up the cave?

nodes.snippet: Is there something... flowing through these walls of lumenite? Are the lights pl
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#汜晶岩壁里，有东西在...流动？
光线的错觉吗？不对，那是...活的？
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Is there something... flowing through these walls of lumenite? Are the lights playing tricks on me? No, it's alive...

nodes.snippet: That's weird. The eco-scanner is working on the other plants, so it isn't broken
nodes.snippet_CHS: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#奇怪，辨识其他植物都正常，生态扫描器没坏啊...难不成水池里的是新品种吗？
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#That's weird. The eco-scanner is working on the other plants, so it isn't broken. Is this... a new species in the pond?

nodes.snippet: (What luck... running into United Mining now... I'm just going to try and slip a
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（怎么这么不巧，在这里遇到矿联的人... 小心的撤吧，别给他们发现）

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#那边是民间探勘人吗？ 没事，这回我们不想逮捕你。

你来得正好，我们要把这扇龙门炸了。 那边墙上的凹槽，你帮我们去把炸药装进去。

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（那个高度...是想要我代替你们冒险吗？）#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(What luck... running into United Mining now... I'm just going to try and slip away without letting them see me.)

#AVATAR:PMUSoldierA_N##NONAME#A civilian lumen seeking vessel? Don't worry, we're not going to arrest you this time.

Perfect timing. We're going to blow that Myrian gate open, but we don't have anyone to help us place the explosive.

Do us a favor and place the bomb in that groove up there.

#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(How high is that? You want me to risk my life for you?)#AVATAR:Man_N##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#

nodes.snippet: To commemorate the 6th anniversary of the end of the Lumen War, the troupe perfo
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#（广播）纪念龙脉冲突终战六周年，龙脉长歌赈灾义演

本次是龙脉长歌贰部曲「天地无歌」，是群山巡回的第四场...

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#龙脉长歌，这应该是继上次的贰部曲

你们还不快点坐下，要没位置了！

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐我坐下了，但我真不懂这剧有什么好看..

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（是上次艾妲看得蛮开心的 神话剧...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#To commemorate the 6th anniversary of the end of the Lumen War, the troupe performing "Melody of Starsong" will be holding a disaster relief charity benefit.

Today's performance is the second act, "Songless Heaven, Songless Earth".

This will be their 4th performance from the Thousand Peaks tour...

#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#Melody of Starsong! This must be the next part of the story!

Come on! Hurry up and sit down, or all the seats are going to get taken!

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Uh, okay? I'm sitting, but I don't know what's so great about this opera.

#AVATAR:Man_Smile##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(It's that opera that Eda was really into...)

nodes.snippet: Myria neverlasting, may Helius' blessings be upon you...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:YingBoyA_N##NONAME#万道无常，乙皇赐福...你们是龙脉探勘人吗？

行行好，照顾我们这群可怜的孩子，舍我们点吧

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#艾妲，我们必须帮助这些人

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#别管闲事，群山到处都这些事，你管不完的

就算你捐款，钱也只会落到他们背后的集团#AVATAR:Girl_N#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:YingBoyA_N##NONAME#Myria neverlasting, may Helius' blessings be upon you...

You're cave runners, aren't you? Please, could you spare us some credits?

#AVATAR:Man_Determined##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#Eda, we must help these children.

#AVATAR:Sister_Complained#Just ignore 'em. Kids like them are everywhere in the Peaks.

Any credits you give them will just go straight to their bosses.#AVATAR:Girl_N#

nodes.snippet: Patient 425 has gone missing again. It's James... That bastard and his adventure
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#425病床的病人又不见了，又是詹姆斯，这该死的探险家，下次来个人把他绑住！

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#詹姆斯，我好像在龙脉协会的探勘名人中...看过这名字

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#詹姆斯・王，一个喜欢在探险过后的龙脉，留下录音笔的探勘人，很有名的神经病#AVATAR:Girl_N#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountMerchantA_N##NONAME#Patient 425 has gone missing again. It's James... That bastard and his adventures. Next time, tie him to the damn bed!

#AVATAR:Man_Serious##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#James... I think I've seen that name in the Lumen Association's hall of fame...

#AVATAR:Sister_Ignored#James Wong, a cave runner who loves leaving behind recordings of himself after he explores a cave.

He's famous alright... a famous nutjob.#AVATAR:Girl_N#

nodes.snippet: Eddie, there's a huge ship in front of us...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#姐姐，前方有一艘巨大的船体...

他们的热源频谱跟电磁风暴的周期太像...我一时没有辨认出来！

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#...二向无常，敬告前方的船只，是否是乘坐瀛海人的龙脉探测船？#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#找李莫？但通缉应该解除了才对...
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#Eddie, there's a huge ship in front of us...

Their infrared pattern is almost the same as the electromagnetic storm... I didn't notice them until now!

#AVATAR:BelterCitizenB_N##NONAME#Neverlasting paths. Vessel ahead, may I inquire whether this is the lumen seeking vessel with the East Oceaner aboard?#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#Jun? I thought the bounty has been terminated...

nodes.snippet: Warning: Incoming solar flare from star Ignis arriving in 5 minutes.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#警告，来自烛龙的恒星闪焰， 即将于5标准分后抵达

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#姐姐！烛龙要喷发了，要怎么处理！

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#（烛龙的闪焰不只会瘫痪电子装置，还会让汜气引擎不正常共振...我该...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Computer_N##NONAME#Warning: Incoming solar flare from star Ignis arriving in 5 minutes.

#AVATAR:Sister_Panic#Eddie! Ignis is gonna blow! Whatta we do?

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous3#(A solar flare will paralyze the electrical equipment and cause the lumium engine to malfunction...)

nodes.snippet: Well, well. The witch of the Red Chamber. What brings you here? Isn't your missi
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:MountTheTenB_N#好呀，红楼船队的女巫，你怎么会来到这里，去执行你任务重要点吧？

算了这次在孩子面前，不说你们了

我们正在上一堂万道课，愿意与孩子们分享你心中的万道吗，见多识广的你，眼中的龙脉想必与我们不同

#AVATAR:Girl_Surprised#（这不是十人会的副会长吗？原来他是这里的院长...）

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#（原来他是这样的人...我错怪他了）

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#（都是战后孤儿，作为女巫，这群孩子接受得了我吗...）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:MountTheTenB_N#Well, well. The witch of the Red Chamber. What brings you here? Isn't your mission more important?

Hmph. Since the children are here, I won't say any more.

We are holding a class on Myria. Would you like to share your thoughts with the kids?

Surely your wealth of experience with lumen gives you a unique perspective on it.

#AVATAR:Girl_Surprised#(Isn't he the vice-president for the Council of Ten? What's he doing working as the dean?)

#AVATAR:Man_Nervous##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#(I never thought he'd be doing something like this. I guess I was wrong about him...)

#AVATAR:Girl_Think2#(These children are all orphans of the war. I'm a witch... Are they even going to be able to accept me?)

nodes.snippet: "That's a gas planet, not Earth. It looks like the terrestial planets of this so
nodes.option: Um... West Mount Tonitrus?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「...这是气体行星，不是地球，这个太阳系的类地行星，好像很久之前就消灭了。」

机器人哀伤的说着「但为了感谢你，这个送你！」

他打起精神拿了一个模型给我，那是...
nodes.snippet_EN:
"That's a gas planet, not Earth. It looks like the terrestial planets of this solar system disappeared long ago!"

The robot was clearly upset, but perked up to thank us, handing us a little model as he said, "Here! This is for you!"
nodes.option_EN: Um... West Mount Tonitrus?

nodes.snippet: The signal got sent and the ship disappeared from our radar. We never saw them a
nodes.option: Pose as a civilian ship and tell them they've mistaken us for someone else.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号一拍过去，
对方的船体就消失于雷达之中，
再也没有回来。
nodes.snippet_EN: The signal got sent and the ship disappeared from our radar. We never saw them again.
nodes.option_EN: Pose as a civilian ship and tell them they've mistaken us for someone else.
nodes.option_CHS: 变造自己讯号为民间船，并告知对方认错人了

nodes.snippet: As a witch, Eda made it a point to get involved with incidents like this. She ha
nodes.option: Get in contact with the slums' consul to try and help.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
艾妲因为女巫的身份，觉得自己一定得管这件事，她要求菈米亚将船的编码转成万道烛龙商会，
以承诺未来会有补给为条件，让贫民窟的人重新接受了难民。

对方没什么能答谢我们，但坚决感谢船队的她给了...
nodes.snippet_EN:
As a witch, Eda made it a point to get involved with incidents like this. She had Remi send the ship ID to the Myrian Ignis Guild and promised the slums supplies if they would take them back.

They didn't have much to thank us with, but they insisted on giving us what they could.
nodes.option_EN: Get in contact with the slums' consul to try and help.

nodes.snippet: The security on the service vessel broadcasting the signal wasn't very complicat
nodes.option: Well, they shouldn't be forcing all these ads on us. Let them have it, Remi.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
发送讯号的业务船安检并不复杂，菈米亚很快的黑入了「兔窟二」，没两下就找到了兔窟最宝贵的神秘歌手数据。

数据一出来后，艾妲却愣住了，那原来是...
nodes.snippet_EN:
The security on the service vessel broadcasting the signal wasn't very complicated. It wasn't long before Remi hacked into Rabbit Hole Newswire and got the information on their mysterious singer.

The information popped up and Eda stared at the screen, suprised at what she saw.
nodes.option_EN: Well, they shouldn't be forcing all these ads on us. Let them have it, Remi.
nodes.option_CHS: ...谁叫他们到处盖台，就照你說的做

nodes.snippet: Our modified signal worked, and they were convinced we were scammers just like t
nodes.option: Pretend like we're one of them to figure out if they're trying to trick us.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们成功模拟了伪造讯号。
对方不疑有他，当我们是自己人，
得意地聊着他们这趟又骗了多少探勘人。

「这些没荣誉的骗子！」

我记得我骂出的话。菈米亚却好像习以为常。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Our modified signal worked, and they were convinced we were scammers just like them. Given that we were one and the same, they happily chatted with us about how many runners they'd tricked on this trip alone.

"Those dishonorable liars!!!" I was visibly upset that someone could do such a thing. But Remi, she acted like she'd seen it a million times.
nodes.option_EN: Pretend like we're one of them to figure out if they're trying to trick us.
nodes.option_CHS: 先伪装成同业，确认他们是不是骗子

nodes.snippet: They were hidden amid some space debris, but Eda was able to locate them almost
nodes.option: Let's use the reso-scanner to locate the vessel and avoid an attack.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
尽管隐身在宇宙垃圾群中，
红楼却瞬间捕捉了对方的位置，
这信息让我们快速的远离他们追踪的航道

尽管那时没说，但我却理解了活体雷达的意思
nodes.snippet_EN:
They were hidden amid some space debris, but Eda was able to locate them almost immediately. That allowed us to quickly put some distance between us and them.

I didn't bring it up... but that's when I understood what people meant by "human radar".
nodes.option_EN: Let's use the reso-scanner to locate the vessel and avoid an attack.
nodes.option_CHS: 以防万一被攻击，先用龙脉共振仪找出对方船的位置

nodes.snippet: When they realized we were with the military, they couldn't seem to wrap their h
nodes.option: Remi's right. Let's pose as a military vessel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方发现我们原来也是矿业联合军，尽管不解却放我们走了。
nodes.snippet_EN: When they realized we were with the military, they couldn't seem to wrap their heads around it, but they let us go.
nodes.option_EN: Remi's right. Let's pose as a military vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 相信菈米亚...发送伪造的军船讯号

nodes.snippet: To make sure we didn't set off any anti-theft mechanisms, Remi tested it with mu
nodes.option: Send out a signal and see if the automated response is working.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
以防触发任何防盗机构，菈米亚修改了通讯编码后试探多次，没回应后才打捞起来。

那是龙脉盗采遗失的走私货，但不知道哪位糊涂的家伙，遗忘了维生装置在里面，才会发出警讯...
nodes.snippet_EN:
To make sure we didn't set off any anti-theft mechanisms, Remi tested it with multiple modified signals. After we didn't get a response, we pulled the container in.

It turned out to be a smuggling container that some illegal excavators lost. Some bumbling pirate had left their life support device inside, so it started emitting a warning signal...
nodes.option_EN: Send out a signal and see if the automated response is working.
nodes.option_CHS: 先发送讯号过去，看自动询答器还能不能运作

nodes.snippet: The parade began, and the Lumen Association took the stage, praising the role th
nodes.option: We've got the shipment of food you're looking for.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
游行盛大的开始，龙脉协会也上台致词，感谢龙脉指定法带来的和平荣景，看到民众欢喜的表情，跟我认识的矿业联合实在很冲突。

当天结束后是忙碌的庆功宴，粮食组除了交货金额，还发一份当天投影的历史剧影碟。 当然，艾妲没有参加。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The parade began, and the Lumen Association took the stage, praising the role the Lumen Mining Act played in establishing peace for the Peaks. Seeing the happy looks on the people's faces was a stark contrast to the United Mining that I knew.

After a day of hard work, there was a celebration dinner. The catering crew was not only given decent pay, we were also given a copy of the history drama that was played that day. Eda did not participate, of course.
nodes.option_EN: We've got the shipment of food you're looking for.
nodes.option_CHS: 你们的粮食货柜我们带来了

nodes.snippet: We still had quite the journey ahead of us, so we calculated a new route that av
nodes.option: Oh, cut it out. Just get out of orbit.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
毕竟还有路要赶，红楼算出新航道，
无视了混乱成一团的轨道，
事后听说有发生几起碰撞意外，
只希望无人伤亡。
nodes.snippet_EN: We still had quite the journey ahead of us, so we calculated a new route that avoided the chaotic orbit. Later on, we heard that more than a few collisions occurred. I hope there weren't any casualties.
nodes.option_EN: Oh, cut it out. Just get out of orbit.
nodes.option_CHS: 别说闲话，避开轨道就好

nodes.snippet: After realizing it was their mistake, they muttered a few sarcastic remarks and
nodes.option: Trust in Remi. Pose as a military vessel and try to bluff your way though.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
判断是自己人，对方髓口几句挖苦，
就放我们通行了。

「想不到，上面还没把这种龙脉探测船淘汰」
「小心别点火，不然引擎自己爆炸啊」
nodes.snippet_EN:
After realizing it was their mistake, they muttered a few sarcastic remarks and let us go.

"Hmm? I'm surprised the higher-ups haven't gotten rid of all those old lumen seeking vessels yet."

"Don't start the engines, you might blow yourselves up."
nodes.option_EN: Trust in Remi. Pose as a military vessel and try to bluff your way though.
nodes.option_CHS: 相信菈米亚，装成军用船混过去

nodes.snippet: Suspicious that we weren't who we said we were, they requested Red Chamber to se
nodes.option: Send them a modified signal and pretend to be a United Mining vessel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 似乎是怀疑我们的身份，对方重复要求红楼送出讯号，尽管最后放行了我们，但要躲着矿业联合的眼睛探勘，果然不是太容易的事。
nodes.snippet_EN: Suspicious that we weren't who we said we were, they requested Red Chamber to send out another signal. Although they eventually let us go, avoiding the prying eyes of United Mining was more difficult than I'd imagined.
nodes.option_EN: Send them a modified signal and pretend to be a United Mining vessel.
nodes.option_CHS: 发送伪造讯号，让他们以为是矿业联合船舰

nodes.snippet: Remi sent out a modified signal, and it worked, but they weren't totally convinc
nodes.option: Try to convince them we're civilian spies working for the military.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
菈米亚发出了伪造的编码，
尽管成功，但对方怀疑心不减，
要求以协助检查设备，强制拜访，

我还记得艾妲一边跟对方介绍红楼，
一边隐忍着愤怒的样子。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Remi sent out a modified signal, and it worked, but they weren't totally convinced. So, they pretended like they would help us check our equipment and forced us into an inspection.

As Eda showed them around Red Chamber, she did her best to hide her fury.
nodes.option_EN: Try to convince them we're civilian spies working for the military.
nodes.option_CHS: 试着欺骗我们是军方的民间卧底

nodes.snippet: We succeeded in buying Arrigo some time, but the second crew continued the chase
nodes.option: Let them come aboard to buy her some time.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我们的确拖了点时间，但对方第二队却持续追捕。
不久后，我于龙脉日报看到判处重刑的女巫新闻，有好阵子艾妲连话都不想说。
nodes.snippet_EN: We succeeded in buying Arrigo some time, but the second crew continued the chase. Not long after, I read in the Daily Lumen about a witch being charged with serious offenses. After hearing about it, Eda was so upset that she didn't speak for days.
nodes.option_EN: Let them come aboard to buy her some time.
nodes.option_CHS: 让他们上船盘查，拖对方时间

nodes.snippet: The Red Chamber was able to send over the message immediately. To thank us for h
nodes.option: You can use our ship as a relay station. No problem.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 红楼成功在第一时间把讯号传给了协会，龙脉日报的特派员为了感谢我们，将一个手上重要的线报给了我们，那是龙脉的情报。
nodes.snippet_EN: The Red Chamber was able to send over the message immediately. To thank us for helping out, the correspondent gave us one of her valuable leads, which turned out to be some lumen intel.
nodes.option_EN: You can use our ship as a relay station. No problem.
nodes.option_CHS: 我们的船可以借你们当中继站

nodes.snippet: Using a forged military visa, Remi was able to get into the backend of their sys
nodes.option: Just do something, anything!
nodes.snippet_CHS:
靠着伪装的军用签证，
菈米亚竟然成功摸进了对方后台，
没多久就瘫痪了对方的无线讯号，
更从对方的系统中摸出了一份机密档案。
nodes.snippet_EN: Using a forged military visa, Remi was able to get into the backend of their system, and their wireless signal was soon paralyzed. She even managed to pull out a top-secret file from one of their folders.
nodes.option_EN: Just do something, anything!

nodes.snippet: Our journey was put on hold as the inspection crew turned Red Chamber upside dow
nodes.option: Let them stop and inspect the ship.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
红楼的航程被耽搁，船舱搜查队被翻得乱七八糟。
对方开了一张收据，
要求为「巡逻队额外出勤服务」付钱。

我还记得艾妲隐忍着愤怒的样子
nodes.snippet_EN:
Our journey was put on hold as the inspection crew turned Red Chamber upside down. The captain then wrote us an invoice for "Unspecified Patrol Squad Services".

I still remember how hard it was for Eda to hide her fury.
nodes.option_EN: Let them stop and inspect the ship.

nodes.snippet: I didn't think Eda would be able to handle it that well. Later, I found out that
nodes.option: Then leave the airspace immediately.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我没想到艾妲忍得住这口气，直到后来知道，
原来特许成立的79统合新闻台后台强硬，
和他们起冲突后，未来就不用在群山航行了。
nodes.snippet_EN: I didn't think Eda would be able to handle it that well. Later, I found out that Unity News was state media backed by United Mining. If you got into trouble with them, it basically meant your days of flying around the Peaks were over.
nodes.option_EN: Then leave the airspace immediately.

nodes.snippet: The woman kept asking us if we wanted to buy a poster of the "Nasty Dirtbag". We
nodes.option: Sorry. The greatest champions compete with themselves.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
挑衅的家伙一直问我们要不要购买「混乱土鬼」的海报。
我们不耐的离开斗技场。
nodes.snippet_EN: The woman kept asking us if we wanted to buy a poster of the "Nasty Dirtbag". We got fed up with her and just left.
nodes.option_EN: Sorry. The greatest champions compete with themselves.
nodes.option_CHS: 失礼了，但只有自己能与自己竞争

nodes.snippet: The synthescepters made by Luma Caverna were different from those produced in Ea
nodes.option: (Let Jun give it a shot...)
nodes.snippet_CHS: 龙洞化工出产的仿声器跟瀛海不同，调整声音时多花了点时间，但结果还算满意。
nodes.snippet_EN: The synthescepters made by Luma Caverna were different from those produced in East Ocean. It took a bit more time to tune them, but the results were good.
nodes.option_EN: (Let Jun give it a shot...)

nodes.snippet: Remi was one of the best hackers in the Peaks, but United Mining's signal wasn't
nodes.snippet_CHS:
虽然菈米亚是群山一流的黑客，
但矿联讯号也不是随便能干扰的，
幸好他们只把这当成民间意外，
否则后果不堪设想。

最后我们被以不正当通讯进行小额罚锾...
nodes.snippet_EN:
Remi was one of the best hackers in the Peaks, but United Mining's signal wasn't easy to jam. Lucky for us, they thought it was just an accident, otherwise things would have turned out much worse.

We ended up having to pay a small fine for sending out irregular signals.

nodes.snippet: It took a lot of time reeling it in and opening it, but no matter how things wen
nodes.option: It might have something useful inside. Let's figure out how to open it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 花了不少时间，但宇宙中拾荒这种事，跟探勘龙穴比起来还是轻松很多，能为红楼做点什么，也能转移我的心情。
nodes.snippet_EN: It took a lot of time reeling it in and opening it, but no matter how things went, scavenging was always a lot easier than excavating. Plus, helping out Red Chamber really took my mind off things.
nodes.option_EN: It might have something useful inside. Let's figure out how to open it.
nodes.option_CHS: 花点时间想办法打开它，或许会找到些什么

nodes.snippet: Back in those days, if it wasn't a cave, most of the time Eda didn't want to was
nodes.option: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 记得当时只要不是龙穴，艾妲多半认为，不需要多花时间在这些地方。
nodes.snippet_EN: Back in those days, if it wasn't a cave, most of the time Eda didn't want to waste time on it.
nodes.option_EN: It might be something, but we still shouldn't waste any time on it.
nodes.option_CHS: 虽然可惜，但还是别乱来好了。

nodes.snippet: The captain of the so-called Nomadic Rhythm had detailed knowledge of the enviro
nodes.option: (How do they know where the control panel is? Sounds suspicious.)
nodes.snippet_CHS:
自称「流浪节拍」团长的声音对环境的描述太过详细，令我怀疑又是黑帮的陷阱。
安全起见，我不动声色的离开了现场。
后来在协会分部听说，「流浪节拍」自行脱困了，但对被拒绝救援一事耿耿于怀。
nodes.snippet_EN:
The captain of the so-called Nomadic Rhythm had detailed knowledge of the environment. Too detailed. It made me think it was probably a trap.

Safety always came first. I snuck away without making a sound. Afterward, at one of the association's branches, I heard they had managed to escape, and they were really upset that someone had just left them there.
nodes.option_EN: (How do they know where the control panel is? Sounds suspicious.)
nodes.option_CHS: （...他们怎么知道有控制面板？小心为上）

nodes.snippet: I followed the captain's orders and was able to clean up the rubble. Eventually,
nodes.option: I'm with the association as well. Don't worry, I'll save you.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
依照「流浪节拍」团长的指示，我用探索机器人清除了碎石推，找到了操控面板。
几声巨响后，高浓度的汜气炸开了通道的巨石。
「流浪节拍」的成员向我道谢，原来其中有人曾属于吉普赛家族，为了寻回遗物，太过心急而遭逢意外。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I followed the captain's orders and was able to clean up the rubble. Eventually, I found the control panel.

After a few bellows, the lumium built up to the point that it could no longer be held back. The large stones blocking the path exploded into a million pieces.

The crew members thanked me repeatedly. Apparently, one was part of the Rumani Clan, and was overly eager to recover some of their relics, which eventually led to the disaster.
nodes.option_EN: I'm with the association as well. Don't worry, I'll save you.
nodes.option_CHS: 同为协会伙伴，我会救你们出来的。

nodes.snippet: I spent some time analyzing the water and soil quality of the refinery, and we d
nodes.option: Since Jun can help, let him take care of it.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我花了点时间研究精炼厂的土质跟水质，
重新讨论了开发计划。

为了感谢红楼的协助，领队将一些挖掘到的多余植物送给我们处理。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I spent some time analyzing the water and soil quality of the refinery, and we discussed another development plan in detail.

To thank Red Chamber, the crew leader gave us some plants they had uncovered as compensation.
nodes.option_EN: Since Jun can help, let him take care of it.
nodes.option_CHS: 李莫既然可以帮忙，让他处理吧

nodes.snippet: The leader of the excavation crew knew Red Chamber had its own work to take care
nodes.option: Remi's right. We've got a mission to complete. Let's get out of here.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 废墟探勘队的领队理解红楼的难处，和我们简单道别后，便回到自己的挖掘任务中。
nodes.snippet_EN: The leader of the excavation crew knew Red Chamber had its own work to take care of, so after bidding us farewell, he went back to work.
nodes.option_EN: Remi's right. We've got a mission to complete. Let's get out of here.
nodes.option_CHS: 听菈米亚的，任务在身早点离开吧

nodes.snippet: Operating the exploration robot, I was able to dig out a tunnel that I could squ
nodes.option: Use the exploration robot to dig out a tunnel.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 我操控探索设备的机器人，努力在通道中挖出一条可以前进的路线。里面是一个坍方的会议室...感觉曾经在这里谈判过，最后我找到...
nodes.snippet_EN: Operating the exploration robot, I was able to dig out a tunnel that I could squeeze through. Inside, I found a conference room that had collapsed. It felt like some important talks had occurred here. After some searching, the effort proved to be worth it.
nodes.option_EN: Use the exploration robot to dig out a tunnel.
nodes.option_CHS: 用探索机器人挖出通道

nodes.snippet: Safety first. I turned around to explore some other passageways. Back then, I wa
nodes.option: I shouldn't risk it.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
安全起见，我转身去探索其他通道，
没有再继续前进下去。
当年我因为谨慎，错过了很多探险机会。
nodes.snippet_EN: Safety first. I turned around to explore some other passageways. Back then, I was extremely cautious and let a lot of opportunities pass by.
nodes.option_EN: I shouldn't risk it.
nodes.option_CHS: 不要冒险进入危险区域吧

nodes.snippet: Eda was always worried about my safety. It didn't matter what it was, she put al
nodes.option: Don't mess with it. A locked door on an agricultural satellite is not normal.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 艾妲总是很担心我会遇到危险，她似乎将事情都当成自己的责任。
nodes.snippet_EN: Eda was always worried about my safety. It didn't matter what it was, she put all the responsibility on herself.
nodes.option_EN: Don't mess with it. A locked door on an agricultural satellite is not normal.
nodes.option_CHS: 别乱来，农业卫星深锁的大门，不太寻常

nodes.snippet:
"I can't focus..."

Whenever Remi and I would argue, it would affect Eda. And th
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「集中不了精神...」

在我跟菈米亚吵架的日子里，艾妲的精神很糟，终于这次混有杂质的汜水流入引擎管线，船体发生了爆炸意外。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"I can't focus..."

Whenever Remi and I would argue, it would affect Eda. And this time, some impurities got mixed in with the lumenide. It entered the engine pipeline and caused an explosion.

nodes.snippet: Behind the gate was a group of runners lying on the ground. It looked like they'
nodes.option: (Try to open it with a starsong.)
nodes.snippet_CHS:
在龙门后，一队探勘人倒在地上。似乎是为了分赃不均而起了内哄。
在祈祷他们的安息后，我清点了他们的遗物，找到一些珍贵的东西。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Behind the gate was a group of runners lying on the ground. It looked like they'd gotten into an argument over how to split the stolen goods.

After praying for their souls, I cleaned up everything they had left behind, and even found a few valuable items.
nodes.option_EN: (Try to open it with a starsong.)

nodes.snippet: I carefully crawled up the wall and placed the explosives. The United Mining exc
nodes.option: Alright, I'll help you place the explosives.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
我小心地爬到墙上安装炸药，矿联的探勘团催促我赶快离开爆炸范围，迫不及待地炸毁了龙门。
被爆破的粉尘弄得灰头土脸，矿联团队的人大笑之余，分了点清出来的矿石给我。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I carefully crawled up the wall and placed the explosives. The United Mining excavation squad told me to hurry up and get down, as if they were eager to blow up the gate.

The blast covered my face in dust, and the squad couldn't stop laughing. They gave us some ore for my services.
nodes.option_EN: Alright, I'll help you place the explosives.
nodes.option_CHS: 好吧，我会替你们安装好炸药。

nodes.snippet: Analyzing the incoming ship's ID...
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#解析逼近的船体编号...又来了，是群山的海盗，应该又是奖金猎人！

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#（没想到动到白牙会让事情这么麻烦...怎么办）
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Sister_Angry#Analyzing the incoming ship's ID...

Crap! More pirates. I bet they're here for the bounty!

#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#(I never thought messing with Bones would make things so difficult... What do we do?)

nodes.snippet: It's the Lumen Association's solar patrol squad! They offered us fuel and a trip
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Sister_Happy#是龙脉协会的恒星巡逻队，他们说可以提供少量的油量补给

并接泊我们回恒星警报站！#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#
nodes.snippet_EN: #AVATAR:Sister_Happy#It's the Lumen Association's solar patrol squad! They offered us fuel and a trip back to the Solar Alerting Post!#AVATAR:Girl_Happy#

nodes.snippet: "You shouldn't be flying drunk... We have some equipment that will extract the a
nodes.snippet_CHS:
「喝酒驾驶很危险，需要我们提供醒酒设备吗？」

我印象很深刻，艾妲跟我一样很不擅长这类沟通，觉得被污辱的对方打开了防御系统，追着红楼一阵扫射才结束。
nodes.snippet_EN:
"You shouldn't be flying drunk... We have some equipment that will extract the alcohol from you. Would you like us to send it over?" It turned out that Eda wasn't any better than I was at handling situations like that.

The barkeep felt humiliated, so he turned on his ship's defense system and fired a few rounds at Red Chamber before heading off.

nodes.snippet: The woman kept saying what a shame it was and asked Eda if there was some way to
nodes.option: This won't do us any good. Let's go.
nodes.snippet_CHS: 对方不断说着这有多可惜，希望艾妲留下联络方式，但还是被婉拒了。
nodes.snippet_EN: The woman kept saying what a shame it was and asked Eda if there was some way to contact her, but Eda politely refused.
nodes.option_EN: This won't do us any good. Let's go.

nodes.snippet: Jun, Remi didn't mean what she said.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#李莫，我还是想说，菈米亚无心的

她从小跟我长大，嘴巴就那样

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#我知道，我喜欢你们，我也不认为菈米亚会做那种事...

只是不喜欢被提到我的家...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#替她抱歉了...

........是说

我有点后悔来这里打听情报，只有生化果园...跟龙脉绝对不会有关联——

有人来了！

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#动起来，铁岚城的市民们！

铁火大锤远从第一星区运来，别让我们错过了！

第二十一号货柜的缺口谁要补，你们两个愣在那做什么，动起来啊！#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:Girl_Sad#Jun, Remi didn't mean what she said.

She grew up with me. That's just how she talks.

#AVATAR:Man_Think##OUTFITS:Man_WanHuoSuit#I know. I really like both of you, and I know Remi didn't mean it...

It's... I just don't like people bringing up my clan...

#AVATAR:Girl_Think#Well, I just want to apologize on her behalf...

...You know...

I kind of regret coming here. It's just... a farm. There's no way there's any lumen intel here—

Somebody's coming!

#AVATAR:PMUOfficerB_N##NONAME#Citizens of Ironwind! Let's go!

The flaming hammer will be coming in from sector one. Don't let us miss it!

Who's loading up container 21? You two, why the hell are you just standing there? Get moving!#AVATAR:Girl_Unbelieve1#

nodes.snippet:
Thanks to Eda's quick thinking, we were able to avoid getting hit.

Ignis, the s
nodes.option: Hide behind an asteroid. We'll be fine.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
所幸艾妲即时反应，我们才躲过一劫。

群山的恒星「烛龙」，一直以不稳定的闪焰得名，故多有它愤怒与天罚的神话。
nodes.snippet_EN:
Thanks to Eda's quick thinking, we were able to avoid getting hit.

Ignis, the star of Thousand Peaks, was notorious for its highly unstable solar flares, which appeared frequently in myths of divine retribution.
nodes.option_EN: Hide behind an asteroid. We'll be fine.
nodes.option_CHS: 立刻躲进小行星的暗面，没事的

nodes.snippet: This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You have entered United Mining airspace.
nodes.snippet_CHS:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#警告，前方的龙脉探测船，你已经步入了矿联的合法领空，请立刻离开#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#（怎么连边境的哨站也有驻军防守...）#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#
nodes.snippet_EN:
#AVATAR:PMUSoldierB_N##NONAME#This is a warning to the vessel ahead. You have entered United Mining airspace. Please leave immediately.#EFFECT_START:Radio##EFFECT_END:Radio#

#AVATAR:Sister_Nervous2#(Why are there even troops stationed at the border sentry station...)#AVATAR:Girl_Nervous#

nodes.snippet: They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of ene
nodes.snippet_CHS:
讯号在瞬间被拆解出来，对方的火炮齐射。

尽管最后侥幸的冲过火网，但是船基本上受伤严重，当时我们都怀疑自己还能航行多久...
nodes.snippet_EN:
They cracked the signal almost immediately and we were met with a barrage of enemy fire.

Even though we managed to charge through, the ship was severely damaged. We weren't even sure how much longer we'd be able to keep flying...

nodes.snippet: I was not expecting the work to be... that. However, the officials were very sat
nodes.option: Will this really help?
nodes.snippet_CHS:
工作跟我想像的不同，
但大官们似乎很开心，

我想...这件事我就不特别回忆了。
nodes.snippet_EN:
I was not expecting the work to be... that. However, the officials were very satisfied with the services we provided.

I try not to think about that experience.
nodes.option_EN: Will this really help?

edges.label: 我沒有辜負鳶家的名聲
發生了很多預料外的事情
我還認識了一位女巫...她有能力尋找龍脈
透過我這裡，家族可以取得大量的開發資源
沒事，礦業聯合的委託而已
